reviews.review_text: Wow what a clean, friendly amazing van park! A team of 39 women landed on this park and the staff could  not do enough for us! Upgraded us, nothing was a problem, quiet park, gorgeous lawns and shady spots. The staff outstanding and friendly. Please patronise. Everything spotlessly clean. Amenities outstanding in every way.

Ich habe zwei Nächte auf diesem Campingplatz verbracht und war insgesamt sehr zufrieden.
Der gesamte Platz ist sehr gepflegt und ordentlich. Besonders positiv hervorzuheben sind die sanitären Anlagen – sowohl die Duschen als auch die Toiletten waren wirklich sauber und in einem guten Zustand. Ich hatte sogar eine eigene Duschkabine, was den Aufenthalt sehr angenehm gemacht hat.
Die Anlage selbst ist gut strukturiert und leicht zu finden, sodass die Anreise unkompliziert war.
Auch die Atmosphäre auf dem Platz war sehr angenehm. Die anderen Camper waren ruhig und es war insgesamt eine entspannte Umgebung, ohne großen Lärm.
Der Pool war ebenfalls in Ordnung und eine nette Abwechslung.
Besonders erwähnenswert ist das freundliche Personal – sehr hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend, das hat den Aufenthalt zusätzlich positiv gemacht.
Preis-Leistung war ebenfalls absolut fair, die rund 90 $ für zwei Tage waren gut investiert.
👉 Fazit: Für mehrere Nächte oder auch als Zwischenstopp ist der Platz sehr gut geeignet. Ich würde jederzeit wieder hier übernachten.

Mooie plekken. Schoon, vriendelijk personeel.
Sta je op vrijdag: de burgers uit de foodtruck zijn een aanrader
Very tidy and spacious.

Told a wonderful being about hello
Fresh being was being delivered… No worries
Delivery wasn’t on time simply asked another staff if had been delivered … worst experience… she was aweful… asked a simple question, has it arrived, totally made me feels aweful, , a simple yes or no would of been great!

This is our third time camping here at Ingenia Hervey Bay.
The camp grounds are immaculate, spacious and family friendly.
Our children love the facilities and have made some special memories here.
Shout out to Brad, thank you for making our experience a good one. We will be back

We spent the long Easter weekend at Ingena Hervey Bay and had the most wonderful time! The staff are incredibly friendly and helpful. The sites are spacious, very well kept and the amenities are kept pretty tidy. This place is an absolute gem for families. The team plans craft for them, runs movies and really goes to a great deal of effort to keep the little ones entertained. We highly recommend this place! Thanks for an amazing stay 😊

We stayed for two nights in one of the rooms near the front of the property. The park itself is clean enough and the pool was functional (spa wasn't very hot if that's what you are after). It couldve had a small BBQ area within the pool location to make it a bit better (just my opinion though). The room we were given had a bunk and a double bed. The double bed was very unstable on wheels and moved around when we were in it. Shower head was too short and put water absolutely everywhere. The floor mat that the room had was tiny and not worth the while to have. The TV was small and couldn't connect to the wifi even with correct credentials, netflix and other apps didn't work from this issue. Otherwise it had basic fridge, toaster and kettle. The air-conditioning was actually okay but could've done with some cleaning. The "games room" that was on the map was just a room with a TV and some old books.
Reception Staff very friendly and helpful. Courtesy Buses to Clubs a bonus
Extremely clean.  Good facilities for children

Lovely grassed sites to camp on.
Was pretty quiet considering how jam packed it was when I stayed.
Friendly staff at reception.
Flat and easy walk into the esplanade
Really lovely staff. Was a bit far from the centre of town. Overall would be great for families.
Great place to stay, loads of space, close to esplanade. Clean and great amenities.
Clean and friendly. Has a great pool area for the kids
Great spot. Solid 10 on 10.

Had a great stay at Ingenia Holidays Hervey Bay on a powered site. Everything was clean, well maintained, and easy to access. Amenities were spotless, the grounds were tidy, and the overall park was quiet and well set up. Staff were friendly and helpful, and the location made getting around Hervey Bay really easy. Would happily stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone camping or caravanning in the area.
On-suite site was awesome . Clean toilet and showers .

Nice holiday park in central Hervey Bay, pool area, playground, communal facilities that are mostly clean and nice vegetation/palm trees. Have a few kids activities too. ||Just stupidly expensive for powered "grass site" over new years period, $115/night. And the sites were just big sandpits, barely any grass. No doubt it's hard to get grass to grow with people camped on top of them but you can't advertise a site as 'grassed' for over 100/night when it's clearly just sand.

Spent a few nights there on an ensuite powered slab site which worked out costing the same as many plain powered sites so five stars for them not being greedy and overcharging compared to other places in the area. Facilities were okay, quiet park, small pool and basic kitchen. Slightly weird angled layout of ensuite and site, bit hard to back into. Free Wifi won't get you streaming, but there's a paid option too.
What a good experience 4 nights and beautiful days spent here our girls loved the dog beach and the peace and quiet will be back
Great location to stay and prepare for Fraser Island
Super clean and comfortable.. will definitely be back.

The good: cabin size (3 bedroom), amenities (pool, jump cushion), location.
The bad: cabin was FILTHY. Oven tray covered in grease, blanket in one of the rooms had a big ?chocolate stain on it, heaps of bugs, mould and pink stain in the shower, coffee cups had clearly just been put back in the cupboard after use and not checked during cleaning. There was also a big soft spot in the floor that feels like you’re going to fall through if you walk too heavily. Met our needs but didn’t blow us away

Frist site we tried to park on was so unlevel that I couldn get thr van level with ramps or a jack it just sunk into the sand
So we ask to moved and staff member was rude and it was an effort to move use second site was okay we managed to get level to a point but was extremely tight

Stayed on a powered ensuite suite which was fine.Ideal location and very nice park.Grumpys food truck in on some nights with excellent fish and chips.
Brad and staff were exceptional coming around to check on everyone after a massive storm,much appreciated their help.Stay again for sure if back that way
Average service and the sites were horrible either really tight or in a sand sink hole and unable to level the van out even with caravan stands jacks and leveling blocks it just kept sinking

Here for 2 nights but gone all day. Great place in the heart of a quiet neighborhood. About a 5 min drive to the ferry.

Very clean and well kept, busy place. Would totally stay here again. Bummer pool closed at 6 as nice to cool off after a long day of touring but we get it.

The wifi was very weak so please don't rely on it. We didn't need it.

Would def stay here again.

This Caravan Park was good for a night but it’s definitely not my cuppa teas so to speak. It seems to be a lot of residents living here in their caravans rather than actual travellers. Everyone I spoke to has been living there for sometime . . in fact I didn’t speak to anyone that was actually moving around Australia.
This caravans park is not on the beach, there are others right on the beach and are actual travellers from what people say so if you want a yarn with fellow travellers it’s probably more suitable to go to there.
This park does have powered sites, clean toilets and showers etc but it’s not a social travelling environment we found.
Lovely staff, clean & tidy facilities + close to all amenities.

We stayed here for 2 nights in an en suite powered site. En-suite was clean. Camp kitchens were clean and well kitted out. A burger van came on one of the nights, which was a nice addition. We really enjoyed the pool and the jacuzzi. It was around a 15 min walk to the shops.

During the night&early in the morning we stay for 2 nights was heavy raining. But it’s totally ok to be here. Covered camp kitchen(indoor&outdoor) and lounge is connected, it’s perfect for rooftop tent users(no facilities inside)! As agreed previous reviews, the manager is really professional and kind(he did upgrade our site by himself I know). We feel it’s like family-run operating. After staying here, we try to find Ingenia Holidays at other location. Truly Highly recommend :-) Thank you

Edit: after the owner of ingenia, Lilly, replied to my review, I provided my phone number and emailed them a further 2 times, still with no response months later.

I booked a stay through Booking.com. Unfortunately, I had to change the dates due to illness and my travel companion’s availability. Each time, I phoned Ingenia directly to confirm the changes, and the staff I spoke with assured me my new dates were confirmed.

I later received a message saying my original booking was ready for check-in. I contacted Ingenia and the lady I spoke with didn’t seem to know what was going on. I eventually spoke with the manager, Brad, who told me he would liaise with Booking.com and ensure I received a full refund. That was over a month ago. To this day, I have not received my refund, and Brad has stopped responding to my messages.

The lack of communication and accountability from both Ingenia and Booking.com has been extremely disappointing. What started as a simple date change has turned into a long, frustrating process with no resolution
Loved our time at this park,friendly staff and great location.park facilities are amazing. Would definitely recommend this park and would return at a heartbeat.

Just a beautiful location, so close to the beach and shops yet just far enough away to be out of the hustle and bustle.
The park is extremely clean as are the amenities. The Manager and all the staff are super friendly and very accomadating to your needs.
Highly recommend
clean and quiet. Really enjoyable stay

In general a good base for exploring K'gari and Hervey Bay area.  We had an ensuite and as has been mentioned before there are no lights outside the ensuite.  Also the power point for connecting the motorhome up is just under the gutter of the ensuite.  The ensuites are arranged in a pentagon shape meaning that some of the sites are at an awkward angle to back into if the neighbours are already set up, with fairly narrow roadways.  The ensuite itself was clean with plenty of hot water, but a bit utilitarian with bare breezeblock walls.||The camp itself was nice and quiet and kept clean and tidy.  Laundry facilities were 3-4 Washing machines and 2 driers.||There is a bus stop a short walk away on the Esplanade that can take you into Urangan and also on to the Boat Harbour.  There is also a beach at the Esplanade (so a short walk from the campsite.

Great park,clean amenities, great pool a day play areas. Heaps of BBQ facilities.would definitely recommend and return. Friendly staff and great atmosphere.Love the different food and drink vans throughout the week
We had a lovely pet friendly cabin. Well appointed with small verandah out front, lawn and table and chairs.  Good sized cabin with clean amenities.
Fantastic place ! All staff are amazing and friendly.
Had a great stay, kids loved it. Great atmosphere.

Not impressed at all. Thought we were staying at a family friendly park in the school holidays which wasn’t the case. Unfortunately there was a car club of approximately 100 people staying who not only hogged the camp kitchen each night but had cars with inappropriate sexual references on them. There’s a time and a place and school holidays at a family caravan park are not it. The park needs to keep this under control. We had a 9.5metre caravan and had asked for a large site. Unfortunately even the large sites are very small. Narrow roadways all through the park. There are 15 or so other caravan parks in Hervey Bay, don’t stay at this one.

My partner and I love coming to Ingenia Caravan Park Harvey Bay Qld we stay here every year for 1 week camping in our Freedom Nomad camper trailer with our awesome Majestic Panelvan Club Qld this is our 5th year.
The staff at the Ingenia Caravan Park are very friendly, clean Park and amenities we recommend anyone to stay at this park. 😃
Brad and the team are fantastic!
We were astounded at the level of service and caring from the team at the park. It's been a long time since experiencing real customer service. Keep up the good work, we will definitely be back.
Clean and peaceful. We had a van site. A very inclusive community vibe.

We booked a two bedroom cabin for 4 nights and enjoyed it. Spacious, clean and very comfortable. There was a nice covered verandah with a large table and chairs as well….perfect for a cuppa. The staff were friendly and helpful and our cabin had everything we needed.

The shower wasn't clean and had hair left by previous guests in the cubicle; the cleaning could definitely be better.

I had a branch fall on my car from one of the trees, so maintenance could also use some improvement.

It was a peaceful area, which I really appreciated.

All in all, it was a wonderful place to stay.

I cannot recommend ingenia holidays in hervey bay enough!!
They went above and beyond for me for my stay
I stayed 2 nights first night i camped and the staff at reception were amazing and so friendly
Second night was very last minute I didnt want to drive home because I was tired and came in and asked if they had any cabins available for the night and the lady at reception was so helpful,friendly and accommodating!

At 7pm at night i decided i needed a portacot for my little man ans accidentally called the number for emergencies at reception i was very apologetic and they were so kind and understanding.

The campsites are very clean & spacious with lots of places to visit around the park.

And the cabins!
I stayed in the budget cabin and it was amazing! Very clean had everything I needed to cook myself and my 2 kids dinner
The showers where very clean with very nice shampoo, conditioner and body wash.

Thank you guys so much for making our trip to hervey bay amazing we will definitely be back time and time again 😊

This is a beautiful caravan park albeit crowded. The staff are friendly. The ensuite we stayed in needed a serious renovation. Mould on doors and in drains. The inside of the shower the laminate was peeling exposing a mouldy shower. The water pressure was good and lovely and hot. Toilet seat new. Showers curtain clean. Dated fixtures and fittings. No light outside the ensuite and the drain outside was flooding and the gutters were dripping so everytime we walked into our ensuite we got dripped on. It wasn’t raining, it was just a filthy blocked down pipe. |The concrete slab was a good size. The park itself is a 15 minute walk to the beach and cafes. I would return but only once all ensuites are fully renovated.

We found the park to be good with all Services, staff were friendly and helpful, but our cabin floors and walls and windows along with the kitchen was just and not cleaned to a good standard and were dirty, did not realise it was a duplex type of cabin where the back Veranda was shared with the other side with only a privacy screen and backed onto main road where the cars did not stop all day with noise all the time put a real downer on our stay the cabin was not up to scratch for the money you pay.

We cannot justify the cost of our grassed powered site. $112 per night on the weekend in winter..  been travelling for two months and it’s the most we’ve paid as of yet and for that price you’d expect resort style. Small sites backing on to other vans by less then 1 metre. Small pools not heated at all so couldn’t swim. Jumping pad was deflated and out of action (was not told this upon booking). Not walking distance to anything it’s just set amongst a residential area. The park would have been fine if it was at a regular price for non peak times… but $230 for two nights hurt.

A very well presented park that is maintained to a high standard, in a landscaped, palm tree setting. The amenities are excellent and our site was a good size to accommodate our large rig. It’s about 400 metres from lovely Shelly Beach and the Esplanade has coffee shops, restaurants etc. We really liked the ambience of this park and can recommend. The staff are also friendly, helpful and welcoming.
Great park, friendly staff, clean amenities, away from the hustle and bustle and just a short walk to the beach. Good facilities for young families.

Prima camping op 10 minuten lopen van de kust. Wij waren hier 3 nachten en hadden ons eigen sanitair. Het sanitair is wel ontzettend gedateerd maar schoon en groot. Het water loopt wel de hele badkamer in als je onder de douche staat. Zwembad was prima en de speeltuin voor de kinderen erg leuk! Op vrijdag en zondag staat er een food truck met heerlijke burgers en frietjes, heel fijn en groot pluspunt!

De receptie verkoopt enkel wat basis artikelen, dichtstbijzijnde supermarkt is op ongeveer 15 minuten lopen (kleine supermarkt) of 10 minuten rijden volop keuze (kmart, Coles, woolsworth).
we stayed one night with our van. nice sized sights. very clean amenities and gardens. super friendly staff. will definitely stay again.

Stayed 4 nights in a Pet Friendly cabin that exceeded my expectations. Very clean, comfortable bed and everything we needed in the kitchen. Check in process and communication was very easy. Great location central to all the touristy things.
Had a good stay the office staff were so good and even went and measured the site for us as we have a big van and truck thanks guys
Friendly helpful staff. Tidy well maintained caravan sites & amenities.

We enjoyed our stay in this park, the set-up with palmtrees and greenery was lovely. We treated ourselves to an ensuite, what a great price not overcharged as many other parks we visited. Clean Ensuite and park is being well maintained. Pool is wonderful, ( even if cold on overcast days 😀) The only thing we would like to mention is the plug in for electricity, it is on the side of the roof of the ensuite, ( to high to reach without stepping onto a step) otherwise everything available for the Campers. Close to the sea and Esplanade. The staff member I dealt with on our first few days was a really happy,  helpful and fun person ( made our stay really pleasant, his tips were appreciated)
One of the best parks we have stayed at
Being here twice, lovely place friendly staff, great location
Perfect for a quick overnight stay & price. Good little cabin with everything you need and adjoining external bathroom (all undercover and on concrete). Very clean.

Amber & her team couldn't have been more helpful to accommodate my four friends and myself plus my dog..... all of us with a different "wishlist", easy checkin, cabins clean and spacious, handy to the beach & some shops, not far from anywhere really, if we decide to have another girls weekend, we will stay at Ingenia, Hervey Bay.... thank you Amber.

Managed by a friendly competent team. The accomodation was spotless and well fitted out to meet our needs. From the time we made an enquiry to the day we booked out, everything was managed exceptionally well by the friendly staff. Thank you from five of us, and our dog mascot. Highly recommended . Thank you, we’ll be back.
Great location not too far from most things kids had a fantastic time in the pool and hiring out the karts staff were fantastic will definitely go back

Booked an impromptu getaway and booking was very easy even allowed us to come set up earlier than check in time.

The place was absolutely gorgeous, showers and outdoor kitchen have made the plans at home change to make a replica. Went up to book the private shower and toilet and was given it for free and it was beautiful and only an extra $10 a night
The kids absolutely loved walking around seeing all the little spots and they absolutely adored the little fairy house! They also loved the occasional visit from Rosie!
I read some reviews about the sand flies but I just used my usual basic bug away kit and it did the trick but was warned several times about how bad they can be and had the option of getting their good mozzie stuff.

All and all an amazing spot and can’t wait to get back there

We thought this caravan park would be prefect base to leave our van while visiting Fraser Island. The toilet block is pretty cool. However, the midgies are terrible. Worst I have experienced. Also, we were charged a significant extra storage fee without notice when we left our vans plugged into power without any communication while at Fraser.
We left our site two nights early and stayed back in HB.

I’ve hesitated writing this, as I’ve seen the owner replies to any negative reviews of this place. But, after deep reflection and pondering, I can’t not share our extremely disappointing experience. I would strongly caution others before booking.

We booked four nights over Easter, a camp site, the Mango Lodge and “Gertrude the Wagon,” as a special (and very expensive) first camping experience for our friends. We are seasoned caravaners and booked a year in advance. Despite the high fuel costs, and 5-hour drive each way, we chose to go ahead with our booking as we were aware many would be cancelling and we didn’t want to do that to a business. We arrived to… a sandpit. A sandpit infested with sandflies.

Unfortunately our experience was nothing short of a nightmare. Honestly, I would not wish this on anyone. A severe midge infestation & 3 separate repellents later, conditions were made unlivable  - after a long drive, we weren’t able to sleep a wink, while our bodies were crawling with these tiny creatures. As soon as light broke,  we were forced to leave.

What followed was even worse. Instead of any empathy, apology, or attempt to resolve the situation, we were met with a rude and dismissive response and told we would not receive any refund. There has been no follow-up since.

We understand that some circumstances may be outside of a business’s control, but customer service is not. The lack of care, accountability, and basic professionalism here was unacceptable.
A very costly mistake and a deeply disappointing experience. I would not recommend. I’ve taken my case to Fair Trade complete with photo and video evidence. Wish I could give negative stars.

We loved our stay. Nice and quiet. The facilities were great. The kitchen was clean and had everything. The owner was always available and drove us to the check-in for our trip to Fraser Island. All in all a great place, which we would visit again. Greetings from the danish family of 4 🇩🇰🇦🇺

I’ll begin with saying 2 things. 1- the kitchen was impeccable and well stocked, 2- the showers were the best showers possibly EVER but for sure for a campground.

Unfortunately, though, the midges and mosquitos were god awful. No amount of bushman’s or citronella were keeping them away. They got through our (very small) fly screen at night and a week later we’re still up at night itching. If you’ve got a solution for the bugs, highly recommend. Otherwise it’s not your place.

We camped, so there is no real way we can review the "rooms", but my "five star" rating is based on the camping spots. I'm actually writing this review while sitting in front of the camp fire (little awesome fire pits provided)

The service at this place is great. The friendly helpful way the staff here can somehow seamlessly seem like they're not here, (respecting your privacy), and also have everything tended to is phenomenal.

If you're going to stay here, you need to be mindful of the sandflies and the mosquitos. This is clearly written in every piece of information about this place, and if you're local to the area, you will be well aware of the reputation of River Heads, particularly for the sandflies. Good Riddance repellent seems to work the best for them, and, with the aid of smoke from a campfire, you can get around these issues relatively easily.

The location is great! It is beautiful, mostly shady and spacious. There are a great little mob of kangaroos that seem to be semi-frequent and numerous birds. The way it is hidden away off of the road is charming, and the rustic nature of everything here is unique and endearing.

It is pet friendly (with a resident dog that does the rounds to greet everyone), and has horse-riding tracks. Not being a horse owner, I would check with the owners here before booking.

Special mention must be made of the handcrafted facilities and features, like the metalwork sculptures and the showers. So great to see so much time and effort that has gone into these touches. The entry gate is also great, as are the sculptures on the gate.

If you keep the aforementioned insects in mind, and take the precautions, you wouldn't find a better value of money camping area

We stayed at the Mango Cabin — a beautifully designed solid wood cabin that includes a bedroom, a kitchen, and very spacious bathroom and toilet facilities.
There’s access to a garden with a barbecue area, and behind it, an option for an outdoor bath in a kind of jacuzzi.
Up to this point, the place itself is nicely described.
However, the owner of the property doesn’t show much empathy toward her guests. She is very minimalistic and gives the impression that you’re bothering her.

The first time we arrived, there was an issue with entry and timing: after 2:00 p.m., the car is automatically recognized and the gate opens, but before that, you need to note that on the right side of the gate there’s a mailbox with a button. Pressing it sends a call to the owner, who then opens the gate manually.
The owner leaves around 4:00–5:00 p.m., which means that after that hour there’s no one to contact — only an emergency phone number.

If you stay at the cabin, note that garbage is not collected, and there’s no clear information about where to dispose of it. You end up gathering bags of rubbish, but you can’t leave them outside because of the kangaroos in the area.

The kitchen light didn’t work, and on the first evening we were practically in the dark until I figured out that the remote control was out of charge and needed to be recharged.

Although the kitchen is supposed to be fully equipped, in practice there’s no stovetop. If you want to cook, there’s only a small electric pot — so calling it a “well-equipped kitchen” is a bit of an exaggeration.

It should also be mentioned that we stayed over the weekend, when a very loud party with booming music took place nearby — quite the opposite of the peace and quiet promised in the property description.

In conclusion: a place that is unique in its topography, but with the above-noted issues.
A very welcoming feel throughout the entire park. Facilities are spotless and the whole place is beautifully maintained. Will definitely be back

Kangaroos can be seen just around the corner. The showers and toilets are nicely designed and very creative. There are frogs on site, so be careful not to step on them at night. The kitchen is large and well-equipped. The campsites are a bit uneven but have electricity. Water is available at the water-tree near the gate. Be aware of sandflies and mosquitoes on site and bring insect repellent with you!!

Camped here this week, despite being peak season enough space to spread out, not feel jammed in like a Big4.

The amenities were hands down some of the best I’ve ever encountered. The service from staff and up keep of grounds was amazing.

Well done team, already planning the next trip!

We had a great stay here. The facilities are well maintained and we loved the eclectic design. We were on a powered site which facilitates 4 sites around a central pole with plenty of room to spread out, as the owners offer cable and hoses to spread out... and there is plenty of space to spread. Unfortunately not everyone took advantage of this which was disapponting but not the sites responsibility. Fire pits supplied and we utilised the doggy day care to visit K'Gari. Great location and very enjoyable stay!

Spoke to Suzanne over the phone today to cancel my booking - which I was cancelling due to the complete lack of respect she had when talking to me and my partner on previous occasions while trying to organise our stay. At no point during any of our communications was I rude or hostile, in fact I was calm & polite on all occasions. I can only imagine this would be so much worse should I actually have an issue with my booking if we decided to stay there in the end. She consistently ignored my emails when all I was asking about was more information on a tour or how the transfer works. I asked her why she was so hostile with me and she responded that i was asking questions about the tour when its on the website. She was also pissed off that my partner rang to ask the same questions. That doesn't exactly make sense to me. Dont offer the service if you cant fulfill it! She spoke horribly to me and hung up on me while i was in the middle of talking. She kept saying all the information was on the website. If it was on the website I wouldnt need to call. Based on other low star reviews, it appears that this isnt the first time this sort of thing has happened. If you are so allergic to customer service then change your profession ! :)
Lovely quite spot, fantastic utilities and great hosts - no camping on top of each other and it's gated!

We absolutely loved our stay at Fraser Coast RV. The location is great as close to amenities but with lots of space to camp in peace. The facilities were so clean and well thought out. The owners were so helpful and we took them up on the doggy day care while we did a Fraser Island day trip. They were so lovely and reassuring. Highly recommend staying here and we will definitely go back.

Loved our stay at Fraser Coast RV park. We did 3 nights and hopped over to Fraser Island for 1 leaving our van behind.
The owners were friendly and helpful. The facilities were great and super clean. Had the best showers. Lots of space for the kids to run. State of origin was on the big screen.
We loved staying here with a small family. And great spot to visit Fraser Island. And no midges! We stayed at the start of July.
Would stay again.

Loved Fraser Coast RV park. |We had a great stay for 3 nights. Hopped over to Fraser Island for 1 and left our van behind. They have the best showers, super clean facilities and lots of space for the kids. |You can have a fire and as state of origin was on they had it up in the stage area on a big screen. |A really great friendly park with all the amenities and space. Thank you for a great stay.

We stayed at Mango Lodge, and WOW, we were so impressed. The beds were so comfortable, the lodge was well equipped, and the outside bath was amazing.

The RV park was excellent, seeing the kangaroos graising in the mornings, plenty of room for the girls to run around, the communal amenities were clean and well equipped and the camp fire at night was a great place to meet other campers.

Paul and Suzanne and Rosie, the dog, couldn't do enough for us and made sure our stay was memorable.
We did RV and found spot easy to reverse. Amenities are clean and well maintained. Brad is wonderful
Amazing staff, very clean park, pool is beautiful on a warm day. Will be returning

Best park in Hervey Bay. Ammenaties are always clean, lawns and gardens are lovely, and Brad is a fantastic Manager.
$36 a night, power/water (non peak times). It’s a few kms walk to the beach, which is handy. Dogs are allowed, unlike the council parks.
Love it, nice and quiet, staff is awesome, couldn't ask for better.
There is plenty of room for our motorhome, clean amenities, and great location
Great company to deal with. Pet friendly and very courteous staff.
Lovely park, pool is fantastic and staff are great!

Wow! I was so pleasantly surprised by this amazing accommodation! Staying in a "budget" cabin, I wasn't expecting very much. My expectations were well and truly exceeded!

The cabin is quite large, with separate living area and bedroom. The external bathroom was just outside the bedroom door and it also was huge!

Not only was my cabin located just in front of the pool, but the actual caravan park is also in a great location just  a short walk away from the beach, shops and local pub. The local tour operators for K'Gari (Fraser) Island were also happy to pick me up and drop me off from the accommodation.

Most importantly, the cabins were easily to make an appropriate temperature and the beds were very comfy.

100% would stay again and recommend to all with zero hesitation.

I just wanted to share our fantastic experience during our recent visit to your site. From the moment we arrived until the time we left, everything was simply amazing. The staff were incredibly welcoming and genuinely went the extra mile to assist us, which made a huge difference.  The facilities were top-notch and impeccably clean, which we greatly appreciated. The additional features, like the coffee truck and food vans, were a delightful surprise and added so much value to our stay.  Overall, it was a very enjoyable experience for us and our fur babies. Thank you for providing such a wonderful stay.

Technically zero stars. We used their online system to book at Christmas - plenty vacancies, but they phoned to say we were double booked and could not have our booking. Several phone calls and emails and request to just refund as we had to rearrange travel plans, and it has taken our bank several weeks to dispute the transaction, considering they wouldn't even send us written details. Reported to ACCC as such slack service and kept telling us they had refunded it. Please avoid as obviously reading a lot of the reviews they have terrible customer service and management.

Thanks for your update Ingenia owners, you cannot find the booking as your system is pathetic. Passed on and disputed through bank and ombudsman, only hope others avoid and save themselves trouble. INGENIA, not a destination on our radar ever. Zero STARS, AVOID INGENIA LIKE THE PLAGUE THEY ARE

Det er  den lækreste og flotteste campingplads vi har været på her i Australien. En kæmpe anbefaling herfra. Alt er så flot med og rent og super imødekommende i receptionen. Kommer vi retur så kommer vi også her 😀😀😀😀

Super toller Campingplatz wie mann ihn sich wünscht. Super viel Platz Küche Barbeque Grill Pool alles kostenlos zusätzlich nutzbar ansonsten super freundliches Personal es war eine sehr schöne Zeit mit unserer kleinen Tochter
Exceptionally clean facilities and grounds.

Our Welcome was exceptional at such a busy time we arrived no prior notice a huge Thankyou to Brad your service was excellent. |We have never been to one of these Parks before, Pool, Food trucks,Coffee cart if you wish to use these facilities they are there.|Updates daily from management. |Fantastic

Good establishment. Good facilities.

Staff are pleasant and go out of their way. (Brad gets a special mention).

Well located, although not on the beach.

Good kids playground and swimming pool (although a bit small...but adequate).

Its great for the kids, but if I could give it zero stars I would as we had booked our sites on the phone with the reception lady and she made sure our group had all 3 sites right beside each other and specified the exact sites we were on which is what we wanted and when we had rocked up to check in, they had us moved us to another site. Not impressed at all. Won't be returning

Lovely people and a lovely place. Camped here multiple times and the camp kitchen and amenities are always well looked after. Grounds are very clean and well kept. Pools are nice although perhaps a little small for the number of people who use them in Summer, also they don’t tend to enforce the rules about jumping in etc so I find it slightly terrifying to have my toddlers swim while big kids and adults cause chaos. The playground and jumping cushion are brilliant. It’s close enough to the water to walk and enjoy the view. And again, the staff are just absolutely lovely and friendly and efficient. One of my favourite places to visit!

We have stayed at ingenia a few times always enjoyed it but this time we had an issue with our elderly parents but Brad and his team went above and beyond to help us , love this park and love this team
Great place, chill, very friendly, good for whole family
Eine schöne ruhige Camp-Anlage. Zimmer grosszügig mit sep.Dusche und WC. Alles sauber.
sehr schöne, saubere & grosszügige Zimmer! Flughafen nur 15 Autominuten entfernt!

Super camping ! Équipé très sympathique et à disposition. Les emplacement sont spacieux. Les parties communes sont bien équipées et propres. Proche de la plage à pied et des commerces. Je recommande ce camping pour un arrêt durant votre Roadtrip.

Am besten einfach online buchen! Unkomplizierter und billiger!

Stellplätze sind okay.

Budget cabin contained all that was needed. Outside ensuite  took a bit to get used to, but was adequate and clean.
Cabin was clean, tidy. Aircon worked well. The park goes quiet about 9pm. Can walk a short distance to beach, some cafes and bus stops.

Awesome 👍
Cabins are comfortable and spotless.
We will be back for sure 😀

Great location easy access
Hervey Bay is beautiful
Great cabin.

The cabin we were in was tired and not all that clean. Kitchen tap was seized and couldn’t be moved, the shower taps especially the hot tap was not recognisable as a hot tap, therefore was quite scary when turning on taps. They both looked blue. Behind the bathroom door there was a collection of hairs stuck onto the tiles around the wall, and quite grubby, never scrubbed clean. White fluff covered the bedroom screen. Kitchen cupboard bottom shelf was delaminating and crumbling. No hand towel was supplied. The timber on the deck had holes in it. Have been camping there quite a few times over the years and am quite disappointed. Certainly not value for money.
Park was clean and tidy staff were exceptional going above and beyond to help us out.
Our last night here tonight and sorry to be leaving. We have a pet friendly studio unit and it's the most comfortable bed I've ever slept in. Good location, friendly staff and nice atmosphere.

We stayed for nearly 3 weeks Caravaners.Very clean facilities  tidy park 2 blocks to the beach and walking tracks. Safe area. Grumpys food caravan for 3 nights. We enjoyed our stay last year and this year looking forward to next year.

Awful dirty cabin that I was given to stay in.  Dirty bathroom and bathroom with stuff still left under the bunk beds from previous guests.
Mould and cobwebs in the bathroom.
Not worth the money.
To all Ingenia home owners do not stay in this property!!

A nice atmosphere and great staff. The older, square ensuite sites are small and aged. If you don't like dogs barking almost constantly, maybe select a different park. It's also a bit far for easy walking distance to anywhere.  Good if you have a bike. Overall a pleasant experience.

Amazingly helpful staff. Staying here in our van with our two toddlers, and our fridge died through the night. Called around repairers all day but no luck. No fridge = no milk = cranky little people (not to mention all our groceries spoiling) within 3 minutes of going to reception the amazing lady I spoke with was hefting a brand new bar fridge to our site, and saved our holiday (and our groceries!). So grateful for the incredible service we've had here. Everyone has been helpful friendly and kind (our first day another staff member came and plugged in our van as we were both too short to reach the socket on the eve of the ensuite and had stupidly left our stepstool behind 😅) .

Good clean grassy sites, beautiful palms and gardens, great ensuites, fun playground and pool area. We'll be back!

Location, and amenities were clean and tidy. However the  gate opening at 2pm only gives you afew hours of light before it’s dark after you set up. So in at 2pm and out at 10am is only 8hrs and not enough time to explore the surroundings.
I found the owners to be unfriendly and not flexible. We won’t be returning!!!

A wonderful camp ground, clean and clever facilities. Manager was friendly but not 'in your face', and a great place to leave our van while we explored K'Gari (Fraser). Easy access, clear communication.

We booked to stay at Fraser Coast RV Park for three nights.

The amenities were so cool, I loved the rustic vibe. The camp areas are smaller than expected.

Location is great if you are wanting to go to Fraser or Hervey Bay.

Unfortunately we got absolutely annihilated by midges during our visit and had to leave early due to our toddler also being very uncomfortable. We purchased all different types of repellent, coils, even the repellent the owners recommended, dressed in long sleeve, however we were unlucky. We did however get a refund from good riddance and they provided us with some lotion to assist with our bites.

Overall a good stay but really be prepared for the midges, unfortunately mine are still extremely itchy after 3 weeks.
1 STAR REVIEW REMAINS DUE TO THE VITRIOLOC RESPONSE FORM THE OWNER

Der Platz ist sehr schön und die sanitären Einrichtungen ebenfalls.
Leider ist es unmöglich das zu genießen, da es überall kleine Stechmücken hat. Diese kommen sogar bei geschlossenen Türen durch die kleinsten Lücken (Klimaanlage oder Lüftung) in den  Camper. Wir wurden regelrecht gefressen. Es ist unaushaltbar und wir haben seit einer Woche hunderte Stiche auf unserer Haut.
Da können die Besitzer des Platzes nichts dafür, aber es ist trotzdem schrecklich gewesen.

Schade, da der Platz ohne Mücken super und 5 Sterne wäre….
Absolutely lovely place, must go! So vintage and have everything you need. Would totally recommend. Bring mosquito spray tho!

We stayed at Fraser Coast RV Park for two nights and really appreciated how well-equipped it was. The amenities were great — clean showers, a kitchen with an oven, microwave, and even a coffee machine. It had everything we needed for a comfortable stay.

The location is also very convenient, especially if you’re planning to catch the ferry to K’gari (Fraser Island).

Unfortunately, there were a lot of midges during our visit. We even used the product recommended by the park, but still ended up covered in bites. It got so itchy we decided to leave after the first night.

Overall, it’s a lovely spot with great facilities, but definitely be prepared for the bugs — especially if you’re sensitive to bites.

Very chill and nice owner (honorouble mention to rosy the campmanager).
Very cute accomodation, everything diy zelf made
Great showers, very well equipped bush kitchen and lots of space! Very friendly and welcoming.
I will never go back in this camping. I had a lot of mosquito’s.

What an amazing unique and special place this is, it has to be seen to be believed.
Great stay, the best showers we have ever had!
Lovely owners and stunning wildlife.
For those complaining about bugs or internet, it’s common sense to have some spray, and just use your 4G. Kids can go exploring and use their imaginations, it’s the perfect escape.

What an amazing place with greatest hosts ever! We had a great time at the campground that is designed so beautiful and inventive! Lovely
Btw… At the entry you will see plenty of kangaroos

Caravans need to be aware there is no dump point. The closest is Hervey Bay. 20min Drive.
If you are here in summer the mosquitos and midges are probably some of the worst you’ll get anywhere in Australia. They sell Good Riddance at the office but we found it was useless. You may need something stronger.
Don’t forget you can’t get in before 2:00pm

Worst of my life. Woke to the van infested in midges. Sheets, clothes and ourselves. We had woke up at 3am scratching and realised the state of the place when we got up. There was literally no escape. Had to leave the place asap and spent the following morning and another 40 dollars in the laundromat washing everything we had in the van and disinfecting the van. Days later I am still covered in marks. On contacting the camp the were very dismissive of my concern or issues too which was disappointing considering everything. Road down to it is completely broken up so you would have to be very careful. We arrived at night and had to drive on the grass from the road into the gate. Would avoid at all costs and will never go again needless to say

A big thank you to Suzanne and Paul for making our stay so enjoyable! From the moment we arrived, they were incredibly welcoming and went above and beyond to ensure we had a great time. They took such amazing care of our dog, Byron, while we explored Fraser Island. Receiving daily photos of Byron enjoying walks and relaxing on the couch with them made us feel completely at ease. It was clear she felt right at home, and we couldn’t have asked for better care.

The park itself is exceptional – peaceful, quiet, and beautifully maintained. The camp kitchen was fully equipped with everything we needed, even offering some fun games for rainy days. Suzanne and Paul also provided fantastic tips on ferries, places to visit, and things to do, which made our trip even better.

Everything was easy, and nothing was too much trouble for them. The park is in a great location, right near the gateway to Fraser Island, and it had everything we needed. We thank Suzanne and Paul so much for their hospitality and care, and we can’t wait to come back again this year!

Cheers,

Jaiden, Bruna and Byron

편견 1도 없는 여주인은 두차량의 아시안 가족과 프랑스인 가족을 단지 같은 회사의 같은 사양의 쌍둥이 같은 캠퍼밴을 타고 왔다는 이유로, 단지 동시에 입장했다는 이유로, 단지 먼저 진입했다는 이유로, 심지어 단지 동시에 차에 내려 차량 인원을 간발의 시간차로 말했다는 이유로, 1박 요금을 우리에게 몰아서 받으려 함. 각자 다른 가족에게 받으려 시도하지 않았을까? 지금도 의문임. `아니라고 저 가족과는 모르는 사이라고` 했음에도 굳이 안에 있는 남주인을 불러서 전화예약 여부를 확인한 이유는 지금도 의문임. 나중에 이메일로 보낸 영수증에 admin fee가 붙어 물어보니 보안문제로 사전예약 후 입장허가 관련비용이라며. 20여 일 머무며 입장료 받은 유일한 밴파크.

이것 외에는 깨끗한 주방, 특별한 컨셉의 화장실, 조용한 파크, 그리고 불멍.

Sehr nett und mit viel Liebe zum Detail! Gerne mal vorbeischauen!

Besonders Marc war sehr sehr nett und hat uns sogar noch Garnelen gebracht, die wir dann an der sehr schönen Outdoorküche gebraten haben :)

Wenn in River Heads, dann dort!

First impressions were great until we got to the camp site. 3 groups of us booked and paid for 5 nights however left after the second night, should have left after the first but it’s a bit of a drive for 1 night. Sand flys galore! We bought every repellant you could. Candles, spray, cream, coils and nothing works. The only reason I gave 2 stars was the ammenities were nice though needed the repellant in hand for that too.
Would definitely not return.
Great campsite, lovely trees and great birds

Nice park , close to the  main drag/ beach. Staff excellent . Park neat & tidy.
Facilities all good,..only downside was it was a little tight to park van.
Would definitely stay again.
Loved our stay, friendly staff, Brad was awesome very helpful. Clean park good clean amenities. Close to everything. Will return
Stayed 4 nights with our two Maltese, very clean and well maintained, very friendly and helpfull  great location
Made some inquiries and the on duty manager couldn't  help me enough..great bloke

Very impressed with the facilities, staff work as a team & are always friendly.
All types of accomodation, you would be hard pressed to find a more tranquil & central location. Real enjoyment.
Great location short walk to bay

We stayed  in a cabin for 4 people. It was everything we needed. Clean, safe, comfortable & spacious.  The TV could not be used due to serious pixilation & the smoke detector was hanging by wires from the ceiling in the kids room. Other than that, it was well priced & in a good location. Staff were friendly.
Ticks all the boxes.  Our site was not one I would choose if I had an option but overall very happy.
Stopped in for a two night stay on a powered ensuite sites.  Short drive to town for shopping.  Beach is walking distance and some nice casual spots to eat close by.   Quiet park, well maintained.

2 nights with a family of 4 in one of the cabins. plenty of space but the kitchen was a bit sparse - 4 of each item and few utensils. not a deal breaker but a minor inconvenience. we only used it as a home base to sleep and eat in between tours. there was a bit of traffic noise in the morning along ann st but it is to be expected. i would stay again given the price.
We had a powered site. A lovely park. Great facilities. Good internet. We had a small site with an ensuite which was great. Friendly staff. Dog friendly.
Is a fun packed pet and family friendly, would most certainly stay again, two weeks was bliss. Thank you ingenia holiday park and all your warm welcoming workers.

We stay here often through work and they are always helpful including with an extremely late booking recently due to a mix up in locations.  Rooms are clean, spacious and with all the amenities required for a short or longer term stay.  It is well located and there is always plenty of parking and good value too. Highly recommend.

This is a 5 star park in our opinion, park very nicely kept. We have a caravan and had an ensuite, very large, very clean. Had a food van on our last night, best burger we have ever had. Keep up the good work.

We were only intending to stay 1 night, we stayed for 4 nights! Lovely well presented and well kept park. Great facilities, spotless amenities and super friendly and helpful staff. Great stay. Highly recommended.
Very friendly staff very helpfull,nice quite park. Great amenities, will be back.
Lovely caravan park close to everything
We chose to stay here purely off reviews and they were not lying. Beautiful, peaceful and such clean amenities. Will definitely visit again and recommend!!

Lovely four days on powered site. Could pick our own site snd loved it. Camp kitchen was excellent with supplied washing up equipment. Will be back for sure especially when they have their 20% discount. Thanks for a great  stay.

These wonderful people went above and beyond in helping us.  When our RV had to go in for repairs they happily transferred our booking to a unit and even relocated our trailer to the unit.Would not hesitate in recommending a stay here.

Great location, that's about it. Price $60 for what!! amenities dated, pool lets not go there, used our facilities in motorhome. NRMA Woodgate have ensuite sites for $55 ...just saying. Glad we only booked the 1 night.
PARK HAS IMPROVED BUT STILL ONE TWO MANY DRUNKS

We chose not to stay at this caravan park due to difficulties arranging a late check-in. Our arrival was delayed because of a flight landing at 7:30pm, and while approval was eventually given, it was made clear that management was unhappy about the request.
Having stayed at caravan parks all over Australia, including during peak periods, this is the first time I’ve encountered a situation where strict check-in cut-off times were assumed rather than clearly communicated at the time of booking.
We decided to cancel, as we didn’t feel comfortable bringing our family to stay somewhere where our arrival was clearly considered an inconvenience.
Prospective guests may wish to confirm arrival expectations very clearly in advance.
Old park but I love it. Dog friendly is the plus
Don‘t expect to reach someone helpful on the phone when trying to make reservation. Not helpful, rude and ended call in the middle of a sentence. Good luck with this site.
It's quiet and peaceful.
A no frills Caravan park but everything you need. Huge camp-sites, friendly staff. A relaxing and quiet place to call home away from home. Great rates. We would be happy to return.

Really enjoyed our stay here. Showers were amazing- good pressure, heat. Location is good for the Fraser tour and harbour view, right by the boat club which was lovely but a bit far from the actual town. Fellow campers and staff were lovely. Definitely a few who are there long term/ living but that didn’t bother us as everyone was friendly and helpful.

Old and tired facilities. Grounds not well looked after and a lot of permanent residents
Toilet and showers need a refurbishment
If you have a big rig parking can be difficult and stressful

I called this morning for a reservation. The person on the phone was rude and told me they were closed during office hours. Not trying to even find a solution.
Would recommend
It needs lots of work.  Everything is falling apart.  Safety tape around the pool. Tapes dripping.  The only one thing is the toilets are cleaned every day and that makes a big difference.

Having read some reviews after we had booked our site for Christmas and was surprised that most of the negative reviews were months and even years old.
The service was great the gentleman that took my booking end of Nov as they didn't take booking for Christmas until Dec, he also allowed friends to book in for 3 days when the office was closed which they normally wouldn't.
Overall the camp was basic but live able toilets and showers were clean but yes could do with an update.
Noise from the fish market wasn't as bad as some reviews stated.
We enjoyed our 7 days there and the permanent residents very friendly..

Caravan park, is basic, but we have been staying here for 6 months, and needed to put our rv in repair for 1 week, the owners were kind and understanding allowing us to stay in a cabin for short time, thankyou and Godbless, we had no other accomodation. :)
Park a little run down, but cheaper than the others in town, so close to the boat club , 1 minute walk.

Very disappointed. I rang this campervan park to book a campsite . Male staff member was very rude over the phone . Hung up on me while I was speaking to him . ||The gentleman said there was a site available but he couldn’t book it for me . When I looked for reassurance that I would be able to book the next morning he replied “ Office is closed . Office is closed”. He then hung up on me. ||Very bad customer service and rude member of staff . Do not recommend contacting this campervan park.

Great location, fantastic facilities. Only downside are the resident midges which were very partial to biting us. Would highly recommend using Good Riddance insect repellant as this was the only one that worked consistently for us.
Hosts were informative and helpful. The grounds were well kept.

Good for a backup campground
Has some interesting features but not really worth the price there's basically nothing to do
Very boring

Our 1st visit, certainly not our last. Such a beautiful part of the world. A wonderful surprise to realize not your regular caravan park, more like a farm stay with heaps of room whether a group or single site. It is so welcoming you feel like part of their family on a drop in holiday! The attention to detail makes it feel so homely, and is also so clean. I urge everyone to go stay for such a unique & colourful experience! Well done Suzanne & Paul. You have clearly worked extremely hard to produce something so beautiful. We will be back!

For 39$ you have so much space and calm in a big park!
At just 20min from Hervey bay, it is a great and best value for money location!
The owner is really nice! And amnesties really great
Bush setting, not cheek to jowl bin fires ok,pets ok. Limited power and water, toilets showers a bit rustic but adequate. Liked it a lot!

Best Rv park we have ever stayed at
Spacious sites kept immaculate including amenities
By owners Suzanne Paul and Rosie the dog.
Innovating camp kitchen showers toilets everything is fantastic
My partner broke her arm and we needed to extend our stay ,again nothing was to much of a problem helping us out .
Camp fire every night
Highly recommend to all
Thankyou so so much
Cheers Shane and Christine

We will be back! Amazing property with acres to explore with the kids. Suzanne, Paul and Rosie 🐶 are fantastic hosts, the RV Park was in great form for the annual River Heads Rock weekend. Fun times had by all. We extend our stay every year. See you next time!

I travelled a lot across Australia, stayed at many camping and caravan parks. I gave to this one two stars because of:

1. the lady owner was rude and unfriendly
2. it was a lot of dust on the site
3. wi-fi worked only near internet caffe
4. it was quite cold in the showers and toilets

I don't recommend this place.

What an amazing place, a piece of paradise. Quiet during the day, then a bit busy during meal times as everyone comes together to use the unique camp kitchen. It has everything you need to cook a lovely meal. Great view of nature while you eat too. I stayed in Gertrude the Gypsy Wagon. It was amazing. Comfy bed, air cond or a little heater to use as well if needed. Touch lights, infuser so its smells delightful when you enter. Use of your own outback dunny, which is very clean. Outdoor area has a table with 2 chairs. Lovely spot yo sit and watch the wildlife. Definitely recommend this beautiful place. Owners are fantastic too, very helpful. Great place to spend a few days to get back to peace and quiet.

Such a wonderful place 💜 peaceful, unique and beautifully creative! They looked after our girl, Willow the American Akita, whilst we visited K’gari. The best doggy day care ever! Thank you for looking after our girl with such care 💜
gteat place all good

Just had a glorious week on a powered site in our caravan. Amenities were immaculate, fire pits supplied and were awesome for this time of year. Paul and Suzanne Taylor were so welcoming informative and friendly hosts.
The park is budget friendly in one of the most beautiful places in our country. I would highly recommend to all ages and couples/families.
Fantastic place to camp, great environment away from the crowd s. Probably just a little bit expensive.

The staff is very kind and helpful! Regarding the kitchen, this has been the best campsite I’ve ever been so far, it was very well equipped and quite clean. Also, decoration and lighting is great. Showers and toilets are also good. The only bad part about this camping is the big amount of mosquitoes, there are TOO MANY, but of course this is normal if you are in nature. However, it is crazy how many there are, you cannot stay outside, you need to be in your van or tent. I would repeat with more bite cream and repellent.

Such a well laid out park! Space galore! Amenities are clean and well functioning- water pressure is great!

Bring mozzie coils, candles, sprays etc... the midgies and mozzies are a bit brutal due to all the rain.

Passage rapide d’une courte nuit avant un départ pour Fraser Island. Nous avons campé avec notre voiture et notre rooftent. Les commodités sont propres, une cuisine extérieure à disposition, décoration, accueil, sécurisant.  Le seul - : les moustiques +++.
Nous avons donc vu que de nuit. Dommage qu’on ne puisse rester plus longtemps à Hervey bay pour y séjourner une nuit de +.

En rigtig skøn og rolig plads, med alle faciliteter, både det simple og det luksuriøse, kan varmt anbefales til en tur til K'gari, ejeren sørger for booking og transport til opsamlingsbus til færgen som kun er få km. fra pladsen 🌞⛴️,og så er man omgivet af vild natur og kænguruer, det gør jo ikke pladsen ringere 🦘🐬

Stayed here for 1 night over the long weekend. Had originally booked lovers lane however on arrival the owners let us know that had swapped sites for us to be closer to amenities which was nice. We had dog corner all to ourselves which had plenty of room for us to spread out. Flushing toilets & beautiful showers! Loved the showers so much I wanted to take one home haha, I swear it was one of the best showers I’ve ever had I didn’t want to get out! The bush kitchen was super handy too. Lovely owners with lots of handy information about the place & surrounds. We also made a mistake with our booking date and they were happy to fix for us with no dramas! We will definitely be back for a longer stay next time.
Midges & mozzies were a bit annoying but they gave fair warning on their website about it and also gave us the option of purchasing some repellent from them :) ours clearly wasn’t up to scratch but that was our fault :)
Also pet friendly :)

Ingenia Hervey Bay Park is close to the beach and a short walk to cafes and food outlets. The park was excellent, amenities very clean, felt very secure, loved the pool and spa and food truck.
Brad was awesome and so helpful, lovely to see him walking through the park with a smile, made you feel very welcomed.
We will be back. Glad we stayed here...

I wouldn’t recommend this park if you are traveling. We booked and tried to call multiple times, leaving both emails and voicemails, to ask about after hours check in since we would arrive after the office was closed (office was open when calling/emailing). We finally got ahold of someone and she said a text with check in info would be sent which I never received. We ended up having to knock on the door of a cabin to ask if they knew of an after hours number which thankfully was answered to get our site number (this was around 6pm, the office closes quite early). They ended up returning our calls the next day which was of course too late.
Management were awesome nothing was to much trouble.Park is close to the beach and is not far to grab a feed from the beach front Esplanade
Fabulous had an ensuite powered site, pet friendly, staff excellent,facilities immaculate. Ground awesome clean 😎

Stayed here for a week in our motorhome with an ensuite site, oh wow very clean facilities, pet friendly, lovely staff. Two blocks from the beach flat walking, the food vans are great, grounds are kept immaculate would highly recommend this park. We will stay again for sure.

I wouldn't recommend staying in the studio cabins. Floors weren't cleaned at all! Informed reception, they then arrived with a broom and vacuum. vacuum didn't work so they just swept it out! they said they would come back the next day to mop - never saw anyone again! also, big issue with the black mold throughout bathroom ceiling!
Satisfied
Very comfortable and clean. Well appointed and staff were friendly and professional.
Nice pool, small showers, nice staff, well laid out.
We were just there for an hour or two visiting. Located 2 blocks from the beaches, close to shops restaurants and parks for the kids

Wir übernachteten leider nut eine Nacht im Bel Air Wohnwagen. Dieser war für 2 Person sehr groß und komfortabel. Auch die Toilette war sehr sauber und geräumig, besonders gefallen hat mir der Außenbereich. Zudem gibt es auf der Anlage, einen Waschraum, Spiele-Raum und BBQ. Der Mann an der Rezeption war äußerst nett und hilfsbereit, obwohl der Check-in erst um 14 Uhr war durften wir schon um 9 einchecken. Zudem hatte er uns geholfen ein Taxi zu finden. Wir wären gerne länger dort geblieben, nur die Entfernung zu den Einkaufszentren ist weit und der. Nahverkehr ist nicht besonders gut in dieser Gegend.

Super freundlicher Empfang und zuvorkommender Service. Die Anlage ist sehr gepflegt und sauber, man fühlt sich sehr wohl. Unser Caravan (wir übernachteten im „Bel Air“) war etwas ganz besonderes. Auf jeden Fall eine ganz neue und tolle Erfahrung. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt!

Enjoyed a long weekend with our grandchildren.  The room was well sized for the four of us.  The amenities were great with plenty of things to do with the children. A wading pool for littlies, a spa, and a larger sized pool. A wonderful playground for different ages and a jumping mat which our grandchildren enjoyed. It was certainly a great place to visit with children.
Really enjoyed our stay. Great with grand kids.
Very friendly  staff.
Great place for kids the groundsmen was a very friendly fella

Perfect location if you’re planning to visit K’gari Island. There’s the port next door and also options to book trips to Fraser Island at the reception.
Convenient camp site with proper utilities and amenities, clean and neat.
Easy to book, took us just a short phone call and all was set. Price wise the cheapest campsite with full utilities so far in our 2 weeks on the east coast.
Outdated park close to boat ramp

I don't know why people complain so much, the campsite is fine, it's the cheapest. The toilets are clean, they will always be better than the public ones and for that price... What more do you want? Good location if you have an excursion to Fraser Island, the web site is quite old don't allow you to pay and book, will be easier for the person, they will improve nothing to add.  Cheap and very normal

Der Campingplatz ist für Ausflüge nach Fraser Island günstig in der Nähe des Hafens gelegen, da wir vom Tourist-Service abgeholt wurden.

Alle Serviceeinrichtungen sind sehr alt, abgenutzt und schlecht gewartet. Eine Instandsetzung ist erforderlich. Die Sauberkeit ist akzeptabel. Für zwei Nächte okay.

Bis etwa Mitternacht ist es durch den umliegenden Verkehr sehr laut.

Wie zahlten je Nacht mit einem Campervan und Strom für zwei Personen 45 AUD.

Die Rezeption ist täglich nur von 8:00 - 12:00 Uhr besetzt. Anmelden kann man sich per E-Mail. Dann wird am Eingang eine Benachrichtigung mit dem Plan und zugewiesenem Platz hinterlegt.

This caravan park is very run down. The noise from the adjacent fish co-op can get extremely noisy day and night at times. Amenities are very poor, cleaning of amenities needs severe attention, watch cleaners apart from one use same cloth on toilets, benches and basins but no product, mop was disgusting. Camp kitchen does NOT get attended to and is broken, filthy and is an embarrassment and I feel for backpackers, tents, residents who use this as they have no other option. I spoke to office about cleaning to lady at desk who informed me it had nothing to do with her, to find out later she was one of the caretakers, if not caretakers role who's is it. They are more concerned about boat club. I feel sorry for residing residents and boat club should be ashamed that they treat residents as second class humans
The place is a but run down, still clean and tidy though and has all the facilities you need. The location is perfect, right next to the boat ramp.

Harbour View CP was a great spot to base ourselves for a week. Yes the park is run down and things aren’t shiny and new but… the sites were easy to get in to, plenty of room, literally a multitude of eateries at your door with the marina adjacent plus all your whale watch tour experiences as well.
It’s the cheapest park in town and we found it sufficient to all our needs.
If you are looking for fancy resort style accommodation this place ain’t for you!
But if you need a base for your van while you explore the area or do some trips, and somewhere to sleep safe at night I can recommend.

The owner or the Caravan Park Barry is the kindest and most accomodating man you'll ever meet! He has so much local knowledge of the area and is well respected and loved in his community and was so incredibly helpful in connecting me with tour operators and supporting me with all the information I required during my stay in Hervey Bay. His assistance was so greatly appreciated and made me feel very welcome in the Bay from the outset. The caravan park is in a great location and nice and quiet and very well kept. Couldn't reccomend this place highly enough. 10/10!
Arrived to check in at 2pm only to find the office was closed for the day, great customer service!
Quaint, clean and friendly  little caravan park close to everything.
This caravan park is very run down. The noise from the adjacent fish co-op is unbearable at times. Amenities are very poor, but location is excellent. We will not be returning.

Another great Ingenia spot! Very family friendly, great reception at the front counter. Clean and fresh rooms with good privacy despite the number of cabins. Close to the beautiful beaches on Hervey Bay. Will be back! Thanks :)
Had a great 3 night stay management couldn't of been more helpful and the facility were very clean. would stay again and recommend to anyone.

Nice and clean, pet friendly sites.
Beware of the children flying round on bikes and not looking where they are going
10 minutes walk to the beach and restaurants

Great location only negative was they should have an Adult only pool.
With many families there, couples without had no chance of a swim.
Just stayed there 1st week of new year. Very tidy park. Happy with all the staff and other guests was a pleasant stay and will be returning at the end of this year with family. Highly recommend it.

The park is pretty great! Can be a little tight getting into your spot. But the park is well maintained and clean.
The pool is lovely, clean with plenty of room with 4 different swimming options. There is also plenty of shade, which was fabulous.
What let our stay down was the greeting we received upon arrival.
I had emailed 2 days prior to our stay and asked if we could bring our dog. We were advised (thankfully via email) that we could bring him, as long as he was under 10kg (which he is).
Upon arrival, the lady at the counter didn't greet us , she took one look at my husband outside holding our dog and said... you can't stay here. No dogs allowed during peek times.
I responded advising I did in fact seek approval prior to bringing him. She went on (quite rudely) and said well that  must have been a long time ago. I showed her the email (from 2 days prior). She then went on to say, well I guess I'll have to let you stay. But you can't walk your dog around. As other camper's will get upset...
Gotta say... this left a very sour taste for me.  Even when I pointed out she was wrong.. there was no apology.. just continued her condescending tone.
The park is marvellous... greeting service was atrocious.

Awesome stay A+++
Campsite was super nice and clean. Pool was a hit with the kids.
Would stay again.
Rooms N/A as we stayed in our own van.  Staff were very helpful and friendly.
Had a great week at Ingenia, rooms were clean and well kept. The staff were very friendly and welcoming as well and the site itself has a calm relaxing vibe to it. Will definitely stay again
Excellent..clean  amenities  ..lovely gardens..ten minute walk to esplanade.
Convenient Location. Drive thru. site. Excellent Facilities in the Outdoor Kitchen. Huge kids play area Walk to beach.
Beautiful park with wonderful staff.  We always stay here when we visit Hervey Bay.

Excellent facilities, friendly, professional,accommodating staff, and, above all, very pet-friendly. Location so close to beach you could hear the waves. Scores of Super eating places nearby. Loved this place. Recommended.❤️
Comfortable and clean.

This park is well laid out.
Our villa/cabin was clean, neat & tidy.
The accommodation was spacious.
Tent sites are right next to the toilet block with the lights staying on all night making it impossible to sleep

HELL on Earth. Booked for three nights, left in the first 3 seconds. Front gate doesn’t even open unless someone opens it for you, meaning no owner no access. There is only one person there in the entire park…the owner, who charges an arm and a leg for a 100mL bottle of insect repellent. Middle of nowhere and extremely sketchy. No beaches, pool, or life except for the mosquitoes eating you alive. Don't stay there in summer, winter, spring, autumn. Be thankful you saw this review and run! No refund either good riddance!

Four of us stayed here before going to Fraser for a week, and it was amazing! The owners were extremely friendly and chatted to us about the history of the buildings and the campsite. Awesome little area of nature, definitely coming back!

Firstly my husband & I camped here for a week & we love the bush style camping & the amenities are awesome,love the rustic look😊
We got a nice beautiful shady powered spot which we were extremely happy with.
However we had issues with the electric gate not opening to come back in after leaving the park!
At one point we left & headed to the local shops & when we got back we tried the gate number & the office number for about a half hour with no success! In the end I had to climb through the barbed wire fence to see if I could find someone to help us get back in.
In the end another camper opened it from the inside.This was an inconvenience to say the least!
As a business owner, you wouldn't leave shop when something as important as an entrance & exit gate isn't working sufficiently.
Other than that & the annoying midges we enjoyed our stay 😁😁

We loved our stay here. Even though arriving late we advised the owners and they still greeted us on arrival, providing us with maps of the sites and letting us stay at a spot closer to the amenities than what we had booked as it was available.
Lots of old australiana charm, toilets and showers were clean and camp kitchen was very useful.
In retrospect we should have taken the owners offer to purchase their beg repellent as the sprays we had had little effect. We hadn't been bitten so bad anywhere else we've camped.

It was great nature surrounding camp site with a lot of space for my boys to sent up a tent next to van. The showers was impressive with the big brass ring as shower head and the hot water was so great to have a good shower. Owners were very helpful with extension power cords etc. The only disappointing thing was the mozzies and midges/sand flies- inspire of an early wood fire and lots of insect repellent spray, they still managed to sting us terribly.

Super Campingplatz im gemütlichem Bush-Ambiente. Sehr Sauberes WC, Dusche und Campingküche!
Sehr sehr netter Camping Chef, gibt super Tipps & Tricks für den Aufenhalt im Bush und dem Umgang mit den Moskitos :-)

Sind von dort aus mit dem Camper zur Fähre für nach K‘gari, ist perfekt, nur 3-4 Minuten mit dem Auto.
Beautiful
One of the nicest RV-Parks we've experienced. Very friendly folks and a beautifully maintained camp ground located right in the middle of  gorgeous nature. Pete, Tim and Simone from Germany

Campingplatz mitten in der Natur

Dieser tolle Campingplatz liegt mitten in der Natur, umringt von Wald. Die Atmosphäre ist sehr entspannt, da viel Platz vorhanden ist. Die sanitären Einrichtungen sind mit Liebe gebaut und sehr sauber. Die Eigentümer geben sich sehr viel Mühe, dass man sich hier wohlfühlt. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt vor Ort sogar noch einmal verlängert.
Not worth the effort

Australiana themed RV Park with novel amenities block, camp kitchen, wash house and disabled facilities featuring rusted corrugated iron.  Plenty of room to spread out in bush setting.  Secure entry and exit, your phone number will be verified.  If by chance the gate is open on arrival, drive direct to office where this will be done.  Lots of walking trails.  Loved this park.

Absolutely loved our stay at this immaculately maintained park. So much love, time and effort put in by the owners to create and maintain this fabulous park. Owners were very accommodating when we had vehicle issues and needed to extend our stay. Lots of room to spread out and set up, unlike so many parks today. We also loved our daily visits and pats with Rosie, the four-legged park manager.  We can't wait to come back and stay again.
Mango Lodge is beautiful. Highly recommended for a comfy stay. Come in July when River Heads Rocks is on for amazing entertainment too.

Perfect camping spot! Honestly this is 5 star camping. The owners are sharing their little slice of paradise. There is a lot of space, facilities are great and beautiful as well ! People are very friendly! I would always stay here when I'm in the area. Perfect for 1 night or a longer stay as well
Beautiful campsite in the bush with clean facilities. Stayed 2 nights in the middle of wildlife and enjoyed it very much
Friendly, accommodating, with amazing staff and fantastic location!

Lovely clean site, near beach, 30 min walk to town amenities.
We stayed November on powered slab ensuite which has a great design.
Great park for kids..very clean good area.
Great place and service. The burger nights Friday and Sunday are excellent!!!

This place is amazingly neat, tidy, well positioned, and has good-sized sites for caravans.. close to Bundaberg,  Kgari, and only a short 500 mtr walk to the beach.
Hervey Bay Ingenia Holiday Park is convenient and secure.
Oh, Badger and Brown's Burgerie only a short stroll along the esplanade. 700 mtrs away. Then a stroll across the road to beach..
Had issues. Dont like criticising places. They have been advised. Would be a fabulous caravan park, issues were with cabin.
We just had 2 weeks at Ingenia Hervey Bay, the ensuite on our site was very good.We had a great time ,Thanks.

Thank you to Mark fitting us in with short notice and just before closing , beautiful park anything you would need for a refuelling stop .
“Burgers is better at Grumpys “ fridays  food van inside park

We stayed here for 10 days and it was absolute heaven. Perfect location less than 500m from the beach. Stayed in a 3 bedroom cabin up the back and it was beautifully quiet, with super clean amenities around the campsite. Wonderful service and knowledge about a trip to Fraser Island from Mark at the office, great pool for the kids, and lovely atmosphere around the grounds. They had a food truck with yummy burgers drop in twice a week too which made life easy. We’ll definitely be back. For a convenient gateway to Fraser Island, it was perfect.
Nice and quiet, handy to everything, great staff, great pricing.

Stayed on a powered site with a caravan. Originally booked an ensuite site, BUT the ensuite sites are tiny and the one assigned to me was set so the van would open overlooking the toilet wall.  Not a good spot.  I requested a different spot without an ensuite and was given one.  These sites are large and reasonably spaced apart.  Very nice. The staff were great and the extra of the burger van was a HUGE bonus.  Meals were cheap and food very very good - even catering to Coeliacs and food allergies.

Really clean, great location to esplanade. We stayed in a budget cabin and it exceeded our expectations, although I still feel pricing for these is still on the higher side. Allow pets, we kept ours out of the room or it attracted and extra $50 cleaning charge, a bit rich, but at least they allow work around.

Our caravan group have just enjoyed the last 8 days here and thoroughly enjoyed every minute. The staff ,from office to groundsperson were great!
Sites were a good size,some a bit dusty but that is a weather problem. Ammenities always clean and grounds immaculate. Thanks "Brocky"
Pool area just perfect.
We stayed in a cabin which was perfect, very clean and everything that we required.
We look forward to a return visit either as individual or a group.
Thanks Ingenia!

We had the best stay at Ingenia Hervey Bay.   Mark at reception couldn't have been more helpful when we had caravan troubles.   He is one of the many reasons that we will come back to Ingenia.   Thanks Mark.
Good clean facilities, friendly staff, nice pool and two play areas for the kids, well equipped camp kitchen, great laundry. We enjoyed our stay here.

Fantastic experience. Staff are super friendly and nothing is a problem for them.
Definitely recommend
Great location, service good, amenities as needed when staying in van.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay, the staff were pleasant and helpful. The location and room was perfect. Highly recommend Ingenia Hervey Bay.
Reception staff where second to none. Cleaning staff great. Price very good.
