Stayed here on a powered ensuite site for 3 days. Big sites, clean amenities always entertainment for everyone. Grumpys hamburgers were a hit. Staff very helpful. Gentlemen at recipient knowledge of the area and Fraser Island helped setup our two day Fraser experience. I can’t thank him enough. Highly recommend this place.

We had a fabulous time in Hervey Bay and in this great park. Ensuite was nice and big and our site was really good. Staff were really friendly and helpful. Amenities were clean and the grounds were great. We will definately be back.
Central, well maintained, good facilities and our site had a good mix of shade and sun
We have stayed here many times over quite a few years.
Very clean and tidy The cabin was great value

The wifi signal was only 1bar so didn't really work.
No doona but a very thin blanket so cold sleep.
We had bed bugs so very little sleep

I would like to take opportunity to thank Mourell and the team. We are in the industry ourselves, and know a little about parks. This park rates up with the best when consider the whole experience.
One very happy camper.
very good
A nice quiet park with clean amenities

Extremely expensive for second grade park.
Facilities very clean but site was terrible
Caravan sites vary, our enquire site was only just big enough to get our 17'  van on but no where to park car. Had to site hop the car each night.
excellent
Great location neat quite,park caravan ensuit new and clean, a few streets from the beach
Great park. Very clean and quiet. Close to town and the beach

Beautiful location and staff. Excellent facilities. Sparkling amenities. We had a great big level site backing on to the beach.  We really enjoyed our 4 night stay here with our pooch. A security gate at the entrance to the park would be good for additional peace of mind. Thank you all sincerely.
Wow, the upgrades are amazing. The staff are super friendly and do an amazing job to keep the place looking great. Being dog friendly is a major draw card for me.
Absolutely beautiful park and staff are beautiful to deal with the amenities are always clean and the park has a beautiful feel.

Best spot! Beachfront site was just beautiful and relaxing and freshly mowed grass was a winner. Amenities were ridiculously clean and tidy. The fact that everything was brand new was wonderful. Will definitely be back.

Great park! New upgrade makes the sites bigger for large caravans like ours. Love love love the sites on the ocean side! Nothing beats falling asleep and waking up to the sound of waves lapping the shore! Park managers are super friendly and very hands on keeping the park and amenities so clean! Will be heaps better once the 2nd phase is finished. Definitely will be back!

We had an absolutely fantastic stay at Pialba Beach Tourist Park — a solid 5 stars all the way.||We stayed in the newly built section of the park and everything felt fresh, modern and really well thought out. The amenities are top quality, and the camp kitchen is next level — easily one of the best we’ve come across.||The location is hard to beat. You’re right on the beachfront — literally a 10-second walk to the water. The beach itself is beautiful at both low and high tide, and being able to bring the dog along made it even better.||The couple running the park were lovely — friendly, welcoming and genuinely helpful, which always makes a big difference.||We honestly wished we could have stayed longer. We’ll definitely be back.

We had an absolutely fantastic stay at Pialba Beach Tourist Park — a solid 5 stars all the way.

We stayed in the newly built section of the park and everything felt fresh, modern and really well thought out. The amenities are top quality, and the camp kitchen is next level — easily one of the best we’ve come across.

The location is hard to beat. You’re right on the beachfront — literally a 10-second walk to the water. The beach itself is beautiful at both low and high tide, and being able to bring the dog along made it even better.

The couple running the park were lovely — friendly, welcoming and genuinely helpful, which always makes a big difference.

We honestly wished we could have stayed longer. We’ll definitely be back.
We loved our stay at the newly refurbished caravan park which now allows dogs.|Lovely outlook to the ocean,we’ll definitely be back.
Great site. Always kept neat. The beach site is absolutely prime real estate. Great amenities, camp kitchen and laundry area. Always kept clean
Its free and kids love it. More shaded areas would go a treat.

Emplacement au bord de la plage, accès direct à la mer.
Parc aquatique gratuit à 50m(seul les deux toboggans sont payant 10$).
Nice owners. So close to water park, playgrounds, walking tracks, beach and shops. Quiet. Getting renovated currently
Great spot, great for the kids and young at heart. I love the safety considerations and supervision here!
Location was good, park managers were very nice, amenities were clean. Great park
Awesome location, right next to the beach and the water park. The people running the place were friendly and helpful. Can't wait to see the place after renovations.
Had good time there .The manager help us to get into are camp site made it lot easier very help full. Good to see upgraded is happening looking good.

I really wanted to love it here but it's so horrid that as soon as my family wake up I'm proposing we leave.

The images online of the water park pulled me in, turns out you have to pay to use the slides; $8 for 10 goes.

The bats screeching and defecating on everything every evening is not very relaxing.

We're next to the skip bin, which smells like someone disposed of a body in there. The smell is overwhelmingly nauseating, to the point we cannot have our windows open, nor sit outside our van. It's strong enough to be leaking in through our air-conditioning.

The facilities are very outdated, and seeing asbestos warning stickers on the ceiling while you take a hot, cold, hot, cold shower is not reassuring. Thank gosh they're updating the park, even still, we won't be back.

P.s. the staff are lovely, this is not a reflection of them whatsoever.

Nice little park, currently undergoing some extension construction and updating, however I feel for any camper placed under the massive fig tree. The fruit bats have decided to render the ground below as their toilet and the canopy above as their perch. The 4 sites below have been kept open for business regardless of the biohazardous conditions and their vans absolutely splattered with fruit and faecal matter.

Also note that the council water park that you have "access" to and alluded use of the slides is not an inclusion, it's the same access as everyone else, the slides however are $8 for 10 rides.

The site lacks any guest quality guest entertainment at the moment, hopefully that changes with the upgrade.

Great park, close to everything. Amazing staff. Special thanks to staff Andy and his family for making Christmas special for the kids. They couldn’t have been more accommodating. We will definitely return

Great park right on the water, close to shops and restaurants,
Leighara the office manager was great very friendly and extremely helpful, nothing was a trouble,
Andy the maintenance supervisor and public relations officer was also extremely help and very friendly alway said hello each day, makes your stay so much more pleasant when the staff are so good, the amenities where alway spotless,
top marks to them both

Prima lokatie, je hoort de zee.
Ze zijn nog bezig met uitbreiding.
Sanitair is oké, schoon. Er is ruimte om te wassen ook met machines. Dichtbij winkelcentra en eetgelegenheden.
Er is een waterpark waar gratis gebruik van gemaakt kan worden en er is toezicht.

Loved it here.
Perfect locations. Shops nearby for groceries when needed. Waterpark (free) next door, oval, playground.
The amenities here were perfect too. Kitchen. Hot water. Fridge to use. Friendly managers. Beach right there. We've had a great time here.
Great caravan park beside the water at Hervey Bay. Plenty of room and the management is excellent. I would highly recommend this park to other people.

This park is amazzing very quiet if you would like to sit back and relax by the water ,, Amenities are very clean showers are great i could not fault this park ,, friendly staff ,, supermarkets 5min drive away and 15 min to hervey bay heart of town ,, i wouldnt suggest swimming out to far tho maybe a paddle your feet as seen a few sharks getting caught ,,but dont forget your crab pots tho great spot to get some ,, looking forward to see the park next year after the renovations are finished ,, very well priced cheaper than anyone else ,, you wont be dissapointed

This is my 5th visit to Pialba. I love the park near the beach. The managers are extremely accommodating and very friendly. They go out of their way to be helpful with parking your van. The ammenities are  very clean. I have nothing but praise for this caravan park.

Great park. We had a beachfront site (non power/ water) and it was seriously the best site in this park with full ocean views.
Amenities- excellent and clean. Caretakers Andy and Leara were extremely welcoming, professional and helpful. They were very friendly and thorough upon check-in and even came to make sure we were all good, once we settled in and if we needed anything else. It’s not that often that you get such friendly service and a follow up during a stay.
Renovations are under way and soon this park will have some cabins and a dog friendly section too. Next door to cafe, water slides and eateries walking distance. Great location.

I booked for a campervan powered site. The park is half closed due to major renovations. Booking is online. There is no office, everything is done by email, key pick up and drop off box. The shared areas are old and tired but suffice for a short stay. It’s a drop dead location though, either a fab cafe at the entrance, and 1 min stroll to the beach, Cole’s etc.  My powered site was sufficient on a concrete pad but the power was quite a way from me. My 10m cord barely reached, only running it under my neighbours van. I needed a 20m cord. So be warned.

Love this park. Friendly and safe. We were fortunate to have a beachfront site in a quiet end of the park.
Managers were excellent and very visible throughout the day - always with a smile.
Amenities were always excellently maintained.
I hope the park does not change too much when it is ‘upgraded’ at the end of this month.

Great spot with direct access to the beach. Have been here before and glad to get a Beachfront site.
Shops are an easy walk away. Will come again.
Check my photos from our van, fantastic.

Certes emplacements individuels assez rapprochés mais
- service impeccable (très arrangeant par téléphone notamment pour une arrivée hors horaires d’ouverture de l’accueil)
- très bien entretenu et propre (tant espaces de parking que parties communes comme bbq, sanitaires…)
- last but not least localisation incroyable, sur la plage.
We had a beautiful stay here. 2 nights, beach front camp site. I did request to change sites and it was no problem for the management. Very accomodating.

We stayed for 3 nights recently. Amenities were clean. Nice position on the beachfront but unfortunately Hervey Bay seems to have a bit of a hoon problem and The Esplanade ( which the c'park is located on)seems to be their playground. Car noise in the evening was annoying and gave the area a dodgy feel.

No cabins at this park only powered and unpowered sites for vans , tents and RVs of any description and size. Lovely clean amenities good camp kitchen and laundry really accessible to township good path for walking along waterfront.

No idea on rooms hence 1 star.
The rest tho was amazing, right on the beach, showers and toilets were very clean every day.
$60 p\n services included.
The staff were amazing, short walk to Main Street and all services if you require them.

To be so close to everything in Hervey Bay (Pialba) for that price is pretty bloody good if you ask me.
Great location on the beach and next to waterpark

We spent our Easter holidays at this campground and had a fantastic experience. Booking and communication were easy, and Peter was incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay. The facilities are well-maintained, and the beachfront location is unbeatable. Having a waterpark nearby was a huge bonus for the kids. We’ll definitely be coming back!

Well....stayed here many times since the 1970s... however, in the last 2 years, I have seen major stuff ups when booking. These come down to their website, which is useless. I booked through the beachfront link and ended up in second row. Last year was the same ... late arrival ... hard spot to park... big van. They really need to address this because it's not just me... other park visitors complain of the same issue. No attempt was made this year to correct the matter.

Had a wonderful holiday at Hervey Bay and Pialba Beachfront Tourist Park has the best views and location. Clean and hot showers. Well serviced. Camp kitchen with good amenities (fridge, microwave and sink) Clean BBQs. Managers lovely and interim managers lovely too. Will definitely be back once renovations complete.

We've just got home from our 5 night Easter get away at Pialba Beach Tourist Park, it was our first time here and noone wanted to leave.. the kids has so much fun, such a perfect spot right on the beach. The fill in staff that were on while we were there were so kind and helpful, it's really nice having friendly faces😊

We will be back!!

This review will definitely not align but with immigrants and more casual "campers"

The  location within the place was nice(beachfront), although I have to score 4 as per my personal experience:

This is ideal for a caravan, not as much for a simple tent, so the space to accommodate within the space is limited and feels weird ( like overpaying for what you need as you have to put your tent like in an awkward position)

There was also a little detail outside the control of the place but worth mentioning for people like us( immigrants), we could feel for the first time a bit of discrimination and classism, nothing to worry about a lot, just puts you off a bit whilst you get used to it.

Down the night we could enjoy the "starry night" and that's what I want to keep from the place

P.S. management was great at communicating a detail about our tent positioning and also they helped in facilitating us an extension, which really appreciated it( we are obviously newbies at it)
Heerlijke plek aan het strand! Ook het waterpark is leuk voor de kinderen. Douches zijn goed en schoon. Een aanrader!
Great spot and facilities — thanks Sue for the kindness. The GG spot is the best
Grate Park

Sehr schöner Platz, direkt am Strand - wunderschön um dort zu flanieren, essen oder einfach geniessen. Die sanitären Anlagen sind einwandfrei und sehr sauber. Wir können den Platz wärmstens empfehlen und würden ihn sicher wieder buchen.
men?
Fabulous
Staff were exceptional, facilities great, right on the beach and right next to the water park. Was just a pity our tent ripped and we couldn't stay longer.  We'll be back for sure.

Mooie locatie vlak aan het strand. Dicht bij een winkelcentrum maar wat verder weg van de winkeltjes en restaurants langs het strand.|Wij verbleven er met een motorhome. De sites zijn ruim opgezet met gras en het douchegebouw is schoon. |Onze kinderen konden de pooltafel erg waarderen.

Drove 2 hours to get to this campsite and on arrival the guy at the front was so unwelcoming. They even give you a pamphlet telling you to lock up your stuff because there is obviously a theft issue at this park. Way to feel safe…I should’ve listened to the reviews before booking. Bad vibes here.

We pull up to our spot and it’s meant to be a beach front spot, our view is trees. We paid $57 just like everyone else to the left of us who have unobstructed views of the water. Maybe they should advertise it on their website that beach front spots may have obstructed views of the beach? Talk about false advertising. Despite them being in the wrong we can’t get the full amount we paid back, only partial amount. What a joke for their screw up?!?
Our go to camping spot when at Hervey Bay.  Great Ocean views and handy to restaurants and facilities. Amenities are always clean
Fabulous stay here amenities were clean staff were friendly and the location couldn’t get any better will definitely return

We always stay at this place, love it, great location no fuss service but help available if you need it. Good value for what you get. The people who work here are very friendly. Amenities are cleaned very well. Love it thank you 🥰🥰

We arrived in the night so didn’t see anyone for the check-in, but they have made it pretty easy for us to find our way. Also in the morning when we spoke to them, they were very nice. Enough amenities, but they felt outdated and a bit dirty. For example the fan hanging over the toilets/showers was covered in dust but still blowing. We were underneath a tree which was full of flying foxes and they made a mess and made a lot of noise as well. The noise from the road next to the camping is a nuisance as well unfortunately. Too close by, makes you feel unsafe knowing the other reviews about stealing and the notes at the amenities about locking up your stuff. On the other side is the beach, which is very nice!
Shame prices are going up
Great place to stay. Safe and secure for the kids. Great location too :)
We stayed in our car at this campsite. Located next to the beach with access. Felt very safe. Have spots for cooking, bbq. Toilets are okay. Have plenty of places nearby for a feed or activities.

What a fantastic spot to stay. No matter what site you stay on, you are a short walk from amenities and the beach. I would love to see permanent spots for those in need of a long-term stay but otherwise it's great. The staff are friendly and helpful.

Easy Check-In & Out.
Clean.
I didn’t miss a thing for one night

Camping ou nous sommes les uns sur les autres.
Cuisine fermée jusqu'à 7h.
Pas de possibilité d'eau chaude pour le café avant pour les départ early.
Douches avec eaux chaudes.
Emplacement au bord de l'eau
Budget accommodation, nice little cabins with what you need for a quiet break away. Lovely and friendly staff.

When we arrived in Hervey bay we hadn’t arranged accommodation yet for ourselves and our small dog, we had been rooftop camping for a couple of weeks and the team at both Fraser of the parks (Emily and Therese) helped us with a pet friendly cabin! We were so happy to have a comfortable cabin, lots of space and close to the esplanade with cafes and restaurants. Great service and location!

Well I ended up staying longer than I intended to and the staff were very accommodating, excuse the pun. The location was ideal for local attractions and having a camp out with the relatives and kids. From football night in the barbecue area to the floating salt water pool we had a good time. Keep up the good work with the clean amenities it was a pleasure. Thank you from Jerry and Millie

Hi
We are currently in the caravan park off Exitor st and can't complain, lovely polite lady's at reception and the cabin is  amazing, still have another 3 nights, but couldn't wait to put a review in, great pool and close to everything.
Thanks 👍 for everything.

Very outdated cabin, wasn’t cleaned very well as there were bits of dirt on the floor. The crockery was all stained from not being cleaned well, and the bathroom was run down. We also had an ant infestation which they would come out between 4-5pm but at this point the reception would either be closed early or ‘be back in 15 mins’ when it stated they close at 5pm. The pool looked nice but didn’t get to go in and the bed was fairly comfortable. Location was 20 minutes from the beach and the beaches were beautiful.

We had a fantastic stay :) We felt really looked after and the reception team where wonderful and accomodating :) Max went above and beyond for us and make sure we had a nice spot to park our caravan and it was nice and close to amenities. Many thanks.

I stayed here 6 months ago and was very impressed. Not so much this time. There was hair all over the shower walls, mould in the shower, food scraps between cushions of couch, dirty coffee cups in cupboard. Next time I will probably look for somewhere else to stay.
Good location. Nice and quiet. Easy access, boom gates.

We were really excited for our stay, but unfortunately, our experience was far from what we expected. We booked a cabin at this park for almost $200 a night, and it was an absolute disappointment.

Firstly, the cabin was difficult to find, with no clear signage, especially since we arrived after dark. When we finally parked, we were greeted by an awful sewage smell around the area.
There were no bathroom amenities in the cabin at all, being heavily pregnant this was not ideal and for the price per night . I tried to contact the park multiple times to express our concerns, but I never received any response from the staff.
Overall, this stay was a letdown, and unfortunately I would not recommend this stay.

Absolutely loved my stay here—everything was clean, peaceful, and well-maintained. The location was perfect, with easy access to local attractions and beautiful surroundings. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, making the whole experience feel like a home away from home. We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡♡♡

We stayed over the weekend and unfortunately didn’t have a great experience. The park was completely full, mostly with permanent residents. We were assigned the middle site in a very tight row and had a hard time backing our van in. The sites are tiny, with vans either side and across a narrow internal road. Reversing into our spot without hitting something felt nearly impossible.||There was also a dog belonging to one of the permanent residents behind us that barked constantly, which made it hard to relax.||This park might suit long-term stayers better, but it’s not ideal for short-term travellers towing a van. We won’t be back.
Would not recommend this park

We had a one night stay here and had to book last minute. Staff were so kind and made us feel so welcome.
Such a beautiful place and great facilities.
We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡

Great park,..not far from waterfront where all the action is located.
Facilities all good ,sites o.k,.just a little tight trying to park van. Staff excellent.
Stayed in a family cabin. Was very clean and tidy
Almost perfect. Only lack mirror inside the budget cabin. Other than that. Can’t complain. Nice stay. Would definitely comeback and recommend it to others.

Excellent location. We had an absolute beachfront powered site with drive-on access. You literally stumbled out of the van onto the beach. As a bonus we were adjacent to the ablutions block, which normally I would avoid, but this was quiet and great to access.
Great spot right in the beach , big sites, clean and well maintained, amenities are old but clean! Lovely staff !
Booked online. Powered van site, all dirt, no room to park car, no room for awning, no sun (under huge fig tree). Worst site in park. Not a good experience.

Friendly lady at check in.  Nice level spot to put up our camper trailer. Right next to main road which was quite noisy at night and early morning. Beach chose by for a morning and evening walk. Facilities are aged but clean. Lots of noisy lorikeets that we enjoyed listening to and bays flying over at sunset. A brolga seemed to belong at the park. Overall a lovely 2 night stay.
Great Caravan spot reasonable prices and great service from temporary caretakers

The place is broken and no one cares. 2 minute shower then hot water runs out, toilets broken etc BUT we were checked out by a lady who I believe was the relief manager who was from Geelong I think and what a lovely caring person she was. So much more happy and helpful than the one who booked us in. Thank you young lady.  However we certainly will not go back there again. I was told by several people who were staying there and had bad things to say that it is council owned which explains a lot
Stopped for some fish and chips. Very nice xx

Great place, amenities are  clean and tidy,  loved camping here and will be back again  large sites  and close to  the beach,  and negative  for me was perhaps  more bins in kitchen area,  and maybe  possibly another  fridge  in camp kitchen area,  otherwise  highly recommended , and close  to everything  you  need 😀 😉 👍 😄

Convenient location, close to everything, good facilities, and with access to the beach. Need a key to access toilet and enclosed kitchen area - which was quite a bother - but I understand why as there is obviously a problem with theft! We had some food stolen from the locked kitchen area, and also 2 of our towels that were hanging on the line! Friends had food stolen from the kitchen as well. I'm just glad nothing more valuable was stolen.
Good spot friendly.

Nice place, friendly staff, clean toilets and showers. We spent Easter Holiday here. I had a great time. There is a water playground right next to the campsite where children can play and the sea is nearby, so we could play in the water anytime. Thank you
Great family friendly place
Beware, they will take 3/4 of your deposit if you cannot make it.  Hervey Bay Council run the park!!!  Shame on you.  .  Caretakers are innocent.
Schön gelegener Campingplatz direkt am Meer. Amenities in Ordnung. WiFi leider sehr schwach. Wir waren auf der Durchreise und sind nur eine Nacht geblieben. Dafür war es sehr schön.
Just spent the Australia day long weekend here,  beautiful spot to relax, we will definitely be back.

Ein wunderschöner Campingplatz direkt an der Pazifik. Wir haben einige Male direkt am Wasser gegessen. Die Aussicht traumhaft.|Die sanitären Anlagen sind nicht die modernsten, aber sauber.|Das Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. |Alles was es benötigt sich auf einem Campingplatz wohl zu fühlen.
No soap in both men’s and women’s  bathrooms, no hot shower, what do we even pay for here?

Great location Very small beach side spots
Amenities were clean but old and tired Staff I met were friendly
I was advised to keep my bike in my Motorhome as there had been bikes stolen the week prior , cutting through the chains
I wonder why there is nothing that can be done to stop this eg security guards ?There we’re police signs everywhere As a single traveler I felt unsafe

Overall an enjoyable stay, amenities kept clean and so close to everything. Biggest downfall is the size of the lots. We had a lovely beach front powered site however it was very small size to put our tent on let alone park your car there too. If you want room for everything and your car you'd probably have to book 2 sites.

Great location with the beach so close.
Travelled with 3 little ones. Sizes of spots were good. Very minimal trees so shade was scarce. Kids weren't allowed to ride bikes within the park. We were told the kids had to walk with there bikes out of the park. At night the lights near the kitchen didn't turn off.
Staff were good and left our key out for us.
Has very good beach frontage sites are on the small size

Right on the beach ⛱️ 😎
Close to all restaurants and cafes.  Great walking track (watch out for reckless e-scooter speedsters as no bell or warning)
Park is packed in but it is good in groups of friends
This is a nice caravan park. Right on the beach and next to the water park. It's a pretty short walk to the shops too. Perfect for families
It's a caravan park right on the water front. Next door to a water fun park for the kids. Bring your bikes there is Bikeway all the way along the front of HB.

Right on the beach so can get a little windy at times but makes up for it with the views.
Facilities are older but still very clean and tidy.
Kitchen and laundry rooms were easily accessible and reasonably priced for a wash.
No change tables for kids in our block which made it challenging at times with the little ones.
Great roomy caravan lots, amenities clean but need some maintenance.
Great spot!
Beachfront with clean amenities. No dog, bikes or skateboards in the park though is a big negative
You will feel safe and security guard on duty at night in there, so close to beach and shops, all the staff are helpful , definitely coming back again

Great location
Amenities clean
Staff very helpful ,

Nach vielen Campingplätzen von Melbourne bis Bundaberg mit guten Erfahrungen und guter Ausstattung war dies mit Abstand der schlechteste. Nicht nur was die Stellplätze neben einer viel befahrenen Straße betrifft, auch die Sauberkeit der Anlagen und die Angebote bezüglich Campkitchen waren desolat und ließen zu wünschen übrig. Aufgrund der vielen kaputten Anlagen und des Schimmels an den Wänden kann man vermuten, dass schon lange nicht mehr investiert wurde. Schade für einen guten Ausgangspunkt für Whalewatching…

A great Caravan Park, situated right on beachfront, a north facing bay beach. Amenities more than satisfactory, old but clean and plentiful. We travel annually for our Winter Sojourn up Nth. Handy to all the shops one could possibly need. Great walking/biking paths along the Esplanade, with lots of playgrounds for children of all ages. Friendly, helpful Managers and Relieving Managers, who do a great job with maintenance, cleaning and Security.

This was our least enjoyable camping and was not worth the stay. The extras like WiFi was not working, toilets and showers were not clean in the morning, and the kitchen is at the far end and not well equipped. It likely caters to long term stays

Buen camping. Al lado de la playa. Instalaciones completa. Baños, lavandería, cocina con heladera, microondas, bbq. Nos dijeron que puede ser un poco inseguro a veces. Por lo que todo tiene llave siempre.
Walking  distance to shopping/Cafe beach at back of park..fishing /cycling /Walking...

A nice simple caravan park in a great location.

My only issue was, when booking our caravan site, we requested a beachfront site with no shade so the solar would work on our caravan. (As we were told the only beachfront site that was available was unpowered). When arriving to camp, we were given one of the only beachfront sites with absolutely no view of the beach as there was a large mangrove bushy tree in-between us and the beach. This meant we had almost no sun on our caravan during the day as the bush/tree was on the north side of our van. If we knew this was going to be the case, we would have booked a powered site not on the beach to ensure our power worked. I don't think the site we had should have been included in the "beachfront sites" as it really had no view of the beach.
Overall, the park was really nice, and we did enjoy ourselves. It was a bit of a shame the kids weren't allowed to ride their bikes within the park, but I realise this is a council issue.

Loved our 3 night stay. Sunset and sunrise were amazing and we loved walking out in the mud flats. Staff were nice and did a great job of keeping this old park clean n tidy. Just a shame that due to council regulations you can’t ride a push bike or use a geni. We had e-bikes so easy to ride from park up to Pt Vernon, down to Urangan Pier and into town.
Spent 2 nights in a lovely 2 bedroom cabin. Everything was clean and the kitchen had everything you would need. Very good value for money.

Filthy. Don't stay there! Don't stay at this park in a cabin!
Tip - To get the best out of your stay in Hervey Bay, choose your accommodation nearer the beach where you can go for a walk every day and see the sea every day.

Excellent great clean cabin fully self contained Excellent

Can I ask one small favour please don't use to much jiff cleaning it burnt the hell out of my eyes for at least 4 hours
Excellent value and very clean.Close to everything. Cabin great but needs something to hang clothes on.
The cabins are beautiful and clean. The pool looks great for you to relax in. I am very pleased we stayed here. Great, friendly staff there too.  Thank you.

This holiday park is the best in the area. It is quiet and off the main drag.  The managers (Pauline and Lindsay) are beyond amazing, very welcoming and have become like part of the family. The apprentice gardener Kerry is lovely. The park itself is so well kept, clean and tidy and has everything you need in a holiday destination. |The only thing that was a very small downfall was the Woolworths delivery trucks that were dropping off peoples groceries, they had no respect for the property and drove around terribly. |Overall we would highly recommend staying here and have already booked again for next Christmas, absolutely love this place and the staff that work there 😆.

Nice big rooms. We had a nice stay! The swimming pool looked good and the laundry space was also good.

Some people are living in their own standing caravan but we didn’t bother that. The only points to improve where that the electric gas pit to cook took so long to boil water and there weren’t clothespins. But we are backpacking so maybe we just are used to hostels! We liked the stay 😁
Great cabins nice and quiet not far from the water of Hervey Bay
The cabin's are very clean and we were really happy staying here. Pool, kid's area, BBQ, just a short drive to the main shopping.
I stayed here two nights in the cabin, was like a mini house with full size kitchen with oven/stove and fridge. Also had air conditioning in the main area. Close to shops and the esplanade.

Incredibly lovely lady at reception. She even kindly forgave us for a stupid damage which will be probably both expensive and time consuming to fix for them. Warm welcome, felt comfortable the whole time. Facilities were clean at any time. Showers are ginormous. Looks as if the park has been recently redone, the sites still look brand-new. Very calm, good place to relax.
Perfect location to sleep before and after the Fraser Island tour.
The cabin was comfortable, spacious & had everything we needed for our overnight stay.
Average is not really a place for a vacation

Just finished our second stay at Big4 Point Vernon and loved it, have rebooked again for later this year.
The Manager Craig is awesome, the owners fantastic and the permanent residents are top notch. Nothing is too much trouble. The amenities are older style at the moment BUT are being upgraded. This park is a real Gem, up the road, away from the hustle and bustle of downtown HB, I cannot fault it at all. Keep doing what you're doing guys, you have a guest in me for as long as I can travel!
Good place to park the caravan a little bit out of town.  Dog friendly beach a few minutes walk away. Amenities good
The place needs upgrade of lights. It's at the wrong end of town. Alright  for a night  but not a lot for the  kids.

Most horrendous camping experience we have ever had! We paid for a 3 night stay and left after 1 night! Don’t believe any reviews that say this site is quiet and relaxing! The permanent onsite population’s dogs and the surrounding neighbourhood dogs bark constantly day & night! It was that bad we abandoned our swag and slept in the car with ear plugs and pillows around our heads! Just before first light we packed up and headed back to the Gold Coast. The one member of staff we met was friendly, a few of the permanent residents in the park are like the unofficial management (or they think they are). After speaking with a few other campers they were portraying stories of how rude and demanding some of the permanent residents are which we did witness a couple of times. We were made aware that this was not a Premier Big 4 site when we booked but we thought if it carried the Big 4 brand surely it couldn’t be to bad………..IT WAS! We wasted a lot of time & money on booking & Diesel to get there which is really disappointing, we certainly DO NOT recommend & guarantee under no circumstances we will never stay there again!
Bit pricey

Wouldn’t recommend staying here. It’s nowhere near Hervey Bay itself, which was disappointing. The “games room” is very basic and felt dirty and run down. We also found some of the on-site residents to be quite rude. The laundry facilities were also an issue the washing machine was full of animal hair. It might be worth having a separate washer designated for pet items.

Overall, not a great experience we ended up leaving early.
The room was dusty and dirty. The games room was not functional

Very run down park. Very little space for kids to play. Far away from beach so you definitely need a form of transport to get anywhere. The kids room was very dirty and poorly maintained. This certainly didn't match the standard of park I have come to expect from Big4. We weren't looking for flashy facilities but were hoping for some open space and clean / well maintained shared spaces that felt safe for kids to explore. We were so disappointed on arrival that we left straight away.

Basic, small camp ground which was just what we wanted. Cabins were simple and adequate for what we needed (although we were forever sweeping them due to the dirt paths) and we had to use boogie boards for the bunk railings for the kids. Pool was awesome and had good hours, however when it was dark by 5.30 and no lights around it that was a bit of a safety concern (so we had to either not swim or get a few adults to come with torches to keep an eye on everyone). We went to the office daily to ask if they had light switch for pool lights to be turned on but the office was never manned over the week.
Craig was very welcoming and friendly and would often stop for a chat when around and had organized some awesome Easter activities for everyone which was a hit, however the other few staff we encountered were not as helpful and almost made us seem like an inconvenience in asking for another tea towel, toilet paper or towel for the cabin. It changed the whole mood of the holiday unfortunately.  For being fully booked and a a public holiday during school holidays, we expected to see more staff around to help tidy up the shared facilities or top up anything in the cabins, even just once. The lights in the pool were my biggest concern, and the lack of bed railings on the bunks (mattress was level with the top of the bunk).

Pool table not operational
only 1 gas bottle working in kitchen
kids zone games room dirty

We recently stayed in one of the cabins here for 7 nights as a family of four, and while there were a few positives, overall our experience was disappointing.

When we arrived, we were greeted by a very kind and helpful gentleman who explained he didn’t own the place but helped out. He showed us to our cabin and made us feel genuinely welcome — a great first impression. The cabin itself was basic, but it had everything we needed for a simple family holiday.

Unfortunately, things started to go downhill from there. On our first morning, I went to make a coffee and found the milk in the fridge had expired a month earlier. Not wanting to make a fuss, I went and bought some myself, assuming it would be replaced — it wasn’t.

We were only supplied with one face cloth for the entire family, which the four of us had to share for three days. After that, I asked at the office for fresh towels, and the staff member there was polite and helpful, arranging for the cleaner to bring them. However, when I asked the cleaner if we could have one face cloth each, I was told they were “running low” and that cabins are only serviced after stays longer than 7 days — though we were eventually given four.

On day four, I asked for a clean tea towel, as only one had been provided. The cleaner made it seem like a huge inconvenience, saying she had to walk all the way to get one. When she arrived, I also mentioned we had run out of dishwashing liquid. Her response was unexpectedly rude and confrontational — to the point I felt the need to raise my hands and say “woah” just to calm the situation. She walked away swearing before eventually returning with the dishwashing liquid.

After that interaction, I felt uncomfortable dealing with her again. We later overheard her speaking negatively about us to someone in the office, after previously complaining about management to us. From that point on, we avoided asking for anything further and instead purchased essentials ourselves, including toilet paper.

For a family of four staying 7 nights, we were provided with:

4 towels
1 face cloth (initially)
Expired milk
4 small rubbish bags
1 set of batteries to share between two remotes
3 rolls of toilet paper

No one checked in on us during our stay, and the office was often closed despite advertised hours.

The only real highlight was the pool and kids’ playground, which were great for the children — although they were not lit at night, limiting their use in the evenings.

Sadly, due to the poor service, lack of basic supplies, and especially the uncomfortable interaction with the cleaner, we would not stay here again.
Beautiful spot walking distance to the beach. Staff were all amazing and the park was clean and well kept!

Hervey Bay Big 4 Point Vernon is a fantastic park!😁 Craig was so helpful and friendly from the moment we drove in and his team kept everything spotless and clean!
The Big 4 team arranged fantastic Easter egg hunt (where all the kids got something lol😅) and a massive free sausage sizzle with all the trimmings! It was actually a feast!
The office, pool, camp kitchen, toilets and kids play area were amazing and our grandkids absolutely loved it and we all made lifelong friendships!!💖
We will definetly be coming back, a huge thank you to Craig and his team on a very wonderful stay and a job very well done!
🥰 Ant Shell and Jovi 🐜🐚🐶

We have had a beautiful stay at the Big 4 Hervey Bay with our baby, toddler and dog.
It has been a very relaxing 12 days here.
The park is maintained well, amenities are clean and tidy, the pool is beautiful and refreshing and the location is very peaceful.
Thanks for a great stay.
Courtney Rose & Family

Really enjoyed our stay.
Pool was massive and clean!
Kids zone was definitely a hit for the kids
Staff were all really friendly and just down to earth people. Would stop and have a chat.
Location was perfect for families.
Bathrooms were clean and tidy!
Overall fantastic stay! Definitely visit again.

Office was not available—neither by email nor by phone. We arrived at 3 PM on a Friday. According to the stated office hours, it should have been open at that time, but it wasn’t. We had no opportunity to speak with anyone from Big4 Hervey Bay. No one responded to emails (the email address is not existing at all) and the phone numbers were unreachable. Very poor service—we wouldn’t book again. There was also no information provided about the Wi-Fi password; we only received it thanks to another visitor at the campsite.

Powered/water/slab caravan site. Extended my stay a few times. Great staff, fantastic atmosphere and the best magnesium pool at walk in temp. Ps. Little pool 35°C 😱 Well maintained and current renovations are going to be nothing less than impressive.
I will not hesitate to make this my go to in Hervey Bay

Definitely not Big 4 standard! The pictures on the website are deceiving, as was the location. This park is in the middle of a residential area a few km’s from the hub of Hervey Bay.  The park is mostly permanent residents, and small van sites. It needs a huge revamp. On the positive side, the staff were friendly, and the facilities were very clean.

Perfect classic park. I was made fully aware that this park is not a modern Big 4. This park suited my needs perfectly.  The amenities, pool, games room and camp kitchen were clean and welcoming.  Craig is a true legend 🙌.  He helped me reverse my caravan onto site in the rain with no fuss.  Yes the park is under reconstruction but this doesn't affect your stay.  Very quiet and peaceful park. Thank you for a lovely weekend.

Great place to stay while exploring and holidaying in Queensland. Really cheap rates for a caravan site, also for a self contained unit.
Magnesium pool for adults and a large kids pool.
Massive BBQ and kitchen right near the pool.
Awesome safe atmosphere for families holidaying.
Helpful staff and very knowledgeable about the area and adventuring
Grounds were run down and unkept. Stove/cooktop in cabin kitchen was hardly usable. States fully equipped kitchen but didn't provide basic cooking utensils. Overall very disappointed

Crap park, dirty pool, terrible old permanent vans all around with junk everywhere.How they are permitted to trade under the Big 4 banner is so discieving.And I was told the pool gets cleaned every 2 weeks,the day I got in it I had to ask for someone to clean the bird poo out of it.Stay away go somewhere else.I booked 9 nights left after 5.I’m shocked to read some of the reviews saying how great it is.😮

A small campsite where the facilities are getting tired. A big house is being built in the front so expect construction when you are there. This disrupts the entrance drive way and there is some muddy areas that are fenced off, but other than that, does not effect the park. The amenities block is old, but clean. They have washing/dryers that accept cash and new cards, but a number of them were out-of-order. The pool is nice, but lacks any shade. The park is away from the throng of Hervey bay foreshore and there is not a lot in walking distance, so plan for this to be a base you drive out of each day. There is not a lot of sand at the beach at the end of the road, and is mainly rocks, but the cycle path is here and if you have bikes a good starting point.

After a last minute booking due to weather washing out our camp site the staff were very accommodating setting us up in one of there cabins which were great and helping with additional space for our boat, overall great quiet park not over crowded like some of the larger ones and amazing staff, it’s a place we will be happy to come back to again

One of the worst caravan parks in Australia. Bathrooms need major work done. Nobody greeted us on arrival, there was an envelope left with our name on it. Wishing a few hours of setting up our caravan was infested with ants. Works going on in park means it’s a mess and it’s expensive. Would not come back.

I have stayed in this park,for the last 7 days,and found it,very clean,amenities,pool,cooking area,all great,the manager ,Craig,is very helpful,with any inquiries,also they way he explained to me about Fraser Island tours. I booked a tour straight away,and lucky I did,with k'gari tours,excellent day,,I would definitely,stop in again,and recommend this park,to anyone visiting Hervey bay
We had a lovely weekend away. The park has great pool area and very friendly care takers. We will be back

Wir haben 9 Nächte auf diesem Camping Platz verbracht. Wir wurden im Voraus per Mail informiert, dass Umbauarbeiten stattfinden von diesen haben wir nichts bemerkt. Die Sanitäranlagen waren alt jedoch immer sauber. Wir haben den Geburtstag meines Partners auf diesem Camping Platz verbracht auf die Anfrage per Mail für Empfehlungen von Restaurants in der Umgebung kam schnell eine Antwort jedoch auf die Anfrage ob sie für uns einen Tisch und Trasfer buchen können haben wir keine Antwort mehr erhalten auch nicht beim Nachhacken. Schaade. Am Automat mit Snacks und Getränken wollten wir uns ein RedBull gönnen leider funktionierte der Automat nicht. Nach Meldung an der Reception wurde der zuständigen Firma der Defekt gemeldet doch auch die nächsten Tage blieb der Automat defekt und wir bestellten unsere Sachen per Uber Eats. Schaade. Der Pool war eine gute Abkühlung das Wasser nach einigen Tagen jedoch sehr trüb. Die Küche war gut. Das WLAN war sehr gut. Die Lage ist etwas abgelegen und um etwas zu unternehmen muss man sich auf Tagesausflüge einstellen. Jedoch kann man gut auch auf dem Camping Platz ausruhen und die Ruhe geniessen. Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt.

Park was kid friendly- beautiful pool area with all the facilities you need (laundry, toilets showers etc) owners Tom and Alyssa and their family were welcoming and went above and beyond to ensure we had a great holiday. Looking forward to coming back to Big 4 Hervey Bay Holiday Park.

The worst big 4 we've stayed at. Was meant to stay for 6 nights we left after 2 and booked somewhere else.
Owners are building a new house right out front. So looks like a construction site.
Bathrooms/ toilets awful condition. Meant to clean at 830am but no difference after a clean. Nothing for the kids to do. Pool has absolutely no shade, games room closed moved to a different location (tin shed) no fans not ideal for summer.
Camp kitchen dirty, old and unsafe.
I understand its a small big 4 and not a typical one. But the price you pay is the same like you are staying at a normal big 4. Very very disappointing. Will not stay again and do not recommend for children.
Yes 2 minutes away from the beach. Be prepared for alot of day trips as there is NOTHING to do on site.
Old one, they have what you need in basic standard, do not expect Big4 quality.
Friendly  and  helpful staff with great family atmosphere.   Awesome place to stay

Was the first stop of our Xmas break from Melbourne only bad thing for us is we didnt want to leave wish we stayed longer the people in that park were amazing from guests to staff and especially the owners but I think they got sick of us in the end 🤣 Tom Alyssa n all there staff a big thank you for starting our holidays amazingly with your amazing park and socialising we will
Be back !!

Amazing staff, super friendly and helpful! We had a 40ft motorhome that we took on our maiden voyage, they helped us park it in. Our kids had the time of their lives playing each day/night with all the others. Location is great and the renovations they are doing are just going to make it even better. Great campsites and great experiences. The renovations will be a game changer for the place and will bring it up to standards. End of the day it is a campsite not a 5star resort. Highly recommend 🙏🙌
Friendly staff, practical amenities and kept clean. Close to anything you need

Overall experience ok…….. except for one person who spoiled the whole thing. The female cleaner lives on site and literally screams “this is private property, you can’t walk down here !!!!!” when you walk past her site. Now we weren’t walking on the grass but on the road. There are no signs to say it is Private Property and there is nothing on the information when you check in to say it’s Private Property.
The same person is the dog Police and if she sees your dog not under control she yells at you “you have three warnings then you’ll be kicked out.”
She literally stood in front of our site for 10 minutes one morning when she was supposed to be cleaning the toilets as she thought our dog was not tied up, which it was, just waiting for it to run.
Get a life Lady !!!!
Don’t have a pet friendly policy if you’re going to carry on like that.

We spent 10 nights over Christmas and New Year on a powered site. The amenities, staff and facilities were excellent. The activities for kids and adults over the Christmas period were so much fun. We’ll definitely be back!😄

A great experience, from booking, to arrival & checkin, and the stay. Tom was a great assistance guiding me into our site.
The Park is ideally situated for us, which suited our families needs perfectly.
Amenities were older, but kept tidy. A good job considering the weather events, and the school holidays.
Will definitely stay here again during our future visits to the region.

Great location, this is a classic park people need to understand this, staff were wonderful,  polite,  friendly and helpful.   Park was very clean, amenities are old but always kept clean and maintained.  Definitely will come back and stay again thanks for the hospitality 😉
The Holiday Park is kept lovely and clean and the toilets are nice and clean as well
Very clean room.  Everything you need for a quick stay.
Great place. Clean and tidy with loads to do in the area. Would stay again for sure.

Currently on a week's Holiday here in our caravan and I must say this little park is one of the best we have stayed at. It's only little but the staff are amazing, treasure hunts for the kids, free sausage sizzles, a really warm and Kind Environment.  We will most definitely be back. Shower and Toilets are always spotless. Being alittle further out of town means its so Quiet and  Low Car traffic. Thanks so much to the staff for making us feel so welcome.

Cabins were spacious and clean, very friendly and helpful staff especially Ally ,Tom and Maree ,very family orientated , amazing magnesium  pool to  unwind and cool off, close to shopping ,restaurants and water activities,Turtle feeding and Frazer island was a highlight ,I really  enjoyed my time here and highly recommend this place to relax. I Will definitely come back.

I had a wonderful experience here , the staff were amazing helpful & accommodating, cabins were clean ,modern, pet friendly.
The magnesium pool was amazing and relaxing It was a peaceful environment to stay & unwind. Very family oriented .The free bbq night was great too! ,It’s  a short boat ride to Frazer island , I would highly recommend staying here..
Great location. Clean amenities. Entertainment
Very quiet location is under going repairs to the office. Has many long-term stays. $4 washing machines and dryer. Town just up the road.

Checking in was simple which is always good, top bunk bed has no fall protection and close to a 2m fall so would not recommend letting a child sleep up there. The overall condition of the cabins is very very poor, air conditioning turns on and off, no reception if you're with Optus, active construction site towards the front with electrical box doors unlocked and flapping around in the wind all night, patio screen outside of door is poorly installed and flapping around in the wind all night, lots of questionable workmanship on installs and repairs with the cabins reminds me of a fifo gig. It is not a holiday park at all with much better options in town, I was led to believe it'd be half alright being a BIG4 but it's definitely nothing like the rest of them. Luckily I only stayed here for quick accommodation but just putting this out there in case anyone was going to stay here with their family in the cabins. For a quick place to stay, recommended. For a holiday with your family, absolutely not. Not worth the money it's a very depressing atmosphere.

Staff are very friendly and helpful.   Especially Marie who goes out of her way to help with any problems.   Amenities are clean.    The park is very quiet and in a quiet area.     Short walk to the esplanade and convenience store.
Mooie camping met veel ruimte voor de campers. Schone en mooie wc en douches. Zeer vriendelijk ontvangst en een fijn zwembad. Ook een mooie ruimte om te koken. Zeker een aanrader.

My partner and I have stayed at the caravan park a couple of times now. There cabins are very nice and have recently been refurbished. The staff there are lovely to have a chat with and very easy going and want you to have a great stay.

Great little park very family friendly. Walking distance to the beach, also great bike and walking traces.
Awesome caravan sites with concrete slab with room for your car as well. Tom & Craig will even help you put your van in if needed.
They had a sausage sizzle a couple of times when we were there. Great kitchen, bbq’s,  microwave, fridge, kettle, pots and pans even some crockery. Bit of construction work going on when we were there but will be great when all finished.
We will definitely be back August next year.
Thanks Team
Jan & Greg B

Fantastic location
Great people and room was also great

Service and area was incredible, extremely family orientated. Had a free sausage sizzle and had all families to interact and join in with watching the football and overall making a fantastic experience.

Amenities were extremely clean, gaming area and pool area were incredible and great for children, also for younger children having the heated splash pool.

Honestly can not recommend enough. Thank you for having our family, will be back again soon.

The management of this park is very friendly.  Craig came immediately to help with parking when we arrived.  The park is well maintained and they are expanding.  Craig and his wife held a scavenger hunt for kids in the afternoon and a free sausage sizzle in the evening.  I like his saying "We like you come as guests and leave as friends".
Not up to Big4 standard. Acknowledge it’s an older park but the amenities are very lacking and weren’t maintained. Small park with large number of permanent resident’s.

Cute caravan park away fromt he main drag. Right near the beach. Dog friendly   kid friendly.  Great bike paths into town. Nice walk to the waterfront. Currently undergoing  a face lift but still giid to stay showers and toilets clean and tidy

Well, I'm in the air with this one, hence the 2 stars.  Lovely, friendly owners. But that's where it ends unfortunately. ||I really don't understand how they got the big 4 name, as it isn't what you expect from a big 4. I'm confused in how they operate under the big 4 banner, because it does NOT fair up with the majority of big 4. I guess I had bigger expectations....||The park is undergoing renovations and rebuilds which was horribly noisy throughout the day with the angle grinders, hammering and nail gun etc. Not the piece and tranquillity you expect. I would've appreciated the heads up on arrival.||The park is very small with very narrow roads, and almost everyone struggled parking the vans during our stay. We needed to move our car, so one couple could reverse onto their site that was opposite ours. The amenities and laundry room are very outdated. The laundry only had one working dryer and two working washingmachines, so there was a line up for it, which was inconvenient when we had the day planned out. Anyhow, Denise said they were sick of repairing the other 2 dryers and will be look into replacing them. A little too late for us current visitors. In the bathroom, you are required to mop the shower out when finished showering, which is a first for me (it'd be like a motel telling you to strip the beds before you leave). The toilets have scum build up, which feels dirty. I truly feel they should've concentrated on the amenities before their house and cabin upgrades. Customer satisfaction should have been a priority over a new 2 story home and refurbished cabins sorry.||As we generally free camp everywhere, it wasn't an option in Hervey Bay, so when I googled parks around the area,  I chose the big 4 due to its high reputation of a larger family park. Sadly this was not the case here...  I'm sorry, but I don't see the "exciting new upgrades", that you keep mentioning. I should've read the reviews beforehand.

Well, I'm in the air with this one, hence the 2 stars.  Lovely, friendly owners. But that's where it ends unfortunately.

I really don't understand how they got the big 4 name, as it isn't what you expect from a big 4. I'm confused in how they operate under the big 4 banner, because it does NOT fair up with the majority of big 4. I guess I had bigger expectations....

The park is undergoing renovations and rebuilds which was horribly noisy throughout the day with the angle grinders, hammering and nail gun etc. Not the piece and tranquillity you expect. I would've appreciated the heads up on arrival.

The park is very small with very narrow roads, and almost everyone struggled parking the vans during our stay. We needed to move our car, so one couple could reverse onto their site that was opposite ours. The amenities and laundry room are very outdated. The laundry only had one working dryer and two working washingmachines, so there was a line up for it, which was inconvenient when we had the day planned out. Anyhow, Denise said they were sick of repairing the other 2 dryers and will be look into replacing them. A little too late for us current visitors. In the bathroom, you are required to mop the shower out when finished showering, which is a first for me (it'd be like a motel telling you to strip the beds before you leave). The toilets have scum build up, which feels dirty. I truly feel they should've concentrated on the amenities before their house and cabin upgrades. Customer satisfaction should have been a priority over a new 2 story home and refurbished cabins sorry.

As we generally free camp everywhere, it wasn't an option in Hervey Bay, so when I googled parks around the area,  I chose the big 4 due to its high reputation of a larger family park. Sadly this was not the case here...  I'm sorry, but I don't see the "exciting new upgrades", that you keep mentioning. I should've read the reviews beforehand.

Loved our 3 night stay. Quiet location. Only a short drive to Harvey Bay CBD. 5 minute walk to beautiful ocean views. Sites are good.
Amenities are a little dated, however very clean.
Craig is so helpful with any assistance required for novice caravaners.
Pool, deck area, and covered BBQ area are well maintained.
Permanent residence are welcoming.
The young owners, Alysha and Tom are focused on updating this lovely family friendly park. Look forward to our return trip.

Point Vernon Big 4 Holiday Park is perfect for campers looking for a quite location.  Easy walk to view the headland/ocean. Only a short drive into Harvey Bay CBD. Amenities are older style however kept very clean. Lovely pool and deck, with a good BBQ area. Craig has a great personality and is very accomodating with any assistance required. The park owners, Alysha and Tom have started more upgrades to this lovely family friendly park. Look forward to our next stay.

Unfortunately we stayed during renovations where numerous advertised activities weren’t available.

These activities made it a standout for us so without them was just another caravan park.
Looks to being refurbished. Heading in the right direction. Ammenities need updating. Nice caravan park
Probably should be the last caravan park you choose in Hervey Bay. Very tired park with what seems to be full time residents. Has a trailer park vibe to it.

Interestingly they use what’s called “dynamic pricing” which means that they can charge whatever they like. Despite the website saying from $63 per powered site per night (for members), we were charged $85 ($95 non-members). We were expecting something special for those prices. The site turned out to be a quagmire and you sank in the mud going to the amenities. As for the amenities they are clean but just about the worst we’ve ever seen. Freezing cold as there is no main door to the entrance and holes in the wall with mesh screen for a cubicle window. Can’t believe they are a part of the Big 4 group. Having said all that the reception staff were friendly but we’d never stay there again.

We would like to thank Craig & staff for being so accommodating.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in this friendly park. You guys do a great job.
We  can’t wait to see the new works and renovations on our next visit.

We had a powered site and booked for a fortnight. We left after a week. The amenities are old, inadequate when compared to other parks, and dirty. Our site was littered with rubbish from previous occupants. There are a lot of permanent guests.

Wish I could do 0 star..
Absolutely horrible experience,  do not waste your money here.

I’ve stayed at plenty of Big 4 caravan parks all across Australia, and they’ve all been great. This one? Nothing like any of them. It doesn’t deserve the Big 4 name, and honestly, I’m shocked it’s even allowed to operate under that banner.

The cabin floor was disgusting, clearly not cleaned properly. The bedding was awful, the pillows were flat, the mattresses felt like sleeping on a slab of concrete. The two single beds had nothing but a sheet. The shower ran out of hot water after 20 minutes, which is useless if you’re travelling with a family. (This particular cabin slept 4.)

Two of the windows in our cabin had no blinds or curtains at all. And although the kitchen window was frosted, it let in a ridiculous amount of light from the cabin next door, especially their outdoor light, which shone directly over the bed and into our eyes while we were trying to sleep.

The games room was completely run down.. you had to go to reception just to get a ping pong ball, and the pool cues weren’t there unless you paid to borrow them. The so-called “heated pool” was colder than the cold one, not heated at all.

To top it off, there were grumpy permanent residents who verbally abused children AND an off duty female staff member (Denise) who yelled at the kids and threatened to take their balls and throw them away just because they were playing near their cabin. Completely inappropriate and disgusting behaviour in a supposed “family-friendly” park.

Overall, this was a horrible experience. Dirty, unfriendly, poorly managed, and totally disappointing. We couldn’t wait to leave.
Don’t take your kids here.

Do yourself a favour, book literally anywhere else.
(Below is photo of how bright the room is without the blind.)
Thank you so much for having us ,doing park up ,starting to look good rob Echuca

This is a great little park.  The management were very helpful during our stay. Even a sausage sizzle put on for the travellers.  Yes is an old park and under going reservations but does not take away how serene it is. We looked at several reviews on Google before we booked and considered them unjust. Well gone to all the staff. We will be back. 😀👍

We had 3 nights here. Positives were that there is a great camp kitchen that is clean and the amenities blocks while fairly old were very clean as well. As others have mentioned this park has more of a permanent feel with a few grumpy longer term residents and not a lot of room.

The location was the let down for us, being a big4 member I didn't research the other parks but looking back wish I had as there are at least 3 on the waterfront that look a bit more modern and are closer to shops/cafes with beach front views as well.

Loved our stay at Big 4 Hervey Bay! Such an incredible place for families. The pool was beautiful, facilities were clean and comfortable and everyone was warm and welcoming. Highly recommend this Big 4! Perfect distance from town to be quiet but still close enough to see and do everything!

what an amazing place! Such friendly hosts. Craig and DiDi made us feel right at home Home… We came as guests and left as friends for life. So great for the kids, they regularly put on really interesting and thought-provoking activities for the kids. Sweet Pool. don't bother going an extra five minutes closer to town this place is way better. Games room with arcade games, ping-pong etc… The best! ❤️
It is a great place for a holiday, love the pier caravan park.
Ver friendly staff, nice quiet but central location. Could have stayed longer but needed to head north.

Park was not enjoyable, bandaids in one of the men’s showers and tea towel in the other. No facilities not close to shops or cafes. Not sure how they secured the big 4 name this park is no we’re near the standard you would expect.
We stayed in our van on the waterfront. We had a water view. The amenities were clean, and the park was very well maintained.
Had a great time, accom topnotch. Great locale and Craig and staff friendly and informative.  Good luck with patk upgrades. Definitely be back.

Great caravan park. The staff were amazing friendly and went out of their way to make sure we enjoyed our stay plus put on free fun activities for the kids.
The location was also great. A few hundred meters to the left was a convenience shop that cooks food and a few hundred meters the other direction is the beach. Although it's not the best beach (a bit rocky) it offers shade in the afternoon. Imagine the idea of being at the beach with shade from trees.
The cabin we stayed in was comfortable and perfect for our needs.
We will definitely be going back to Big 4 Hervey Bay and recommend it to event else.
Thanks so much for having us
The owners and all of their staff have been so friendly and even all the people staying in the caravan park are friendly too.
Great place and host. Friendly staff that go out of their way to help out. Will stay there again.

We had a fantastic stay at this BIG4! The sites were spacious, the groups were kept together with their sites side by side, the staff incredibly friendly, and the facilities spotless. Our kids had a blast in the games room and loved the pool. One morning we enjoyed a delicious free breakfast, and on another evening, a tasty sausage sizzle for dinner. We’ll definitely be back for another camping adventure!

We just stayed here over Anzac weekend in our motorhome. With family members staying in the villas we had a great time with not that far of a drive to go and do things. Very friendly staff and we also were very lucky that they put on a free sausage sizzle one night which I thought was a great idea. Thank you very much we would come back here again.
Second time staying here and while there was works going on with upgrades it was still a relaxing and peaceful park up on the point overlooking Hervey Bay

We have just spent three weeks traveling with our two young boys and have to admit this was our least favorite park (all were Big4 or affiliates).
Seems to be a lot of permanent/long term residences and really didn’t have a holiday feel to it.
Amenities were tidy and clean and staff were welcoming on arrival.
We will stay closer to the waterfront on our next trip.

Great week at this Park with 3 family's and a dog. Sites were spacious and facilities are all good. We all had a great week.

Craig the groundsman is the beating heart of the park with infectious energy.

A easter egg hunt for the kids, a sausage sizzle and an Anzac breakfast all complimentary.
This is second time we have stayed here and we WILL be back. Park is clean and tidy and the staff are 2nd to none, make everything so easy

Our first impression was it was a little too far out of town, small and a work in progress.  However that changed at check in.  Alysha and her team showed what it is really like to care and respect their patrons.  We had 3 sites and Alysha ensured that we were altogether to the point that we were placed on 4 sites.   Craig assisted with the selection of sites and parking assist to ensure the optimal use of each site.  There was not a day go by during our week stay that one of the staff didn’t drop buy to ask us how our stay was going as if if there was any thing we need help with.  On top of the services provided and community events such as free Easter egg hunt for the kids, free sausage sizzle, free bacon and egg breakfast along with providing a pizza van one night a week and coffee van in the mornings the first concerns were soon forgotten.. Alysha what you and the team have provided in a quite well maintained park is amazing.  What you are planning will be spectacular.  We wish you the best with your developments and recommend you and your park to any campers looking for a peaceful trouble free stay and Craig is not all that bad either.  Thx

Just a short drive into the main town these guys really put together a great stay for our families! The Easter egg hunt was a hit with the kids we will be back next year! also a mention was the breaky they cooked us on our last day which helped make our departure morning all the smoother to get on the road!

Had a great Caravan stay here.  Craig was great to guide you directly where you had to go with the van for an easy manoeuvre and no spousal blews !!
The park was very full but room for everyone.  Showers are awesome and facilities very clean.  Anzac morning Breakfast supplied by the park was unreal !!  Thanks again and we would definitely stay again and recommend to anyone.

This is awesome, the location is quiet, great for dogs, staff are super friendly, very helpful and they always put on a great Easter egg hunt for the little ones. Do yourself a favor and stay here for a great little vacay... 😉

We had such a wonderful stay at this caravan park! From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm smiles from the staff who went out of their way to make us feel welcome. The whole park has a lovely, peaceful atmosphere—ideal for families looking to relax and unwind.

The sites are clean, well-maintained, and spacious enough for the kids to play safely. It was so nice to be able to let them explore without worrying. We especially appreciated how quiet the evenings were—perfect for a restful night after a fun day out.

The facilities were spotless, and everything we needed was close by. It’s clear the staff take great pride in keeping the park in top shape. We’ll definitely be back, and we highly recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet, family-friendly spot with genuinely friendly service!

We were greated by the friendly groundperson when we arrived and everyone that works there were friendly and amazing. Toilets and showers were clean.
We were lucky enough to get a free bbq breakfast.  Enjoyed our stay.

Lovely Moter Camp to stay at.
My overnight stay in one of their Cabins was  just so easy from the phone book in too the collection of my key after hours.
The Cabin was spotlessly clean and had lots of room inside, with car parking on my site.
I fully recommend this camp as family friendly and in a great location near the beach.

We recently had a big family get together weekend.  Rooms were very clean and the park was well played out, good swimming pool too.  The communal kitchen was well positioned near the pool and the children's playground.   This Big4 is highly recommended.
Very friendly and accomodating. Made us feel welcome

We have had  a beautiful holiday here . so relaxing i highly recommend coming and stying every one here was so friendly we will definitely be coming back 😀thank you for having us big 4 :) see you all again

We stayed in a studio cabin, comfortably fit 2 children and 2 adults. It’s small but enough space especially when your out exploring Hervey Bay, or in the pool at the park. We used the pool everyday, I love that it’s magnesium. No red eyes! They have 2 pools, a small and large, it was really big! Staff were all so friendly. Location is good not too far from the esplanade. Will definitely be back!
Great service, clean rooms, comfortable beds and great atmosphere.

We verbleven voor de 2e keer op een Tasman park. Deze keer hadden we een economie cottage en deze was van alles voorzien.
De parken zijn echt geweldig.
We hadden wat problemen met de toaster en de vriezer die kapot waren. Ons ijs was hierdoor gesmolten, dus we hadden een melding gemaakt dat de vriezer en de toaster kapot waren. Binnen 15 minuten hadden we een nieuwe vriezer en een nieuwe toaster. We mochten ook nog eens gratis ijs komen pakken bij de receptie. Echt geweldig opgelost en een super service!

El camping está súper mantenido y todas las instalaciones están limpias (cocina, baños), es un lugar tranquilo y el personal es súper amable. Muy recomendado
El clima no dio para disfrutar la piscina, pero se veía que también estaba mantenida
Great place to holiday, it's a little far to walk to the beach or shop but is centrally located between shops and beach.

We stayed here in an economy cabin over the Easter weekend. Firstly I was stoked to find an accommodation option that didn’t charge min 4/5 days for the long weekend and appreciated TPHB allowed us to stay for the long weekend only. ||Our cabin sleeps 4, with a single bunk bed for kids and a queen size bed available. The cabin was very spacious and well kept. Ample cutlery and crockery for cooking with a stove and microwave. The shower was cosy-small but still good nonetheless. The only issue was our bathroom bin hadn’t been emptied from the previous guests.|The little verandah at the doorway was cute and overlooked the pool and kitchen area, only a short 15m walk, making a great cabin option for families where supervision of the kids can be maintained just from the verandah! ||Go for cabins 4-7 for pool access/views and cabins 7-11 for more privacy and quiet away from the pool area. We really liked how the cabins were separate from the van sites. ||Traffic in the park could flow both directions however was a little narrow and could be an issue with vans however we didn’t experience this issue. |There is no playground for kids which was a let down for us with younger kids, as the games area was usually occupied by older kids with attitudes. ||The service we received from booking confirmations to check-in and check out was friendly, down to earth and happy. ||Overall we enjoyed our stay, it was quiet given the Easter holidays and we didn’t hear any road traffic noise during our stay. I’d recommend this park to anyone seeking a quiet park and needing cabin accommodation.
We just stayed here for Easter and had a great stay. Clean amenities, tidy grounds, spacious sites and the staff were very friendly and welcoming. Thanks for having us and keep up the great work 👍

We loved our stay here. The games area and common room were great places for the kids to spread their wings. We enjoyed a bbq night in the shared area. Nice and quiet, family friendly and well looked after. Staff were super friendly too.
Great little park and small dog friendly accomodation as well, clean amenities and very friendly staff.

Our family of 5 had a beautiful stay at Hervey Bay and were pleasantly surprised how quiet and beautiful this park was. Staff were super friendly, and our little fur baby was treated to a little gift on arrival. Thank you to Max and Andrea for welcoming us for our first ever visit in Hervey Bay :)

Still scammers!!!

We stayed here in 2023. We booked the place via booking.com.
We received a payment link from tasman and payed it through that link. But we didn't know they also took our payment through booking.com.
It has been 2.5 years now. And we still didnt reveived our refund for our own money.
Over time we have sended them all the information they wanted from our account to see that they really didn't refund our own money.
Till this day, they didn't refund our money that they received by misleading us by sending us a text message with a link that we had to pay for our stay.

They also stopped replying after getting all the information they have asked for to prove we didn't received any refund.
Our question was and is. Send us the prove that you have refunded us on our creditcard. They are not replying anymore and they still have our money that they received by misleading.

So our question tasman holiday parks.
When will we get our 197 AUD back that we have payed double for our stay?
Bagni puliti, piazzole grandi e ben tenute. Personale gentile e prezzi onesti.
The Tasman holiday park is a beautiful part of the world to stay at.
Camping correct et bien situé. Mériterai un peu de rénovation, en tout cas dans notre cabine.

Central location in Harvey bay with clean amenities…nice quiet park great for families
Great camp kitchen and games room for the kids

Highly recommend this caravan park.  Close to the Esplanade and restaurants.  Has a pool.
The service is awesome and dog friendly too !!
Only here for one night, but excellent facilities. Great location for the esplanade - only 15 minute walk away. Wish we could have stayed there longer. Very clean and quality facilities.
