Great little caravan park in Torquay QLD. Amenities were excepts and very clean.
The site had a lot of room.
Slippery floor in shower. Tiny tv is a joke. No coffee table.  Cheap toilet paper.  Very basic cabin.

Sehr nettes und hilfsbereiten Personal.
Gute Lage👍🙂

Cabin wasn’t clean, items in freezer, insects present. We’re not aware of kids room as renovations happening. Bbq in camp kitchen burnt the hairs off my arms, fat bucket was full.  Yes I did email management before this review. Caretaker and reception lady were very accomodating .

Hard park to rate. Facilities are good. Nice pool.  Great camp kitchen.  Lots of permanents. Wide roads in some parts. Wide sites but  narrow. Watched 3 big vans accessing the sites. All 3 had excellent drivers and were able to reverse their vans on to their sites. However, the spare was almost touching the fence, and the hitch was nearly on the bitumen. If you have trouble reversing, then you can ask the staff to help you.   Our site was a drive-through, but the road was narrow, so I had difficulty lining up the van with the slab. Maybe I  should have backed it in. 300M to the bay. There is a small beach there if you want a swim. Quiet park and quiet area. Away from the hussle and bussle of the central beach area. One of the permanents had a blew with the staff. A few hours later he left. Hopefully kicked out. The other permanents seemed happy with this result. Popular coffee shop around the corner. 2 min drive or 10 min walk. I had no issues therefore 5 ⭐️

Friendly staff and informative, they go out of their way to make sure we are happy with everything.
The pool was awesome every day, clean, tidy and relaxing.
I would definitely recommend them for your next get away holiday.
Maz
Feb 2025

We had a fantastic stay at BIG4 Hervey Bay! The magnesium pool was a highlight. Our powered slab site was spacious and well-maintained, making setup a breeze. The park is super kid-friendly, with plenty of space and activities to keep the little ones entertained. To top it off, the owners were absolutely lovely, welcoming and always happy to help. Highly recommend for families and anyone looking for a comfortable, well-run holiday park! We’ll definitely be back.

Der Platz ist ok und die Parzellen ausreichend gross. Wir waren nur eine Nacht da und haben den Camping danach nicht mehr berücksichtigt, weil die WC/Duschen aus unserer Sicht ungenügend waren. Einer der schlechtesten BIG4 den wir bisher gebucht hatten.

We stayed 4 nights on a powered site. The grounds are kept tidy, mowed after guests leave. The table tennis table in the kids zone is popular, as is the pool which was crystal clear, with new bean lounges to relax in.
This is a small caravan park by most standards of Big 4 parks, with many permanent mobile homes and several caravan dwellers that appear to be long term, mostly grouped together to the west of the park. The powered short term sites are also grouped together.
The amenities block was clean but dated. I'm sure it is on the To Do List.
Located one block back from the water, it is a pleasant walk via a wide footpath.
There is a convenience store about 150m away.
On Saturday morning cheerful staff advised that a coffee cart had arrived at the entrance to the park. Nice!
The supermarkets are about 5km away.
This park is peacefully quiet mid week and the bay breeze was welcomed.
Thanks for your hospitality Tom & Alysha at Big4 Hervey Bay

The caravan park is relatively quiet and nice, located about 12 minutes from the centre of town. There’s a lot of permanent sites and a few nicely grassed van spots with concrete slabs. It’s family friendly with a small playground and nice pool area. The pool needs some shade cloths over it as it’s too hot throughout most of the day. The biggest let down was the cold dirty showers the first night and the next morning (7am). Not sure if something happened to the hot water heater because there was hot water on Saturday night. The toilets and showers are not very clean with the grout and tiles looking very dirty and mouldy. Could do with a good grout scrub. There was also clumps of hair in the drains for two days and no toilet paper in two of the toilets. There’s quite a few cob webs which aren’t hard to get with a broom. We saw them clean the amenities Saturday morning so not sure how thorough they were. The gaming area was nice but no pool cues so I’m assuming someone stole them. It’s also very hot in the shed where the games are and they only had two of the smaller Aircons on. They might need to use the bigger ones. I think if they have the bathrooms a bit of a spruce up/clean the place wouldn’t be too bad.

worst campground ever. In the Front is a big construction Site.
stayed for one night. 1 of 3 showers Out of order, later at night there was a Gas problem or Something and IT was Just cold water available. 2 of 3 washer Out of order. kitchen and Toilet Not very Clean and very old everything. Lots of permanent residents on the ground, very small campground. Pool was OK. you are far away from the Sandy beach..there are Just Stones.
We Had a Look around for other campgrounds. They were all cheaper than the big 4 and looked nicer. Take the discovery Park, ITS the best around there.

Beautiful spot friendly staff, Tom and Alysha were awesome pleasure meeting.
definitely be back!

We were very happy with our stay, they catered for our special needs on request our van site was easy to access, very neat and tidy. The park was quiet and the facilities were sparkling clean. We'd have no hesitation in staying again.

Guter Platz für Wohnmobile und ausruhen.
Schwimmbecken voll mit Kindern, haben wir noch nicht benutzt.
Waschmaschine und Trockner vorhanden sowie Leinen für die Wäsche aufhängen. Toiletten und Dusche könnten sauberer sein, aber schuld sind die Frauen die hier ihre Haare auf dem Fußboden liegen lassen.
Ansonsten ok.

The caravan park in Point Vernon is an absolute gem, offering a peaceful and serene atmosphere that feels like a true escape from the hustle and bustle. Surrounded by beautiful natural scenery and just a stone’s throw from the water, it’s the perfect place to relax and recharge. The park is impeccably maintained, with clean facilities, spacious sites, and plenty of shaded areas to keep things comfortable. The staff are incredibly welcoming and go out of their way to ensure every guest feels right at home. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet stroll along the nearby beachfront or simply soaking in the tranquil surroundings, this park truly stands out as a wonderful place to stay.

I recently stayed at this Caravan Park in Point Vernon, and it was an absolutely fantastic experience! The location is perfect – peaceful and scenic, with easy access to the beautiful waterfront. The grounds are well-maintained, offering spacious, shady sites ideal for caravans, tents, or motorhomes.

The amenities were spotless and regularly cleaned, which made the stay even more comfortable. The staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to ensure we had everything we needed. Whether it was recommending local attractions or providing assistance, their customer service was top-notch.

One of the highlights was the proximity to Hervey Bay – perfect for whale watching and exploring the Fraser Coast. The park also has a great family-friendly vibe, with facilities like BBQ areas, a playground for the kids, and plenty of room to relax and unwind.

I would highly recommend this caravan park to anyone looking for a relaxing, affordable getaway in Point Vernon. We’ll definitely be back!

Wonderful people great place to stay could not recommend it more.
I'll be back
Thank you
We had a fabulous time with many friends. The staff was very accommodating, the park was clean and well maintained. The pool and kids area saved us as it was really hot! Surely will be back!

Staff are Amazing, helpful, kind and very welcoming, we had a lovely stay over Christmas
The park had put on a treasure hunt for the kids and cooked a lovely sausage sizzle for dinner on Christmas eve. Amenities were very clean. Pool area was nice and relaxing. There is some work going on in the park I think it may be a new playground but did not affect our stay at all, it is always lovely to see new improvements.
We left our van there on site while we travelled over to K'gari for a week and no problems at all. Our van was safe and looked after.
The beach is a short stroll down the road and there is a convenience store just down the road the other way. I will definitely be back and highly recommend to anyone looking for a great park to stay.
Love this caravan park. Very clean, quiet and friendly hosts. We had a lovely few days here relaxing and soaking up the sun.

We loved our stay here,
Friendly people
Safe place to stay
Expanding and renovating

We had an excellent stay at Tasman Holiday Park in Hervey Bay. The value for money was outstanding, and everything was exceptionally clean. The camp kitchen was spotless and fully equipped with everything you might need—plenty of appliances, plus thoughtful extras like dish soap, sponges, and kitchen towels.

We were genuinely impressed. The park was quiet and peaceful, never overcrowded, which made for a very relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a clean, well-maintained, and tranquil camping experience.

For hervey bay this is good for longer stays.
It's not as expensive as most.
The toilet blocks are very clean. Good kitchen and it has a pool.

There are a couple more expensive caravan parks which are more resort like. But this is good value
Very noisy area.

We stayed on ensuite,powered site.
Quiet Park,not too far from major attractions. Friendly staff,clean and well maintained
This was the least value for money park during our 6 week trip. Expensive, small site, quite a distance to the beach, lots of permanents.

Dog friendly. Cabins are clean and spacious- the bathroom is a lot more outdated than the cabin but that was not a bother to us. It was raining so we did not access the pool area. Well equipped big outdoor kitchen area with a lot of seating and Smart TV. It has an air fryer, pans, pots, cutlery and utensils- 2 big industrial fridges if needed also. Staff was lovely we did late check in however my in laws got a dog goodie bag upon check in which was lovely. Easy check in and check out process. Would recommend.

We based ourselves here for a few days with our van while we explored the surrounding areas. |It’s nice and central and we enjoyed being minutes to the Esplanade and handy to shops etc. |While we were travelling down the coast this was our most expensive stay at $79 per night for a powered site. |The sites are small and access is pretty tight. By the time we were in and set up we had about 1.5 metres to a tent next door and about 1 metre to a camper trailer on the other side. |The amenities were ok and kept clean throughout our stay and there’s also a nice looking pool for swimming. However in the laundry two of the washing machines were ‘out of order’ with signs on them which was inconvenient for a number of us who were trying to catch up on some washing. |The road noise is pretty full on too and runs through the night.
Tidy rooms, good location
Using caravan for my accommodation, facilities are clean and the park is well serviced. Close to shopping, clubs and beach.
Nice place central to everything

One of the cleanest campsite bathrooms I’ve ever seen!
The facilities were spotless and very well maintained throughout our stay. You can really tell that cleanliness is a top priority here. Everything was regularly cleaned, fully stocked, and in excellent condition. It made our camping experience so much more comfortable. Highly recommended!
Ensuite site was clean and tidy.   Disappointing but was it backed onto  a main road which was very noisy.  Park itself is well maintained amd service friendly.  A shame about the road noise.

We booked a three day tour to K’Gari and we stayed the day before and the day after the tour in the Tasman caravan park. This was one of the nicest and cleanest caravan  parks we’ve been to on our road trip on the entire East Coast. We loved it here!

Absolutely Love this little gem. I was staying weekly as I set up my new business. I now stay monthly & it's my home away from home.  Staff are super friendly & accommodating. Rooms are always clean. They Have everything i need.
Really nice park well maintained

We booked a Superior 2 bedroom cabin for NYE with our family. We tried to call before arrival to see if we could have an earlier check in. No answer we tried about 10 times. We arrived at 1.30pm to check in. Upon arrival we were told that our cabin won't be ready until after 2pm as they are busy and running behind. They said they'd call us when ready. It got to 3.15 and no phone call, we have 3 kids and had just driven 3 hours. We were also so told that the pool facilities weren't working as someones child did a code brown the day before, she laughed as she told me this ... not really funny!!!
so you can imagine it's NYE in 30 degree heat, no check in yet and no pool facilities! We were told we could drive 15min away to use another facilities pool.. not ideal when you don't want to drive anymore during your stay! Finally at 3.30pm when we drove back to check in the cleaner was still in the room and told me the cabin was filthy from previous holiday maker and she was still behind. Not ideal. We finally got to check into our cabin (no 16).. well what a let down. It's nothing like the photos, the cabin is old run down, dirty, tiles.chipped cracked, stains on floor and carpet. It was nothing like the photos and to be honest false advertising. I went back and spoke to reception and they couldn't care less, they wanted out for the afternoon and told me the photos are just like that for advertising, totally false! So be warned and I'll attach photos the Superior cabins are just like the standard ones. The bunk beds are very dangerous for young children to get on and off the ladders. Don't waste your money, better value for money elsewhere! The park itself lacks any real holiday atmosphere and staff couldn't care less!

We stated here for 8 nights and it was fabulous. Walking distance to the water and not too far from the centre of town.
Very quiet park which was nice and relaxing.
The gentleman that helped to guide us into our spot was phenomenal (marriage saving 😜)
The magnesium pool was beautiful…the only thing needed was some lights for an evening swim.
Bbq facilities were nice and clean
The sites got a bit boggy when we had a few huge downpours with not much drainage
All In all a great stay

My son and I just got home from a great Holliday in Hervey Bay.
This caravan park is just awesome!
The staff are such beautiful kind people.
They helped me set up my camp site and pack it all down.
I have never been to a caravan park where the owners and staff go above and beyond to make sure you are ok and having a great time!!
The bbq area and pool are super clean. The showers are huge and just have so much room.
Just a great family caravan park.
I highly recommend 🙂
We will definitely be back again.
Thankyou for everything you guys did for us
You truly made our time in Hervey Bay unforgettable.
Friendly and clean

We have just had another amazing experience at this Classic Big 4 in Hervey Bay. Our stay was nothing short of amazing. No request was ever to big or too small.  A special mention to Craige and Dee for always going above and beyond to make the campers stay fantastic.  They are super friendly and always ensure your needs are met.
We will definitely be back to visit sometime soon!
Nice breeze there and kids had fun there
Friendly staff, great amenities. Was just a bit noisy with some people next door we think? We were in a tent near the shed.

Spent 3 nights in a cabin. Our second year at Hervey Bay. Staff are very accommodating, easy checkin. Good location, easy walk to point for fishing. Doing a few renovation to Games Room so temporary games shed was a bit hot and stuffy. Overall it's a nice little park.
Had the best experience at this caravan park, great for kids and family’s so many things to do and staff are very helpful and nice, thank you for having us
best caravan park ever!! so much fun staff are so lovely and welcoming, couldn’t recommend more 🙂

Most average big 4 in the country.

Plus $80 for a tiny unpowerd

Stayed for 5 nights.
Great atmosphere for kids and family, not the biggest park but the staff and quiet location more than make up for that. Huge thanks to Craig! Couldn't be more welcoming! 👍

We have had such a great experience with our family and children. The owners and staff have been so friendly and accomodating to our needs. The passion shown to make our stay as comfortable and happy as we could possibly be, has been so humbling and positive.  The magnesium pool is sensational. We stayed in a cabin which was super clean and comfortable. The birds are the only thing we could hear in the morning so it really felt like a tropical holiday. We will definately come back. Thank you to you all for such a positive experience
Lovely little holiday park.  Sites are neat and staff is super friendly.  Beach is a short walk away and the on site facilities are great.

We just finished a 10-day motohome trip, during which we stayed at Tom's site for three days. Tom and his team were incredibly patient in explaining the local attractions and restaurants to us and helped us plan our day trip. On the day we left, our awning broke, and Tom brought a ladder and tools to help us secure it tightly, ensuring we could continue our journey safely. We are especially grateful for their help and care, which allowed us to enjoy a wonderful three days in Hervey Bay.

Place had construction happening which we weren't told about.|Went out for day to find out that we had no power to caravan. Rang emergency/ after hours number and left message and received no reply, so went without power for mist of night.  |Found dog faeces at a caravan door which wasn't a good way to return from day out.  |Used to love this park, but is now badly rubdown.

Stayed with our caravan & when arrived the manager came & gave us a hand to park the van as where we were was a bit tight. The staff were great always with a greeting. Only trouble in all was that time of year mid November was a bit wet and the site was a little uneven I say with all the use that water was in the holed area but overall very happy with our stay of 5 day's. Well done to all.

Such a great place! The amusement for kids is brilliant and i will be back every year. i dont leave reviews often unless im extremely unimpressed with a venue, but this venue is one of our favourites! the family love it and we WILL BE BACK SOON 😍

Wir sind hier mit unserem Motorhome gelandet. Toller Empfang, nette Leute.
Der Manager hat uns eine Tagestour nach Fraser Island empfohlen, die war top!
Wir können den Platz nur empfehlen!
The Big 4 Point Vernon staff was an absolute pleasure to deal with , from the moment we made our booking to the time we had to leave. All the best

We recently stayed at the Big 4 Hervey Bay Caravan Park. Our stay was excellent and would highly recommend it to anyone who is looking for a great and relaxing place to stay.
The owners and staff were friendly and welcoming, their hospitality definitely enhanced our stay.  The park is conveniently located; one way being a short walk to the beach and a convenience store the other way.
Overall, we had a fantastic time there and would definitely return as the park offers excellent value. We felt we got more than our money’s worth, especially when taking the location into consideration.

Poor value, overpriced tiny cabin with basic fitout, beds that are not made up, non soundproof walls, and only one aircon for the entire cabin. For context, we paid $362 per night over the peak holiday season. It's probably worth $180 in reality - basically think basic cabin at caravan park, nothing more.

I wanted to stress that the two-bedroom cabin we stayed in was really really small, and the photos on the website and Booking.com looked a lot bigger, and considering the price we paid, I thought it was also meant to be bigger after seeing the photos online.

Beautiful park great location
Has nice cabins good size
Very clean
Pool and BBQ area
Great spot and good price

Grundsätzlich waren wir sehr zufrieden, mit unserer Cabin. Der Parkplatz war direkt vor dem Häuschen, es war sauber und die kleine Kochecke hatte mit Herdplatte, Toaster und Wassekocher alles, was zwei Personen benötigen. Der Essbereich und das Badezimmer waren klein, was aber nicht wirklich störte. Der WLAN-Empfang war jedoch in dem ausserhalb des Parks gelegenen Häuschen leider nicht gegeben.

To be clear, this review is of the Scarness Tasman Park.
I took an ensuite site, which unfortunately all are next to an extremely loud road. The ensuite itself was clean, except the roof is mouldy and the sink was blocked (which I fixed).
The park itself is nice and quiet, but the road noise is terrible. Maybe the people who said it is quiet here were deaf or had a site up the back? Maybe they had the wrong caravan park?

Myself and my children had 3 days here. It was very comfortable and clean. The units were modern and well equipped with everything you could want for a family holiday. It was a fantastic location as the beautiful esplanade was a short 5 minutes walk away.

Super clean ablutions, lovely well maintained sites, quiet and the staff really friendly and helpful. A lot of permanents but no problem at all. Good laundry, lots of washing lines, in close proximity to the shops and about a km to the esplanade/foreshore. Enjoyed our two week stay and felt sad to leave.
Above review pretty old. The new review now in Aug 2024 I complained about the barking dogs and the fact that there are no rules about the dogs in the park. I don't see this review posted. I had no major complaints about anything else

Third time staying at the Tasman, twice in a caravan and this time in a cabin. Everything was clean, the resort itself nicely maintained. The staff very friendly and helpful. The kitchen could have been better equipped... a couple of bowls for fruit salad and a green salad for instance. The old frying pan was replaced which was nice. A few coat hangers would have been useful. A bit far to walk to the beach and probably best to use the car for the supermarket. However, our time spent at the park was completely  spoiled by the dog in the caravan next to us who barked non stop at everyone that walked by. Still barking at 9pm. We spoke to the owner of the dog on arrival who said " nothing I can do if he barks at people walking by". This is not good enough as we all pay to have a peaceful holiday. In future we will look for caravan parks that don't have dogs or at least some rules about keeping dogs quiet.
Very good.
Park is super stil en zeer netjes. Sommige plekken zijn wel gelegen aan de doorgaande weg. Overdag hoor je dit wel maar ‘s nachts nietzo.

Average at best. We stayed in a cabin, the bed was terrible, too soft and sunk into the middle. Unable to block out all the outside lights at night when trying to sleep, alot of light came through the blinds. Bathroom old and required repairs. We won't be back.
Great place to stay , very quiet, staff friendly and helpful, amenities very clean .
Comfy bed, lovely gardens, good pool.

Deluxe Cabin was Filthy, switch hanging out of power point. Filthy couch stained and old food under cushions and sticky when sat on, holes in flooring, black mould in Bath room. TV didn't work and zero wifi. Huge stretch calling this Deluxe more like in need of Major Maintenance and Cleaning.

Clean park good beds … but the cabin 8 my sister and I shared was lacking in towel rails, was too high and wasn't big enough for 2 towels let alone for 4 people (which the cabin suppose to accommodate) it needs a shelf  to put our toiletries/make up on and a couple of hooks to hang clothes on while showering would be helpful. In the shower there was one small rack should be a bigger one. These are all basics for a cabin. We didn’t even shower in the cabin we both used the shower block facility as it had the hooks and a shelf which is what should be in the cabin!
Beautiful place to stay, clean, quiet, and wonderful amenities.  Super friendly staff and our little dog loved it too. Definitely coming back to stay again.  Thank you for your wonderful hospitality.
The rooms are very good but there is still improvements to be made which they are on to.  95% renovated so when completed they will be amazing.

"Just spent a fantastic week at the Big 4 Caravan Park in Hervey Bay. The amenities were excellent, especially the spotless bathrooms and well-maintained grounds. The staff were incredibly accommodating and made us feel right at home. The location is perfect, just a short walk to the beach and close to local attractions. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay!"

Soggiorno in campeggio con camper van
Piazzole molto ampie, servizi comodi e puliti, contesto lussureggiante: fortemente consigliato!

I absolutely love this place!! The new owners are incredible and super accommodating to your needs.
me and my family stayed in one of the cabins, it was super clean and stylish. the staff are super friendly and go way above and beyond for their customers to ensure your stay is as relaxing and enjoyable as possible.
the price is super affordable and unmatched. I would 100% recommend to everyone.
I cant wait to come back!! Me and my family will be making an effort to come stay every year we loved it that much!

We had a good experience staying at Big4 Hervey Bay, nice that it is out of the main part of town, has everything a classic Big4 has and that you could want! Only thing to note in our opinion is the amenities toilet/shower block definitely needs an update!
Thanks for having us!
Great facilities. Awesome staff. Location is great and sites are good too. Thanks guys! We’ll be back for sure!

What can I say great family owned park very clean and peaceful.owners and staff were always happy to help out with anything. Was sad to leave the park but can’t wait to visit there again soon highly recommend.

Staff are very welcoming , friendly and helpful. Would go out of their way to help and make sure you are safe and comfortable within their park. A wonderful location that we could call home.  Thanks team

Loved staying at the Big4 Hervey Bay! Facilities were great and the staff were all lovely, super helpful and accommodating. The park is close to the water and a stunning walkway along the esplanade and not far up the road is a great cafe. The caravan park is close enough to everything that nothing is a far drive but out of the way enough that it’s quiet and restful - especially with the lovely trees surrounding the park. The pool and playground are great too. My kids and doggy loved it here!! Big4 Hervey Bay is definitely a spot we’ll be coming back to.

Myself and my partner stayed here for our 3 night stay in one of the villas and honestly we couldn’t fault it. We had the best stay and it had everything we needed and more. Staff were also lovely and super accommodating. We will definitely be coming back to stay. Thanks guys!
Lovely place helpful staff and clean shower toilet facilities. Staff went above and beyond and even gave us a free lift to the concert.

As a client of Big 4 Caravan park Hervey Bay, I would like to thank the management team for their assistance and hospitality...
Nothing was to much trouble to make our stay enjoyable and comfortable
Will be definitely staying with them again...
Thank you,

My husband, 2 kids and I recently spent a week at Big 4 Hervey Bay. We felt relaxed and enjoyed our stay. The staff were super friendly and happy to answer any questions we had. They had a lovely communal outdoor cooking BBQ area overlooking the park and pool area that was kept very clean and tidy the only thing I would suggest is perhaps updating the outdated cooking facilities in the cabin we were in. Although functionable it was very outdated with only 2 hot plates. However during our time there they were working on the grounds and making improvements to paths etc.
It was a great place to say and we will definitely be back next year 😊

This park is very quiet with friendly staff .
It has an excellent heated main pool with a kiddy pool  next to it ( no shade ) great playground ( shaded )if you have kids and games room .
Clean and tidy park with great kitchen facilities , toilet block a bit dated .
A couple of days the park put on snacks and a breakfast which brings everyone together ( great idea) .
Beach mentioned is walking distance but not great for swimming at all , to many sharp rocks .
Way to far to walk to main shops but does have a small convenience store within 400 mts , bus stop outside the gate .
This Big4 is a very small compact camp not like any other Big4 we have stayed at but still nice .

Hello
We have just left Point Vernon Big 4 Hervey Bay
We were extremely happy with the park…loved our spot
Dog beach 2 minutes away…not very far to drive to the most beautiful beaches for a swim
Restaurants galore not far away by car…
The Yardsman was the hardest working guy I’ve seen…as soon as a van moved out he moved in with his mower and mowed the lawns …so as the next person had nicely mown lawns..
Such a friendly guy…didn’t get his name unfortunately but a really happy guy.
Will definitely recommend
Yard man deserves a bonus …👌

We stayed in a one bedroom cabin. The beds were comfortable but found the cooking facilities a bit outdated but we managed. We usually like to do our own cooking instead of eating out.  Its a nice area and quiet. Alysha was very helpful in lending us a power cord to charge our ev as we had problems charging it at charging stations.

Stayed for two nights not the best sleep while the owners dogs were barking most of the night. Camping ground wasn’t flat were we put our tent up, sore back for two nights sleeping downhill. Asked the owner what time to check out and he was rude about it and told us to keep our voice down very rudely as we couldn’t talk any softer. We moved to another camp ground and they are nice as and also said a lot of people are not happy after leaving the big 4 Harvey bay. Met a fair few people too and say do not recommend that places. |Me and my family did not enjoy our stay there.

Owner was a disrespectful person and had there dogs barking all night then ask a question and get spoken to very rude not recommended also bathroom had faeces all over the ground and up the walls not a good place for kids very unhealthy and disgusting

Stayed here this weekend with our 3yo and 14mo. Highly reccomend, we had an awesome time. We stayed in one of the cabins, it was clean, perfect size for the family. Kids had an awesome time swimming, smaller pool for toddlers is great too. Our eldest had a great time playing with the dinosaurs in the kids room! Out of town so nice and quiet, easy walk down to the beach front for a beautiful walk. We will be back :)
Nice quiet van Park nice pool and office staff were very nice

I stayed in a deluxe cabin, it was very clean and updated. Check in took 2 minutes, and Bec was friendly and easy going. I had to extend my stay at extra night, Bec rearranged things to accommodate me.
It's about 10 minutes walk to Stocklands shopping centre
I would gladly stay here again.
Perfect!

We are travelling with our small dog and were really appreciative of this pet friendly park. The cabin we stayed in was lovely and cool after a long day of travelling. The only down side was a distinct dampness odour when entering the cabin which could be rectified with some essential oil. It was well equipped with most things we needed and the bed was comfortable. We enjoyed some relaxation time in the pool and it’s a nice walk to the beach front & shops.|We originally only booked one night but were offered a second night at a good rate so we took the offer.

Enjoyed our stay, clean rooms
However whenever we go away we always take our own pillows & pillowcases
So when we arrived placed our pillows on bed then supplied pillows in the wardrobe
We left before office opened only to get a call from the manager asking where the pillows where   Would have thought he would have checked before making a phone call to us on our way home
Just left as as assumed thieves!
Liked everything else about our stay except phone call from manager no apologies
When it was his mistake not checking wardrobe

Recently stayed here in a cabin and were very impressed. It has the best camp kitchen I've ever come across and literally everything you need from crockery and cutlery, fresh dish clothes, tea towels and every kitchen utensil possible. You could literally just bring food and not be disappointed. Kids enjoyed the pool and the laundry even had free powder! Some cabins even allow small dogs inside. Cabin was clean and never ran out of hot water.

This place is perfect, it's awesome for children, adult get aways, and pets 😊. Close to the beach and on the main road. 100% suggest this place for a weekend get away or a good holiday. Lovely hosts who will do anything to ensure your stay and service is beautiful 😍.
카라반 사이트에 텐트치고 5일 있었읍니다. 사이트당 촤대 6인 기준이었는데 카라반 이용할 경우에나 6명 가능할 것 같고 텐트로는 좁아서 힘들어요. 직원분들 모두 하나같이 친절하셔서 너무 좋았고 시설도 깨끗하게 잘 되어있었읍니다. 다만 개미가,, 부쉬캠핑 할 때보다 많았어요,,, 메인도로 바로 옆이라 밤새 차소리로 시끄러우니 참고하새오.

Booked in and paid 4 a wk in advance 4 a powered site only to get a phone call and hr b4 we arrived saying that they had a double booking and we're out of luck find somewhere else which I have never had happen anywhere else in my travels around Australia

We had a caravan.  Accommodated as requested next to other family with a camper trailer in the camping section.  The grounds were extremely clean, neat and tidy.  The bathrooms and toilets were always clean and well maintained.  Camp kitchen well stocked.  Large camp fridge available and a TV.  Saturday afternoon sausage sizzle in camp kitchen. Pool clean and tidy.  Everything was clean and tidy.  Staff friendly ++++.  Other family stayed in cabin.  Plenty of room and again clean and tidy.  1km walk to beach.  Or drive.  We stayed for Hervey Bay Tri series.  Staff allowed us to stay longer after the Sunday morning race and pack up later in the day.   Thank you.

Heerlijk rustige camping met vriendelijk ontvangst. Direct aan het strand en supermarkt en restaurants op loopafstand. Veel verschillende vogels en om 6 uur vliegen de vleermuizen uit die overdag in een boom op de camping slapen. Super plek
Nice clean park central to everything.
Nice clean cabins

Friendly greeting. Nice clean park. Lots of permanent people who keep their places immaculate. Plenty of toilets and showers. Dump point near the amenities. Nice and clean too. Pretty quiet too except for a local's yappy little dog ar 4:30am!

We had a wonderful experience at Tasman Holiday Park. Despite the pouring rain, we had a big room that accommodated us comfortably. The reasonable price and its convenient location close to everywhere made our stay even more enjoyable. Highly recommended for a memorable holiday.

Great park has lots of options from cabins to campsites to suit all needs. I had a powered site which was well maintained and clean. The park itself is clean and staff very friendly as well as good price. Quiet as well and but close to everything you need.

Great park in a good location which was very dog friendly. A park right next to it for the dog to go for a run. Walking distance to the beachfront and shops. Friendly staff and amenities were excellent.
We recently had the best weekend away here. The staff are AMAZING! I still cannot get over the customer service. We will be back!
Awesome

We enjoyed the location out of the busy main esplanade area & it was easy to get around to areas of the town.  Our site was quiet & found the park to be sheltered from the winds.  Staff were very helpful.
Katrina Francis

Super nettes Personal, wir kamen Sonntags nach Feierabend und der Platz war eigentlich voll und trotzdem haben wir einen Stellplatz bekommen.

Küche toll und Toiletten sauber!
Very comfy, and clean.

What a fantastic park, point Vernon was amazing and the park was so peaceful and well maintained, even the showers and toilets are 5 star worthy. Managers Alysha and Tom were so inviting, very friendly and helpful. This was our first time staying at any Big4 park and if they are all like this park, then this will not be our last Big4 park. Will definitely be staying at this park again in the future. Recommend this park if you want a clean and family friendly place to stay.

I booked last minute and the staff were super helpful through the booking process, helping us to work out whether our tent, car and boat would all fit on the site.
The facilities were clean and spacious (great showers) and the camp kitchen was also lovely and clean.
An added bonus of this park was two swimming pools (one heated) which kept the kids entertained.
I will definitely stay here again and will recommend to everyone.
Very friendly staff. Clean facilities. Comfortable vibes
Stayed in our caravan. Booking in process is so quick and easy.  Free wifi, no pw required. Grest pool area, close to everything and despite school holidays,  quiet.

Big 4 Hervey Bay Caravan Park is where we always stay when visiting Hervey Bay. The staff are friendly and always there to help. We are frequent visitor to this caravan park. The pool area and gaming room are great to entertain kids.
Amazing park, very welcoming and family friendly 🤍

This park is by far THE BEST we have stayed in and we’ve stayed in plenty having been on the road for the last 3.5 years.

While the park doesn’t have all the bells and whistles of the bigger parks, it has something better… family, good vibes and a whole lotta love. The stuff you very rarely get at the bigger more commercialised parks.

From the moment I called up to book in, to arriving and then of course staying, we have been made to feel welcomed, and it feels like we are home. The team are amazing!!!

The games room is so cozy and inviting. Like a rec/chill room…. It’s not filled with loud and bright machines designed to take your money, there’s a soccer table, table tennis, kids toys/books/games, old retro arcade machines and a PlayStation, all for free!

Honestly, I am blown away by this park, it’s at the top of my list and more than likely will remain there.

If you’re after no frills, a passionate team who go above and beyond, come stay here!

Cheers fams, much love.

🧡🤠
Loved every bit of our stay, very welcoming lots of activities for the kids and adults. Definitely coming back
Beautiful cabin and amazing hospitality from all the staff,  ended our weekend with a yummy sausage sizzle dinner, could not have asked for anything better

Nice and clean  little park, managers  very helpful and the caravan owners that were there very nice, not far from anything would stay there again
( Phantom )

This is a great park in a quiet area. We were travelling with our young kids and they loved the playground and the kids room was awesome. We really appreciated the toys suitable for toddlers. The price was also really reasonable for a powered site at the start of a school holiday period.
Quiet and peaceful location away from the busy centre, yet close to walks and attractions.

Great park. We thought it was a bit far from town but it worked better it was nice and quiet. The amenities were so clean . The camp kitchen was beautiful and clean . Pool area good but it was windy so didn't get to use it. Tom was a great bloke .
We would definitely recommend this park and we will stay here again when next in the area.
Raelene and Gary.

I cannot recommend this Tasman holiday park enough. We love getting the pool cue/balls (small deposit needed). The pool is always refreshing. The rooms are well equipped, spacious and the beds are comfortable. This park is now our favourite place to stay in Hervey Bay.

A Member of the G'Day Parks Group. Have attended this park with our caravan on a couple of occasions. Pets allowed to sites only with conditions. Well maintained park, with friendly ground staff, and office staff. An excellent camp Kitchen, 2 BBQ"s etc, large seating area.||Highly recommended for packpackers, vanners, or family wishing to use the many cabins.
Fantastic bungalow and wonderful staff. Our home away from home.
Just a few little things in the room that made me take a star off but nothing major. We have stayed in the past with excellent results.
Friendly and helpful people good clean and tidy room kitchen area excellent and well presented

What an amazing park, we stayed in a cabin, it was very clean & well equipped, new owners are doing an amazing job of cleaning up what was a rundown park, so much has improved since our last visit 2 years previous, very friendly staff, I would highly recommend

Wow!!!! What a great little park Point Vernon Big 4 holiday park is. It must be the friendliest, most welcoming park we have ever stayed in. The owners Tom & Alysha treat you like family, the staff are wonderful and are always on hand to help with info on tours, places to eat and things to see. Tom and  Craig are there to help you into your site if needed.  Camp kitchen has everything you need with great bbqs, fridge, toasters, microwave and even some crockery. Clean amenities with great hot showers.|Great happy hours in the camp kitchen. | Jan & Greg B

We stayed here for 4 weeks. Love this Caravan Park and its location away from the hustle and bustle of Hervey Bay. The Staff go above and beyond to make sure your stay is the best. Fabulous Camp Kitchen, great pool, clean amenities and surrounds and very friendly staff. Some sites are a bit tight but Craig/Tom are there to help you back in. Look forward to catching up again next year

Pros - Cheap for a week long stay in one of their cabins
Cons - Cabin was dirty, had to wear shoes inside to stop our feet from going black
- Rubbish left in the cabin from the last guest, and the cleaners

The park itself is very tired, and I'm not sure how it got the title of Big 4

Generally the staff were lovely
The location was a bit out of the way and not an easy walk into town unless you had a bike.

One of the staff mentioned that the cabin had been refurbished 2 weeks prior to our arrival, but other than painting... not sure exactly what they meant by refurbished 🤔

Unfortunately we only got to stay one night.
Hubby and I would have loved to stay longer but the park was fully booked. The cabin accommodation was fabulous....
If you weren't so far from home we would definitely be back....
However more than happy to highly recommend....Book Ahead
What a great place to stay we were there a month had the best time so much fun with all our great friends
A bit run down and pricey for a so called Big 4, lots of permanents, bit far out of town to anything .

Stayed 3 weeks in a cabin. Tom, Alysha and all the staff are friendly and make you feel very welcome. They go above and beyond to make sure your stay is a pleasurable one. Lovely quiet spot for a relaxing holiday. We have booked again for next year. Michael and Gaye

Stayed for two weeks.   Very satisfied with the park. Location a little away from centre of town, but a very easy drive and much quieter and relaxed.   Sites were a little tight to back into but Craig was very helpful and an expert guide to park your van. Tom and his Staff were very friendly.   Special Rugby finals night was much appreciated, and pizza night a big hit.   Facilities a little dated but very clean.   Enjoyed our stay and would recommend

What a fabulous spot! Wide pathways to the water, playgrounds for the kids & a delicious cafe two streets over. We spent two weeks here (unplanned) and will definitely be back. The owners are lovely, very accommodating and couldn’t be more helpful when we decided to extend our stay. Clean amenities, pool was beautiful, (with a solar warmed toddler pool) & great camp kitchen. A lovely family friendly park 4min drive from the main township.
Had a week here very recently and found the staff very helpful and friendly. Amenities were kept very clean and sanitised. Fairly quiet area.
Lovely place.. friendly staff, very quiet location. Bit tight in some places for vans. Cars and vans bigger these days  most places have not adjusted accordingly.

I found this caravan park to be horrible , staff were so loud and had no respect for guests . Toilet block very outdated and old . I would not recommend to our family and friends to stay here at all . Infant we left a night early as our experience was horrible . What a rip off at $74 a night . Terrible place do not stay here . We were placed in the first site with two dogs ! Not ideal . A refund would be appreciated it was horrible
What a great friendly crew at this park and staff even assisting with van parking to take out the stress. Nil issues and very quiet along with being clean

We had a fantastic week at the Big 4 in Hervey Bay! After a hectic 6 weeks of travelling up the east coast (and staying at the Big 4 in Caloundra in school holidays surrounded by hundreds of kids) we really needed to relax and this place was perfect! It’s a smaller park but has everything you need, and very dog friendly!  We stayed on a powered site and swam in the pool nearly every day! The beach is just up the road and the sunrises are AMAZING!
The best thing about the park is the owners and staff! We were invited to their Saturday night sausage sizzle (free) and met some really lovely people, and it kind of felt like a home away from home! Thank you Tom and Alysha!
Excelent campsite, handy to all the attractions in Harvey Bay and the nearby tourist attractions. Facilities kept clean and well maintained. Would recommend to anyone. Cheers Gordon and Karen

The site allocates to us is not fit for a caravan after rain. It should not be made available during wet times. Other sites I am sure were fine. The sullage drain was blocked which created a “bog” around the car making it very inconvenient and messy getting to and from the van. Staff were nice and helpful.

Tucked away in a quiet area of Hervey Bay is this delightful gem 💎.  Yet not far from the water views. I travelled with my grand daughter and she had a wonderful time hanging out with the children at the playground and well appointed kids play room. Because of its smaller size I was able I was able to locate my grand daughter at all times. We had a great time. Everyone was really  friendly. Thanks for making our Granny camp memorable. 🏕.

Absolutely loved our time here, as newbie’s we were welcomed and helped above and beyond. Family friendly with plenty for the kids to do, state of origin night was awesome, hosts put on a huge platter, game on the big screen, all the guests were invited and joined in .. great atmosphere 👍
Amenities were always clean and plenty of hot water, easy walk to stunning beachfront, dog friendly and off leash.. we are most definitely coming back 10/10

Small, clean and pleasant caravan park with very friendly staff. Good amenities and camp kitchen with weekly events, like a sausage sizzle.
A little far to walk to the main drag but great for pushbikes. Less than 10 minutes drive to  beachfront esplanades, restaurants, shops, and nearby marina.

I honestly feel the thing that makes this park is the park manager / grounds manager. ||He’s so welcoming and it’s genuine! He is super accommodating, and very positive!||The games room is a bonus for colder days, there is a PlayStation in there so it’s tricky to get the kids off, but it also gives us peace and quiet when needed, too.||A whole bunch of intact, well cared for quality books and toys the younger kids and our baby loves!! Table tennis and soccer table.||All free.||Clean room unlike some other holiday parks we’ve stayed at. ||The monitors are always clean, waters always hot, pressure is good. Lots of space!||The playground is fair, our baby loves it, but likely only suitable for the toddlers, or preschool age.  Still all in good condition.||We would 100 percent make this our go to holiday park in Hervey Bay.

Very friendly owners and brilliant location. Great facilities.
I would recommend this caravan park to one and all.

Enjoyed our three nights here. Staff were super helpful and friendly on arrival. Amenities kept clean. Nice bbq camp kitchen area. Big TV perfect for watching Freo Dockers. Grassy powered van site. Dog friendly and short walk to off leash dog beach and long grassed walk area toward town.
Great staff clean and comfortable cabins and just an unbelievable place to stay at ,great for kids just an unreal place thanks to you all ,we will be back soon thanks Paul and Michelle

Very warm welcome from Craig and great assistance from Tom to park the van.  Very nice park with great potential.   The pool area is very good, as is the camp kitchen.   There is plenty of water pressure for the shower.  Bit further out of town, which makes for a very quiet park.  Great conversations with Tom each day.  Will be back.
We had mid week stay van site our second time very well looked after park staff are very friendly and helpful

Highly Recommended!!!
Great place to stay!

BIG4 Hervey Bay is located in a beautiful spot and meets all our needs for site camping in our rooftop tent. We’ve also stayed in their onsite cabins which are very tidy and clean. The staff are friendly and always go out of their way to make sure you have what you need. There’s also a newly renovated magnesium pool located at the front of the park that is a great way to cool off. Overall the park has great character with a dedicated team to further the development into the future.

Our caravan spot was at the entrance and exit. It was noisy with all cars, trucks and vans passing by.

It was extremely tight parking our ute with palm trees in the way.

No sullery was provided, so everyone's greywater was all over the lawn and road.  (Always muddy)
Both pools were cold, no heated water in the kids pool as advertised.

Other than noisy bats and bat poo residue on the ute and van, the campsite was always clean.

Lovely quiet campground, seemed to be mostly older couples which suited us and meant it was very friendly and peaceful. Very helpful management. Excellent showers. Definitely recommend if you want to be away from the busy waterfront parks in Hervey Bay. We would certainly stay again.
Couldn’t accommodate us due to size of our caravan being too big at 25ft

Good location just out of town.
Friendly people.
Glad I had own shower & toilet. Pretty tired for a Big 4 park
I think its a work in progress.
I hope they get the park to the standard they are after.

Made a last minute decision to visit my daughter in Hervey Bay, stayed at the Big 4 Point Vernon in a cabin.
The cabin was super clean with everything working, the pool looked awesome the grounds very tidy and staff were so friendly and accommodating, nothing was a problem.
I was told under new management and park upgrades were progressing, well the new management in my eyes are going great.
Many thanks and I will be back again.
Cheers, Shane

John and Cheryl Copley from North Brisbane, had a relaxing stay there at the Big 4 - Point Vernon.
We are members and found the park to be very welcoming & also quiet which suited us, just fine.
Friendly, tidy and amenities were always clean.
Thank you for fitting us in and we both look forward to visiting again.
Cheers John and Cheryl

Clean, tidy and well attended to. Staff obliging. We had our dog with us. No issues. The park is fully secure at night. Currently one amenities block was being renovated. We extended our stay and will go back again. Thank you for making our much needed holiday pleasant and restful.
Great location, friendly staff, beautiful & spotlessly clean facilities & top caravan park.
Super clean emenities great location enjoyed our stay

Toller Campingplatz, in Laufnähe zum Meer.
Waren hier 3 Nächte. Gepflegte Anlage und saubere Sanitäranlagen.
Great caravan park modern facilities and no feral ppl running through our camp & spacious sites but a lil bit too far from water and grey water drainage bonus its dog friendly

My daughter (almost 3)  and I had such an amazing time with our friends here. The owners are so friendly, amenities were always clean and tidy, location is perfect, walking distance to everything we needed.

Awful experience. Poor customer service and an intimidating environment created by both staff and other campers. A group across multiple campsites interfered with our belongings and moved our bike, leading to police being called. We felt unsafe, spent the night on edge, and left a night early. Completely unacceptable.

Rude and aggressive behaviour from staff and guests.
My wife and her friend were aggressively shouted at 8.15pm for talking, they were so scared and frightened they had to call the police.
From the point we arrived we were greeted by rude staff.
We had a guest arrive who was coming to see us, she was also approached aggressively  by staff.

Our experience was absolutely horrendous. Started with an incredibly rude staff member, at check in, followed by being abused for playing music quietly at 8pm which was so bad we called the police. The first night we had a Karen tell us to stop talking in our own space at 9pm. This place was absolutely awful and the people staying there were aggressive and awful
Friendly staff good sites good atmosphere great that its a 1 way direction to drive.... will definitely be back

This is my first time staying here this caravan park is one of the very best I've stayed at Frendly Welcome Staff they're like this all the time every area is very clean and tidy witch make for happy camper's 😊 😃 all in all it's a beautiful place to stay 😀 The famous Urangan Pier is about 10 minutes walk with plenty of Restaurant Shop's Cafes + Beach Front walking paths with fantastic sunset views and fishing a like 👍 It's just one of Harvey Bays many beautiful places

Great location. Only 5 minute walk to the pier and a shop just across the road. Good facilities, laundry room, kitchen, pool. The toilets and showers were clean. We arrived late but it was very easy to check in after hours. We added on extra nights and the staff were very accommodating!
Exceptional park to stay in. Clean, secure and the staff are just beautiful people.  Definitely worth a holiday here and we will be back for sure.

Great caravan park a short walk from the pier. Plenty of grassy sites that are a good size. It was easy enough to reverse in as some if the ones for bigger van are on a bit of an angle, which always makes it that bit easier. Staff were very friendly. Amenities were very clean. Fob security to enter after you've entered the first time. Security gate closes at night with a code needed to get out. Really pleasant spot.

Not so happy with my stay. Site 62 must be the worst site in the park and they weren't busy. Very noisy.
Was not notified that the showers near me were closed Saturday.
Hence a very long walk to the amenities I normally stay near. Not good with a bad back.
The pool was lovely though and much appreciated with this hot weather
Great Holiday here with large sites, excellent location & very clean facilities. See you next January

We have been to Pier Caravan Park Hervey Bay twice and we really enjoyed it Our family have agreed that it is traditional to go to the Pier once a year. The Park and staff are exceptional and nice to talk to.  The Park is clean constantly and makes visitors feel comfortable.
Great clean park. Smallish sites but been in worse. Guided onto your site by manager. Bit far out of town to walk in

Pulled in after a long drive and were helped to our site and to park our oversized van!! Quiet but friendly site, super clean amenities. Bit of a trek out for dinner but the free RSL shuttle bus did the job perfectly!!
Lovely friendly staff. Very helpful.
The new owners are very helpful the site's are not that big the amenities are very clean

Tom was extremely helpful with assisting us into our caravan site. The park has lots of potential.
Seemed to be a lot of people living there.
A lot of people smoking.
The park is a long walk from anywhere.
The pool was lovely and the amenities were clean.
No codes or keys which made things simple.

Stayed here in a powered van site was late arriving to be met by a young man who helped reverse  us in as it was a bit tight and busy long weekend everywhere was clean and tidy and the  pool was  very inviting would definitely stay again
New managers who are very helpful and friendly. Park probably needs a little money spent on it to get it up to scratch. Other than that happy.
Great friendly service. Peacefully location, clean amenities and great value
We had a powered site. Sites kept maintained.  Great hosts. Facilities well maintained and clean. Would definitely stay there again.

Gorgeous caravan park. Van sires are good. Well appointed. Good facilities, great bush walk access directly to the beach, lots of trees and wildlife walking around.  Owners are friendly. Definitely would recommend.  Great part of town with lots to do.
Beautiful caravan park. Lovely pool and playground for the kids, and friendly guests. Very close to everything.

Great location, amazing friendly and helpful staff.
We took the Fraser k’gari explorer tours and picked us up right out front of the Big 4.

I stayed here recently for 3 nights with my two children for the Easter school holidays. We all had a great time - the kids swam in the pool every day and enjoyed the games room. The park is quiet and relaxed, lovely place to stay as a family. Easy walk to the beach and a short drive to the Wetside water park and restaurants, shops etc. It is actually the perfect distance away from all the hustle and bustle so you can really get into relaxed holiday mode without hoards of other holiday people around you. I have read some people in other camping grounds have had issues with crime but had none of that at the big4 Hervey Bay. Amenities were clean and grounds are immaculate, staff were super friendly. We stayed in a cabin and it had everything we needed - linen, plump pillows, two tvs, all the kitchen equipment needed, aircon worked well. The only thing my kids wished it had was a sofa, but I'm not sure how you'd fit that in the cabin and besides - those lazybutts needed to be outside and swimming or riding their bikes anyway 😜
Things we did: walked to the beach, ice cream at planet 72, wetside water park, lunches out, visited several playgrounds, walked the uranguan pier and visited the markets there. There's lots to do at HB and we'll be back for sure!

We stayed at the big 4 Hervey Bay over Easter 2024 and we were incredibly disappointed.

We booked a pet friendly cabin that slept 4, online the photos show an updated cabin with a seperate sleeping and eating areas that could be closed by doors. When we arrived we did not receive this cabin, we received an old, dirty cabin with no sections for eating and sleeping.

On the first night we arrived the kids beds sheets were dirty (hadn’t been changed just remade), the floors were filthy and the bathroom doors didnt work properly. I called the after hours number which was disconnected so walked to the office, I did find a member of staff and they came and changed the sheets and offered to mop the floors. (The staff were friendly and accomodating)

The next morning the staff came and mopped the floors but sadly we think the floors need a desperate scrub or to be ripped up and new fresh flooring laid. (Attached are photos of our feet after one night walking around, no we didn’t walk barefoot outside and had shoes on beforehand)

The next day I spoke to the owner and he offered a partial (one night refund) for the issues.

However, he stated that it’s the Big 4 who run the website and it’s their job to update the photos in regards to the cabins. This is not on at all and straight up false advertising, we did NOT receive the room we booked and payed for.

We payed a lot of money for what we thought would be a nice place but unfortunately it really ruined our holiday. We left 2 days early as we couldn’t stay in the cabin anymore as it was nothing as advertised and did not suit our needs. (We did receive a refund for those nights)

The park itself is in need of upgrades and I was told management are doing them.

We just want to make sure no one else books here thinking they’ll get the cabins that are in the photos on the website as we did and not receive what was expected.

Hopefully they can improve the park, update the website with correct information and reconnect the after hours number.

Thank you
Chelsea
The park and camp sites are well kept with friendly staff and amenities are clean . We really enjoyed our stay.

We stayed here for 4 nights over Easter in our 9m caravan.   To say the sites are small is an understatement. They are too close to each other and we were in site 58. So so close to the neighbours that we could hear what they were saying.  It is the worst BIG4 we have stayed at. If you’re looking for a park that is nicely done don’t go here. Won’t be back

I recently visited this wonderful park and had an amazing experience with the staff and the overall atmosphere. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted by friendly and welcoming staff who made us feel right at home.

The park itself was well-maintained and organized, with plenty of fun activities for the kids to enjoy. The staff went above and beyond to ensure that everyone had a great time, and it was clear that they truly cared about the guests' experience.

One of the highlights of our visit was the stunning bay just down the road from the park. The views were absolutely breathtaking and we were able to enjoy a relaxing day by the water. The location of the park is truly unbeatable.

I was also impressed by the new owners of the park who are clearly making improvements and taking great care of the property. The gardens were looking beautiful and added to the overall charm of the park.

Overall, I highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a great family-friendly vacation spot. The combination of a stunning bay, organized fun activities, and a friendly and welcoming staff make it the perfect destination. I can't wait to visit again and see what other improvements the new owners have made. Keep up the great work!
Beautiful staff & great accommodation. The pool, play-ground & BBQ is excellent. 100m walk to the beach & the corner store.
We had a ball! Great staff, good energy from all, felt safe and was a nice family experience. Beach close-by and great bike tracks into Hervey Bay town.

My husband, myself and our little dog were in an unfortunate situation whereby the expected settlement date of our new house was put off for a week by the sellers solicitors.  Big 4 were amazing ... at no notice, we were able to put our van on a powered site with water for the week, and my son who had come to H.Bay to help us with the move was able to put his van very close to us. This park offers the lot, everything is immaculately clean, dog friendly, close to beaches, shops, very tourist friendly. Amazing people own and run this park. Absolutely recommend it. 👌

Very clean amenities
Grounds are well looked after
Very central to everything .
The only improvement I would suggest is a DYI Dog Wash Station, like some Car Wash places have
With the beach being so accessible, the the Park allow dogs, a wash afterwards would be great.
I would certainly recommend this place even without the Dog Wash

Very good location, within walking distance to the SPAR, bottle shop, pier and the market. It’s also a good place to stay on rainy days, as the facilities in the park are very good. There are two kitchen areas, one near the pool and playground, and another with a games room (three TV games and table tennis for free) and a reading area. The amenities are clean and well maintained.
A very good choice for staying in Hervey Bay.

Shame on you, You can keep your inside grounds nice but just can't do the outside around your fence line looking very Unprofessional for you and your neighbours not a place to visit anytime soon. Keep the place nice is inside and outside all the time 🤔🤔🤔🤔

Great place to stay, everything is kept spick and span tidy, would definitely be one of the best parks we have stayed at. Very close to everything which is a bonus, recommend that you visit, you won't be disappointed 10/10
Lovely caravan park. Well looked after and so close to Urangan Pier. Will definitely book here again.
Great place to stay, Leoni and Dallas were fantastic so helpful. The amenities were immaculate and he grounds were well kept. central to all you need in Hervey Bay.
Overall not too bad, amenities were clean enough. Staff were ok, kids on elec scooters etc after dark are an issue.
Really well.kept park with nice size sites. Nice clean amenities everything seems new.  Nice friendly staff, definitely recommend
Lovely site, well kept with great facilities, easy access to the Pier
Very tidy and well appointed caravan park. Excellent facilities. Quiet. Close to beach, esplanade and markets. Grass sites can be soggy in wet weather

Immaculately kept, well presented caravan park.  Fantastic facilities that are the best we have seen in all our travels.   Staff are friendly, helpful and efficient.  Close to the pier and amenities such as food places and other supplies.  Highly recommend this park.

we were looking for a park close to the water on 26th of October,2025. This park suited every caravaners dream, spotless cleaned every day, very quite, excellent security and friendly staff at reception. 15 minutes drive  to Pialba major shopping centres and  close to “doing the walk along the long pier”. we had a drive thru site plenty of room as well.We stayed four five nights and paid for four fifth night was free.

This park is immaculate, friendly reception, great large grassy powered sites with slab.The toilet and shower blocks super clean and modern.The staff are always busy all day maintaining the park.Great location as well next to bottle shop and small supermarket and the iconic pier.Been on the road for 2 and a half months best park by far

Great park in an awesome location. The staff are great and facilities clean.
Would have been five stars but for the rediculous trees planted right where a large van needs to reverse I. To the site.

Pleasant quiet just trees are planted in wrong places for caravan park along road side around site  21 and others terrible to back in worked I’ve seen in 10 years on the road      Greenies strike again %. Other than that 10/10 for facilities position and cleanses :
Great location

Very helpful and friendly check-in. Grounds and amenities top class. They even use a catcher on the lawn mower. Saves all that dry grass coming inside. Close to Urangan Pier and cycle trails. Spent 17 very enjoyable days here. A bit tight for average backers to put caravan on site.
Had a great stay at BIG4 Harvey Bay, park was clean and tidy and the new pool was a hit, will definitely stay again.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in the cabin.  Point Vernon is a beautiful location and was perfect for our visit to Hervey Bay.  The cabin was perfect for our needs, clean and tidy and the staff at the park were nice and friendly.  We will definitely stay again next time.
Was a 5 min walk to the beach has a good walking /riding track  we enjoyed our stay here
Off the main drag so no road noise. Feels safe because the park is enclosed amongst suburban houses, with a small street frontage. Nice pool, great shower stalls and good kitchen.

Had an amazing experience, team is 10/10.
Very friendly and they even helped choose the best fraser island tour! Will come back again!

Small campsite, we stayed in a cabin that was clean and tidy, they had a pool, little entertainment room for the kids so kids had fun. They allowed dogs, reason why we booked, however T&C required that our dog had to stay in the cabin at all time and was not allowed for a walk around the park, even accompanied, which was disappointing. Otherwise it’s a nice place for its location.

Clean, quiet park with helpful staff. Located short walk from a less populous  stretch of the bay.
One of the most pleasant parks we have visited in 8 years of continuous travel.

Thank you Tom and Alysha,
Rob and I had the best time staying with you, during Xmas 2023 and the new year 2024.
We appreciate your kindness and help during this time.
We Love the Park and all staff.
Especially Craig and Dea who went above and beyond with their interaction, made us feel comfortable, informative as what was happening.
Thank you again Tom and Alysha, your little family are just Beautiful,  great to see your family growing.
We wish you all the best and hope Business will continue to excel in 2024.
Kind regards Angela and Rob x

I have been to a lot of the Big4 parks. I belong to the Big 4 club. It's a quite park in a great location but it's an outdated park. The only thing there is the pool and a small playground for the kids. Big 4 It's time to do an update of this facility.
A bit far out of the main hustle and bustle and a bit dated, but it was lovely and quiet and had basic but good facilities
Clean n tidy  place amenities  are in good order and decent size
Very Friendly staffs. Very helpful.
We have just visited with our camper for 3 nights in January 2024 and we’re very impressed. Lovely small site, friendly people and great facilities. Short drive to the local beach too.

The staff at this big 4 couldn't do enough for me and my family.
They were flexible, understanding,  knowledgeable  and patient with us.
I cannot recommend this sight and the staff enough.
A big thank you,  hoping to return again.

This caravan park is nothing like any other Big 4 that I've stayed at. It's small and old. The amenities need a revamp.
The swimming pool is small and there's no supervision. We had to put up with kids running around it, and in the water throwing toy aeroplanes, using water pistols and generally being a nuisance. Very little shade as well
Trying to get transport from the park to anywhere else in Hervey Bay was a very costly exercise. There is the 'Bus on Demand' service but it'll basically only drop you off at the shopping centre.
I will never stay at the park again.
My family and I all stayed just after xmas for a week and had a fantastic time . Staff are friendly and make you feel at home from the minute you turn up .

Great park, good upgrades being done and lovely owners.
We had a great stay with our young family.

We stayed here for over 3 weeks on a powered site and had a great time. The new owners have put a lot of effort into updating the park and it really shows. Spacious sites, updated pool and friendly staff to deal with. Our family enjoyed our whole stay and if we’re in the area would stay again.

My family and I had the pleasure of camping at big4 Point vernon these Xmas holidays for 2 weeks. And we can say that we had the best time. Tom and his family and all the staff make you feel so welcome and are so accommodating and are constantly checking in with you to see how things are going. We where lucky to have met such lovely people and all the holiday makers where so friendly. We would diffidently recommend anyone wanting to holiday in such a great place, they not only have great facilities but they included the kids and adults in fun games/activities over the holidays. So thank you big4 we will be back again.

A lovely place to stay, friendly helpful staff even New Year’s Eve activities. Great location out of the hustle but still close to everything 10 minutes drive to the Main Street and only a 5 minute walk to the bay views. And a bonus of a early check in was very kind Thanks for having us 😊
Nice and quiet place great amenities friendly atmosphere

Fantastic dog friendly spot with an off leash beach nearby.
Loved it.

What a Beautiful spot, close to everything (!)
The famous Pier and Pier markets.
We love it here with our caravan and will be back soon, as we are locals ( from Hervey Bay) and like to take our caravan here for our friends to stay.
Nice stop. Locals were very friendly

Stayed here for 5 nights the reception staff were lovely  on arrival and throughout our stay  the park is kept immaculate handy to everything you could want angled site a bit hard to get into  but once setup just a great stay   big sites which is great  when you have a dog 🐶 thank you
Kids love coming here on holidays and being right next to the beach. Its getting a little bit expensive but it is worth it
Busy caravan park very modern  amenities close walk to restaurants and pier.
Always clean, tidy with welcoming, friendly and helpful staff
Great park ,and great managers
Lovely small caravan park, clean and friendly staff. Sad that it was so crowded. Couldn't stay longer.
Nice flat sites, quick check in and clean amenities.  It is also close to shops and water and its dog friendly. This park now has more concrete slabs for sites.
Hi my wife and  i stayed 2weeks here great staff very friendly and helpful park and all amenities are fare dinkum top notch. Will definitely stay again many thanks john and Mai
Excellent Caravan Park in all respects in a top location

A wonderful Caravan Park. Everything was well taken care of. Toilets, showers, laundry and Camp Kitchen were immaculate. Pool and grounds were really well looked after and the staff were all very friendly and helpful. Location is fantastic - a very short walk from Urangan Pier.

5 Star Experience. We continue to make the Pier Caravan Park our preferred place to stay when visiting the Wide Bay region. The caravan sites are well spaced, grounds well maintained, amenities kept very clean, staff ever so helpful and we regard Urangan as the quietest and most relaxing location within all of Hervey Bay.

Wicked place nice and quiet staff were friendly toilets clean kitchen area clean great place for the kids having the gaming room and kids pool  perfect location being so close to the beach highly recommend and will be back for sure

We enjoyed our stay. The Park and the managers are friendly and go out of their way to make sure people are happy and are having a great time.
We had trouble with the acc in our caravan, but they helped finding the missing part in town and made room for us to stay a bit longer until our acc was fixed.
We would definately stay here again, if we ever return to this area again.
We called after hours to see if there was any availability at late notice. Owners were extremely helpful and went out of their way to open up the reception to check us in. Great facilities.
Clean pool and nice cabins

Very bad located, the pool is dirty and the toilets too. If you have to choose a camping near to the ferry to reach fraser this one is not the good one. Very expensive for what it is, it should not be under the big4 standards.... to avoid... there is a nicer camping near to the sea with better accommodations.

Belle place a cote de la plage
Plein de kangourous dans le camping
Owners & staff are very friendly & hospitable. Park is very clean & tidy & a nice size.  As it's in a residential area it's also nice & quiet.
Great little caravan Park out of the way you can walk to the beach but you have to drive to the shops but it's not a problem we took our caravan and our dog very pet friendly.

Lovely clean cabin with everything I needed, quiet surroundings and close to the beach. Perfect place for a get away and I will be back. Was very impressed when I booked in and I was asked if I would be okay getting up and down steps as I have a walking stick. Will definitely be back.
Close to the esplanade for walking and a dog off leash beach. Cafe nearby. Friendly staff, big thankyou to Tom for his help with flat tyre.
Lovely small, tidy and quiet park. The staff are amazing and so friendly.  Would stay here again, as it's so peaceful and friendly.  Thankyou for making me and my dog feel welcome.
Cabin we stayed in smelled of mould..mould in shower..boring park too far from anywhere in the bay..don't know how it's a big4..
Perfect place to stay
We enjoyed our stay.freindly staff. Great amenities

The park is small and quiet but has more than enough to keep kids busy. The games room has lots of free arcade and computer games plus pingpong table to enjoy. Pool was great to have a splash in. Amenities was tidy. Dog friendly with beach down the road for nice long walks.
Young couple wanting to do well - be kind- they are still learning. Grounds in need, neighbours of the property smoking drifting into the park - can't do much about that.
tiny but ok for one night
Excellent staff and freindly
Lovely park.  Well kept, and very clean amenities...we will be back again.
Great park, staying always here when in Hervey Bay!
Great park, new clean facilities and pool. Nice warm showers. Dogs welcome. Flat sites, some are drive through. Short stroll to The Pier and restaurants, pub. Friendly staff.

This is a terrific park in a good location. Well designed and maintained facilities are provided and the layout is very practical. We stayed for six nights and picked up a free night deal. The location is a short walk to the Urangan pier, a sports club and shops. Sites include a mix of grass and concrete, and sizes for a range of vans and rigs. We enjoyed staying here.
Update: In Jun 25, we returned to Urangan to visit family, so the Pier Caravan Park was an easy pick for us.

Stayed at Pier Caravan Park in Hervey Bay for a couple of night, late May 2025 - it certainly didn't disappoint, to the extent I would highly recommend you booking a site and relaxing.  The park was pristine, so much so that I asked the Receptionist how long had it been open (expecting her to say about 1 year) in actual fact it was opened in 2018.  The amenities we immaculate, regardless of what time I went.  Each site was very well maintained, and clean - easy to access with good 'elbow room' between neighbours.  Loved it.  The camp kitchen reminded me of a outdoor restaurant with plenty of tables and chairs (not just long benches), and again, very clean.  Don't know what I expected, but Pier Caravan Park was definitely a 'winner' in my books!  Thanks for a lovely stay, and such a great place - will visit again!!

Great park.  Well set out with one way road all around.  We had a corner site (57) which was so spacious, with nice grass area.
The pool and camp kitchen area is beautiful.  The whole park is beautifully maintained.  Staff always friendly.
It’s in a great location just a block away from the water, pier, great shops and eateries.
Definitely recommended.
An amazing location, clean amenities and well maintained. Best of all no midges

Pretty dissatisfied with the security the management has in place,, no gates on entrance or exit,, no routine security person,, lost my $2500 e-bike 2nd night there due to theft I had it chained to caravan along with U-Bolt locking mechanism and response from park management was report to police, not even a visit to my site after theft or phone call from management,, apparently theft happens on a regular basis at this park, so I was pretty disappointed in there response to a guest loosing a expensive bike on there property, won’t be back as security seems low on there list of safety for guests
