Great caravan park, ideal position, very clean and tidy. Will definitely stay again if we are in Hervey Bay.
Perfect spot to stay.

Absolutely brilliant!!!
We shall return…..first time staying at this beautiful caravan park.

LOCATION is 10/10
STAFF 10/10 - are happy, super friendly, knowledgeable, up for a chat, relaxed.
FACILITIES 10/10 - are extremely clean & quite new.

DOG FRIENDLY 10/10
They even accept dogs who are not social at all so a plus for owners of these pooches.

MINOR THINGS:

FLIES - this was my only annoyance tbh. All food needs to be covered at ALL times. I suspect the dog poo gives added attraction for the little fly 🪰 beasties.
Responsible dog owners will always pick up their dogs poos. I did see a few around so those owners are chumps for spoiling it for others as are the chumps who do not tie up their little sweethearts because they are small & won’t cause a problem. 🙃🤔😏😏

LOVE THIS CARAVAN PARK & SHALL RETURN.

We booked Pier Caravan Park last minute after being driven away by midges at another park—and we’re so glad we did! The location is fantastic, just a short walk to the beautiful Urangan Pier. The park itself is clean, well-maintained, and peaceful. All the amenities are nice and clean.
What a fabulous caravan park! Great sites, clean and well serviced amenities, very friendly and helpful staff
Clean well maintained park with friendly staff. Our regular stop when we need a couple of weeks relaxation.
Servizi ottimi. Tutto molto pulito.

Absolutely amazing.  From the time we arrived on Sunday afternoon to when we left with the fur child (dog) we were welcomed by staff, relaxing, and other guests were friendly and helpful.  Definitely coming back . Pup relaxing in the in the park. See you in October

Not a bad little park.  Nic and quiet but the cleaning of the amenities is very poor.  Went in after cleaner and looked no different.  Toilet paper on floor.  Toothpaste splashed on mirror had been there for the 3 nights we stayed.  Old bar of soap in corner of shower also there the whole time.
Mould in between tiles in shower and in corners of floor.
Could easily be cleand with Exit Mould and a scrubbing brush.  Definitely not Big 4 standards.
Good old fashion camp site….great location
Nice park. Quiet!
Great park with spacious sites and good amenities. Always had hot shower and everything was clean and tidy.
Very friendly  helpful  and clean

Our little family of 3, 2 humans and a dog stayed at this park in our motorhome for 3 months awaiting a house build.  It was incredibly friendly and all staff were fabulous to deal with and very obliging.   Facilities were clean and well located.  For dog and human walks this was wonderful and within easy distance of off leash areas.
In addition the park is an easy drive to supermarkets and for emergency supplies a little store 200m away.  Scores a 10 out of 10 from us and a happy woof from Poppy.
Difficult to park van, but it was well maintained and clean. Shower was fabulous 👌 toilets clean.

Awesome camping ground for your Campervan and awesome staff as well. We only wanted to stay for one night but on their website it stated 2 nights minimum, so we called and the caretaker/ manager was very friendly and directly booked us in for the requested night. 37 AUD for a powered concrete site. We even received an additional 10% discount as our Campervan is a rental (some special promotion which you wouldn’t get when booking online). The campsite offers nice hot showers, really good laundry and dryer for 4 $ each and a nice equipped camp kitchen.
The friendly manager helped us as well with some local information which we’re highly appreciated.
Thanks for everything!
Great spot! Very clean and tidy. Good size sites. Beautiful pool although the open till dusk was disappointing
Super Caravan Park,  sehr nettes Personal
Nicely layer out very clean in shower block and frindly people.
Vicki was so kind , helpful and lovely. Park was very clean and well looked after. We loved our stay, will definitely be back 😁
Continues to be great for families to holiday, well maintained, good location and good service.
Sehr schöner, sauberer und moderner Campingplatz. Mit Pool, Schranke, Touristeninfo, Waschmaschine, Trockner, Warmwasser Dusche und Outdoor Küchen.
Very clean, safe, and great value.

Nice clean park and good location. Unfortunately we had booked to be in a specific site in the park and after having a lengthy conversation with the reception person I booked our spot. When we arrived we were directed to a site that was exactly where we did not want to be. We had booked some time ago so I thought it was not right but second guessed myself so I shut up and we kept setting up. We soon realised why we did not want this spot we were given. Certainly did not want to go to the hassle of relocating just after we set up. Lesson to be learned… check and double check!  Just really don’t know why that had to be so hard to  just leave our booking and not change our spot.

Schöner Campingplatz
Alles sehr gepflegt und sauber
Campingküche sind KEINE Herd/-Gasplatten! Sprich man kann nichts kochen außer BBQ ..
Stellplätze sind viele sehr schief und alle Leute probieren es selber auszugleichen
Pool Duschen etc.  alles sauber und schön
Nice and clean. Close to shopping and the beach
A perfect and quite place stay especially if you want to plan a day trip to K’gari island.
Sehr sauber, nettes Personal, ruhig gelegen und man ist schnell am Strand. Das Ausflugsziel K‘Gari ist von hier schnell zu erreichen.
Great location walking distance to town and Esplanade. Clean amenities.
A very well maintained park, amenities were very clean and the park kitchen was very good. Grumpy's mobile food van had amazing food

Exceptional customer service right here - the ladies couldn't be more friendly and helpful! I have a Kimberly Kamper Trailer and it opens from the rear so you need some room to set up… l gave the details on my booking request and l had an awesome site that suited our KK and comfort. Modern, clean restrooms and showers with a great kitchen area. A quiet caravan park and safe feeling. Lots to do nearby, pier, reefworld, cafes etc. We highly recommend…
Saubere Einrichtungen schöner Platz und guter Service. Weniger Meter vom Uranangan Pier, einem tollen. Sunset Spot. Die great Sandy Straits Marina ist fußläufig erreichbar.

We felt very vulnerable with lack of security and non friendly maintenance staff. A simple hello going thru the park wouldn't go a miss the grounds are lovely as is amenities, in addition alot of self entitled dog owners who let dogs wander everywhere onto sites. These same self entitled people thought they could take ownership of camp kitchen and be loud and obnoxious. Plus take their little dogs into the kitchen.  This is a very unfriendly caravan park, with clicky groups.

Beautifully kept park with clean and modern facilities, pool area is great too. Our site was a grassed site but heaps of space for caravan, annex and car.
Staff in the office welcoming and helpful with all our enquires.
Park is in a great spot within walking distance to cafes, boat harbour and the historic pier.
Will definitely be back.

Very well located campsite. A stone's throw from the pier and the Saturday market. This campsite is really clean and well maintained, recent facilities. The staff is friendly. Our son loved the games room with ping pong, arcade games ...

Tidy park. Good position. I recommend it. My only constructive observation - they could lay off a tad on the semi-regular  "Karen text messages" to all current residents rousing on folk for not wearing bike helmets on premises and the like. Cheers
Very nice  clean friendly staff great location and have people come in with food trucks hamburgers are awesome and the yogurt woman has unbelievable sausage rolls

Very friendly staff, good amenities. 3 mins walk from the pier. The pier is impressive, the so called beach not so much - very wild,  lots of moving animals everywhere..should probably not go for a swim.
One of the best caravan parks we have started. Very clean, organised and friendly staff.

Very clean and tidy caravan park with a small kitchen with barbeque, pool, laundry, everything you need. Also, jetty is close to the park just few minutes away where you can go fishing or enjoy beautiful sunset.
One bad thing - DO NOT leave your clothes hanging outside per night near the laudry. In the morning I missed couple of T-shirts. It looked as a safe place to leave per night, but it wasnt. Cameras looking at the gate but not at the laundry place.
Super Campkitchen, saubere Sanitäranlagen, Strand und Pier schnell zu Fuß zu erreichen, netter Wochenmarkt in derNähe, Ananaskauf empfehlen.
Quite park,  awesome friendly staff, camp kitchen great.  Amenities absolutely 💯 spotlessly clean

Pier Caravan Park Urangan
Most of the current parks are dated so it is a pleasant surprise to find this brand new park that is close to the famous Urangan Pier and the numerous cafes and eatery’s with wonderful walking and bike paths. Staff are friendly, facilities clean and there is a pool and playground for the young ones. If in Hervey Bay the best place to stay, but book ahead especially this time of year as with all caravan parks in Hervey Bay the Southerners come here for the warmer climate.
Great spot

This was the first time I had stayed at this park but it won’t be the last. I appreciated the fact that they allowed me to stay in the front section of the park with my 2 cats as I was told the pet friendly area can get noisy with the dogs. The staff were friendly, the amenities were clean and being so close to the pier was awesome for afternoon walks. Loved this park!!

A must stay for any campers at Hervey Bay. The toilets and showers are new and clean and the park is well maintained.
Staff was very friendly and it is in a handy position to walk to local shops and the pier.
Also if you want to do a day tour to Fraser Island staff there will organise it for you and a bus will pick you up and return you to the park at the end of the day.
We would most definitely stay there again.
Extremely friendly and professional staff aswell as clean amenities, nice and short walk to cafes and restaurants on the esplanade. Went for a walk on the very long peir which was nice.
Webstayed here a couple times over the last month.  Nice spacious sites.  Friendly staff.  Clean amenities.

Good modern facilities and close to the pier. Don't stay in the back end of the park for the next few months though.  Heavy machinery construction is being used across the road from soon after 6am each day.  It is loud and relentless.
We stayed 2 night with our beagles. So clean, it was a real pleasure to be there, close to the Esplanade and shops. Loved it
Great van park close to pier and food.

What started out on a five night stay at this lovely caravan park has turned into 12 nights. Highly recommend people to stay at this park. We had our young Pomeronian Mia with us. Clean park,amenities,swimming pool.  Separate area at the back half of the park for People with their furbabies to stay, laundry available. Short walk to  shops and pier, local market on Saturday mornings, so much to see

Modern clean park with clean amenities
The only downside is that our site in the dog friendly zone had no slab but fine crushed black gravel, which got into everything. Also, the sites next to the fence line are at right angles to the road and tight to get into with a larger van. Recomend that you ask for the sites in centre rows as they have angled slabs and a lot easier to back your van.
This caravan park has to be the cleanest and most organised I have ever visited. I can't wait to make a return visit. Whoever does the cleaning and maintenance,  you are incredible!!

BLOODY LOVE THIS PLACE 😀
Do yourself a favour &  book in for a few days..I
personally Cannot Fault this park

Beautiful Clean Park
Beautiful  staff and lovely people
Sehr nettes Personal, super sauber und grosszügige WC/Duschanlage.
Only visited friends but a very clean and well appointed park
Stayed a week, has been very quiet. Great location for our needs.

Sehr sehr schöner und sauberer Campingplatz. Die sanitären Einrichtungen sowie die Küchen und BBQ Plätze sind super sauber gepflegt! Hier fühlt man sich richtig wohl! Die Stellplätze sind sehr sauber, sehr groß und haben Wasser und Strom. Der Platz ist sehr sicher, durch Schranke und Zaun, somit kann nicht jeder dort einfach rein. Der Empfang und das Management sind sehr nett 👍. Hier werde ich öfters hin kommen.

Wir waren zwei Tage auf dem Campground, alles super sauber gepflegt.
Wir kommen gerne wieder.
Great park, all new and well looked after, clean, great position, close to the pier.
Sehr sauber und angenehme Grösse, tolle Lage
Amazing location,  great amendmities, friendly, easygoing, will come again

Great place to stay, lovely pool, great kitchen facilities, games room for the kids!, very very clean toilets and showers, laundry. Great everything. Easy to walk to shops. Convenience shop just down the road. Very nice staff. It's well looked after, and very new! I've never stayed in a new camp ground before. Very impressed.
We were very satisfied (is an understatement) with our stay here. The staff were fantastic, the facilities were very clean, and the site was very neat/maintained. If only we stayed there longer!

It’s a very below average park with unclean facilities such as the bathrooms. The “owner” of the place is extremely rude, as I saw him looking intoxicated and swearing at an 18 year old because he took too many attempts to park his vehicle and questioned him if he even had his license as a way of taunting him. Overall I would definitely stay away from this place.

Pladsen var fuldt booket da vi var der, men alligevel var alt rent og pænt og der var roligt
Flot ren plads som på vores tur op ad østkysten har været klart den bedste plads
Brilliant park so clean and tidy great experience from start to finish
Great caravan park and dog friendly as well

Awesome!! Great place. Very clean,
Close to the Pier and shops. Very welcoming management. Had all sorts of things happening during the week we were there. Will go again.
This park is spacious, all the amenities are super clean and new. Leanne at the reception is super friendly and extremely helpful. If I ever come back to this area I would definitely come here again.

The manager here presents himself in an arrogant narcissistic manner, I made a mistake by driving too fast upon exiting the park, he blocked me at the exit and outright abused me, anyone with an ounce of professionalism should have approached the situation very differently.

The park itself lacks character and feels dull.

Some bright spark installed a concrete rainwater culvert directly opposite the site lot acess, when reversing into the lot, I could not sight the drain and consequently damaged my rear alloy wheel, delivering hundreds of dollars worth of damage.

This culvert is not designed with common sense.
Stayed on a powered site. Tidy park with spotless amenities, great pool & friendly staff

Toller, extrem sauberer Campingplatz mit sehr schönen Stellplätzen. Die Sanitärräume, Küche und Laundry sind äußerst gepflegt und in einem Top Zustand. Das Personal ist sehr nett. Hier würde ich jederzeit wieder herkommen.
Best park I have ever seen

Park is tidy, amenities clean and they have some security measures in place. They have grass sites and concrete pads and are pet friendly.
It's only a short walk to the sea, long Pier.
Only concern, the sites are close to each other if you are used to some space.

Great caravan park! New facilities, very clean. Check in from 11am is fantastic. My only complaint is the pool isn't heated, but not going to take points away for that. Straight across the park to the pier, close to cafes on the waterfront. Saturday markets in the parks, too.

A new park with great management. New and clean amenities, easy site access and room to move. Very close to town so walk across to the wharf and beach. Lock your bikes. People beside us had locks cut and bikes taken. $62 a night pretty exy but a very good park. Thankyou

Great place to stay friendly staff
Clean amenities.
Great Camp Kitchen
Now has a playground for kids, a very kid friendly park.
Pet friendly if that's your thing

Fantastic Caravan park with clean modern amenities, Pool area, games room, well equiped camp kitchen. The Pier Caravan Park is close to everything and a good base camp for fishing, whale watching tours and trips to Kgara (Fraser Island). Wish we had stayed longer as there is so much to see and do in the area.
Good clean park and Good value

What a fantastic park. Facilities were new and kept clean and the various food trucks and theme dinners (with entertainment) were tip top.

Location is just the cherry on top.
clean & new

I will say it's clean and tidy, but if you have a van 21ft plus, it's very very tight!
I mentioned this to reception as we departed, her comment "well, you do have a long van" I replied, we gave you the length details when booking, she just shrugged her shoulders.
Great park
Great caravan park. Very clean and tidy the site are generous in size. Friendly helpful staff. Would have loved to be able to have stayed longer.
We spent 3 Great nights. One was when they had their amazing Christmas in July night 🎅🏻 Park was clean and staff helpful

Loved our stay. Good sights easy to get into.
Toilet blocks were very clean and well set out. Easy walk to pier. The only thing we did not like was the dump points have a wire frame over the dump hole so all the paper gets stuck and has to be hosed a lot to get it down the hole it is disgusting you have to spend more time at dump point then necessary those sort if dump points make my husband not want to go back but other then that we had a great time

Fantastic caravan park. It was very clean and well represented with great camp kitchen.
Close to all attractions.
If I have one criticism,  the wifi wasn't working the best over the weekend I was there, but all in all
lovely place to stay.
Great little park thanks for having us

We only stayed one night but found the park to be a quiet friendly place to stay. Amenities are clean up to date. Its only a short walk to the Piero a sight see, then another short walk to a plethora of eateries and coffee shops.
Will definitely stop in again.
Nice park with friendly staff. Up to date amenities
Nice clean and tidy caravan park, nice clean modern amenities a bit on the expensive side, but can't complain about the quality. Would visit again someday.
Very clean. Nice park
不错的地方，距离jetty很近，钓鱼特别方便

Lovely park, great amenities, great location and friendly staff. Someone has decided to plant trees up beside the roadways so as it is very difficult to get in and out of your site, so we won't be back.

Clean and open. Nice breeze and views. Excellent amenities and the staff were great. Great location with many food options and a pub within easy walk. Some traffic noise when the twits play and some lorikeets at dusk. It didn't dampen our stay. We'll be back for sure.

Mühsam, die Reception ist am Wochenende nicht besetzt.. da muss man sich 15 Minuten Seitenweise durch irgendwelche allgemeinen Geschäftsbedingungen klicken, teilweise noch im Bezug auf Corona (Hallo?!?) um dann irgendwann mal zu erfahren, das der Platz ausgebucht sei, obwohl noch Dutzende Plätze leer sind. Kundenfreundlichkeit geht anders.
We’ve been coming here for a couple of years and love it. Park is well kept, amenities are immaculate and Jess & Darren who run the park are ace Highly recommended 👍😎

Fantastic van park with easy access to the beach.
Park managers Jess & Darren are very friendly and do an excellent job and keeping the park, amenities and camp kitchen clean.  I had a beachfront site and it felt so private and relaxing.  I will definitely be coming back again.
Beautiful beachfront location, good amenities, great Wi-Fi, close to restaurants. A little piece of paradise.

Park Manager needs to go, attempted to be rude to me in front of my wife and child. didn't identify himself and i think he was trying to intimidate me somehow, either way, didn't do a good job of it. Tried enforcing rules on to me, although was happy to let others break the same rules and do nothing about it. This is why i prefer off grid. This place would do much better with new management.

Great place.   Right on the beach front, it’s lovely to go to sleep hearing the waves roll ashore.  The ammenities blocks are super clean and a great design.  The awesome lady at the front counter was also super friendly and welcoming.  Just what I needed after a long drive.  You won’t be disappointed if you choose to stay here.
Sehr schöner Camping Platz mit sauberen modernen Anlagen und sehr freundlichem Personal. Kann man auf jeden Fall empfehlen.
Great location and modern ammenities

This newly renovated caravan park was such a surprise with direct beach access. Large grassed sites with concrete pad and water views. Amenities were clean, secure and even though amenities are shared each private bathroom with shower, toilet and sink was a nice surprise. Scarness is a great central location to restaurants, water park, bike paths and shops. The park managers and relief managers were all very knowledgeable and lovely to talk to. We loved our 5 day stay so much that we even extended our stay. Will definitely be back.

Location isn't bad but the managers are unfriendly and difficult to deal with. Lots of rules and regulations to simply setup up camp. They insist on directing you van into site. It has to be parked to the cm.  For what reason, I have no idea. They directed the couples van we were with into a pole when reversing and just ignored it.  Why people like this are in hospitality amazes me.  Definitely go elsewhere.

Just stepped in to enquire about facilities and the manager was quite rude…

Thought Harvey Bay was way better than that .

Cheers

A Beautiful park, close to everything with beach access and good size blocks for the perfect holiday. What makes this park a home away from home are the managers Jess & Darren. They work so hard to keep the park well maintained and clean and they are welcoming and very supportive. We have stayed in many parks from Victoria to Queensland and have never experienced such a fantastic management team. We will return again soon, thanks to Jess & Darren.

Ein sehr gepflegter, grosszügiger Campingplatz mit direktem Zugang zum Strand. Die Sanitäranlagen sind modern, neu und sauber. Das Managerpaar ist super freundlich und äusserst hilfsbereit. Sollten wir wieder nach Hervey Bay zurückkommen, würden wir wieder diesen Campingplatz wählen.
Great clean park, plenty of space between sites. Great management team, friendly and helpful
Great place to stay will be going back again

It’s a amazing place to relax, enjoying the city and the beach. The staff are amazing and really helpful. The internet is so fast, since I’m working online this was really amazing!
I had to leave but would’ve extended my stay 100%
Clean, quiet nice view, great place to relax and kick back.
Very friendly & close to everything

Our 2nd visit to this caravan park and loved it both times. The managers Jess and Darren are fantastic and very friendly, gave us the best sea view pitch and they keep the ammenaties in immaculate condition. It is very central and we cycled every day (it is all nice and flat 😍). We will be back!
Perfectly clean and friendly staff
Awesome caravan park, new refurbished facilities and close to the beach. Definitely will stay there again.
Excellent caravan park, good facilities.
Awesome but must book to be sure of a table in the mornings
Beautiful Caravan Park. Very friendly and clean.

Great caravan park in a perfect Esplanade location. Amenities and camp kitchen are always spotless, and the grounds are well maintained with lovely grassed areas. Shops are within walking distance, and caravan sites are easy to access. The friendly site managers, Jess and Darren, are incredibly helpful and make you feel welcome. Tours can also be conveniently booked at reception. Highly recommend!
Very friendly and helpful staff. Nice, new clean facilities.  Concrete slab and full grass on sites.  Very easy access straight onto the beach.  Beautiful!
Good facilities, easy beach access, some road noise.
Had a wonderful 10 days here in early July 2025 , nicely laid out , great sites , we were beachfront , nice new clean amenities , helpful staff look forward to staying again

The people running this place are miserable and not very friendly.

Road noise is bad Friday and Saturday nights.

Other than that everything else was pretty good.
Welcoming and helpful, thank you!
Great location & great set up & facilities.  Will be back!
Great place to stay clean & tidey

What a beautiful park. Very relaxing & peaceful. Easy to back onto sites, nice & spacious. Amenities blocks very clean with your own shower, toilet & change area. A few caravan parks are starting to use this set up. Definitely will stay here again. Close to cafes, restaurants.

Scarness Caravan Park has been a fantastic stay !! Darren has been so helpful for a solo traveller backing onto the site. He has happily answered all my questions about power hook up. The amenities are very clean and all utilities full:- paper towels, soaps, toilet paper etc. The camp kitchen ever so spotless clean. All electric appliances working. He is very friendly even after a long week and the ever late check-ins. My first caravan park stay in my new motor home was excellent!!

This is a well looked after park. Spotless and modern amenities. (could do with an extra hook or 2 in shower cubicle) Top camp kitchen.  Washers/dryers plentiful and $4 a pop....fantastic..on the beach and opposite mini mart and abundance of eateries.

Other reviews correctly mention the beachfront location, good facilities, clean amenities, and good size sites....

What they DON'T mention is the high security risk and the CONSTANT traffic noise at all hours!

This is also the first park in 3 years of travelling Australia that has immediately given me a written "Lock it up or lose it" note!
🤔
Unusual perhaps? - No!! .. not when you take into account that they DON'T have an entrance boom-gate (or anything similar!) and lots of passing pedestrian/bike/scooter traffic..
Other campers warned me not to leave my e-bikes out - irrespective of them being locked! ... and one older guest actually parked his mobility trike inside the secured toilet/shower block overnight!
😬

The traffic noise rarely lets up, and there seems to be a competition amongst the locals to see who has the loudest exhaust!!

So ... you've been warned!!

Yes, it's arguably the nicest caravan park on the Esplenade... but bring your earplugs and padlocks!

Returned here to this beautiful park . Friendliest managers we have come across on our trip . So Happy &  helpful.   Thanks Kay & Phil you are really two beautiful people,  this world could do with more like you . We will be back again . Oh yes ! Great location ,  the park is also close to restaurants,  pub,  coffee shops .

Sehr schöner und neuer Campingplatz direkt beim Strand. Die Stellplätze sind groß und das Gelände gepflegt. Die Waschräume sind sauber und groß. Wäsche waschen und trocknen kostet jeweils 4$ und kann mit Karte gezahlt werden.
Very nice spot maybe 50 Metres to  water very tidy  And clean
Very good, Nice

I was really impressed with this waterfront caravan park! The refurbished amenities were spotless, and the well-maintained grounds were just as impressive. The check-in process was quick and easy, and the location is fantastic. Highly recommend!
Clean and tidy sites. Friendly care takers. Highly recommend
Really really good park, had a great time. No issues at all.

Einer der schönsten Campingplätze auf unserem Trip entlang der Ostküste. Die Anlage wurde nagelneu renoviert, die Sanitäranlagen sind top. Man hat quasi ein eigenes Bad mit Dusche und Toilette. Die Lage direkt am Strand könnte nicht schöner sein. Hier lassen sich Sonnenauf- und Sonnenuntergang erleben. Auch nette Restaurants und kleine Shops sind gleich um die Ecke. Einziges Manko: der Platz liegt langgestreckt zwischen Strasse und Strand, so dass sich Verkehrslärm kaum vermeiden lässt. Deshalb unbedingt einen Platz direkt am Meer frühzeitig reservieren. Die Plätze an der Straße sind weniger attraktiv.
Didn't stay was only visiting

Friendly reception, amenities are exceptional, ocean frontage, spacious sites, beautiful kitchens, all very good.
The only thing it lacks is shade.
Can absolutely recommend. !!

This is a great camp, good location.2024 when we stayed for several weeks, could not fault this camp, every thing was up to scratch.
BUT 2025 when we were here for several weeks again.
Sorry to say sooo disappointed to see the grounds weren't maintained, could not see the gardens for weeds, plus the edges had never been whipper snipped as grass had grown over them. The concrete edges you could not see for over grown grass. Caravan concrete slabs there was about 3 inches of grass growing over ours. I'm afraid the relieving manager needs some good old fashioned training on how to keep grounds. It's not about putting your bum on a mower and and whipping around a site and mowing over the edge's thinking that will do. Get your whipper snipper out and do things properly, that's what makes a place stand out.
Never once did we see this being done. Don't say you don't have time... You didn't put a 8 hour day in the grounds. Recycling bottle bin was over flowing for 3 days..
Not acceptable for a camp.
Spiders and cobwebs in the corners of amenities. Maybe cleaners need more time for the extra bits.
Don't let this new camp go backwards.
Bring back Phil and Kate.

Had walked into the front entrance to see how busy it was before booking when we were approached by a worker. He asked what we were doing and when we said what we were doing the worker proceeded to point at all the cameras watching us around the site and said if we had any questions we were to go straight to reception. Absolutely disgusting attitude after we were just about to book a site for the night and we were treated intruders from the first encounter. There was no gates stopping anyone from walking in and we were simply getting a feel for the site before booking.
Redevelopment in progress

Very disappointed with the week we spent at this park particularly how much you pay for a beachfront site. No views and no assistance from management after requesting a different site. When requesting a different site we mentioned that we were not happy and when making the booking over the phone she should have told us that there was no view as we would have chosen a different site. Her response was “we have only been here a few weeks and not been out in the park to know about the sites” Seriously if you are going to manage a park the first thing would be to make yourself familiar with the layout of the sites. Maintenance is poor with bins overflowing, marks on walls in amenities, weeds in garden beds. Given that this park has been recently updated the upkeep is not happening from the management.
Großartiger campground, gaaaanz liebe Manager!!! Amenities first class, sites groß und rein, direkt an der Esplanade... Besser geht es nicht!

Best spot to camp in Hervey bay. New facilities and beach front.
Price is higher than others but worth it! Most things walking distance away with a convenience store over the road along with several restaurants and cafes.

I definitely enjoyed my stayed here! Not the cheapest but pretty worth for the clean toilets & shower & even a kitchen with tables & chairs!

Chose the space nearest to the bay & it was $66 but its probably pricey cause its hols season. Theres a stretch of restaurants just opposite this place.

Hervey Bay’s premier beachfront caravan park ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This park has benefited from a major refurbishment and now boasts fabulous facilities along with an awesome location 🏖️

All sites are level with ample space between, new concrete single slabs, new lighting and utility posts

All amenities are new and generously outfitted while the location is just perfect 👌

North facing Scarness Beach on one side and a generous variety of Esplanade cafes, restaurants, hotel, grocery store and news agent, among others, across the street 👍

You don’t even have to bring a car as there’s a 50 cent council bus stop right outside 🚌

We found the staff to be great to book with and friendly & helpful during our stay ❤️
It would seem it’s a nice place. The couple running the park would have to be the least suited individuals I’ve had the displeasure of dealing with to be running such a park.

Of the parks along the esplanade this place was the pick. Staff were very friendly and the park is very quiet, albeit the late night car races and wanna be speed kings on the road  . Amenities are the best I have seen for a long time. Big dining area, big kitchen, showers and toilets are spotless, with the exception of that one person, that can read a sign.
Beach is pretty much on ya door step and the sea breeze kept it rather cool.
Dont come here if you want to run amok at night. It is an older crowd and I would say by 8.30pm at night, most are tucked up in the vans.
Would highly recommend this place to anyone.
Wonderful staff, great facilities, close to restaurants and bars.
Beautiful park, lovely green grass & slabbed sites. Park is right on the water. Amenities are new and immaculate.
Very nice well cared for. Great position.

We have spent several nights here over 2 trips, can't speak highly enough of this park, it is well managed, the facilities are modern, clean and well maintained and the location is 5 star you won't get a better beach front site at the price. The Management is always attentive and willing to assist with your needs.
Parfait, gérant très sympathique et à l’écoute. Douche et cuisine très propre. Emplacement en face à même pas 10 mètres de la plage, je conseil fortement
Lovely spot, quiet area but plenty of services, shops, coffee, pub, petrol nearby. And the views are pretty nice too. Friendly team and very clean facilities.
Very nice park. Friendly staff. And very clean.
Really nice spot , handy to shops and dinning , older amenities but very clean , friendly staff , excellent price for powered sites
Friendly Staff. Great position. Right on the beach. Good walking spots. Close to shops.

Un camping avec un emplacement incroyable ! Un service vraiment parfait !! Avec toutes les commodités |D’une grande propreté  !! Et je voudrais encore remercier pour l’accueil et la gentillesse des propriétaires une dame chaleureuse et généreuse |Je recommande vraiment cet endroit vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés
We have Torquay Beachfront caravan part its very clean and well maintained we can't wait to go back next year. 🙂

We stayed on a beach front site and it was absolutely beautiful. The facilities were clean and worked well. Shops, cafes and restaurants as well as the beach are all a stones throw away. It is right next to a road so you get some road noise but other than that it is an excellent spot to camp.

Outstanding!!!|Rocked in a camper van without a booking and snagged a powered site right on the beach. Waking up to the waves was perfect.|Site manager even offered to lock our e-bikes up in the equipment shed for added security.|The park is on a perfect part of Torquay Beach and the amenities were spotless.|Highly recommended!
Thoroughly enjoying our two weeks here in our van. Such a great spot and the managers do such a great job.

Lovely spot right on the beach
Wake up to the waves crashing at the shore
Good access to the Esplanade shops and markets
Great walking track along the esplanade

Torquay Hervey Bay...Beautiful clean park. Beach front.  No roads to cross. Clean facilities including camp kitchen and laundry. Very friendly, approachable Management who help park vans if required. Basic no frills 70s park. Just wonderful for a relaxing holiday.
3rd revisit to this great park. I’ll be back for a 4th!|Location is perfect. A hop skip & a jump to the beach  A+
Clean and tidy amenities. Centrally located on Esplanade. The sound of birds and shore break to wake up to each morning. It doesn't get much better than that.

Fantastic park with absolute beachfront and beautiful beach to swim in, facilities clean, staff extremely friendly !!! Great location away from the busy part of Hervey Bay , local foodworks walking distance and great bike tracks!!!

We had a lovely 5 night stay in this absolute beachfront caravan park. We swam in the calm ocean every day. While the park is old it is well kept and clean. Shops just across the road and a nice pub with great food 2 blocks away. Some hoon traffic about 9pm most nights but it didn't last too long.

What a beautiful park!  Right on the beach as well! It was so relaxing and quiet and direct access to the beach. Exactly what I was looking for. |The Park Managers and really friendly and helpful. They were able to accommodate an extra night for us at the last minute which I am very thankful for. They also keep the park and amenities in great condition. The kitchen areas and bathroom were pleasant to use. |I am already planning my next stay there.
A lovely park right on the beach. The facilities are cleaned daily and are clean. The staff and manager are all very friendly and helpful.

Great location, friendly staff and facilities. BBQ pavilion easily accomodates multiple groups and is cleaned daily, great facilities- common fridge, microwave, kettle, toaster etc. Walking distance to shore, shops and mini golf. The park   are putting in more cabins. Will come back again as a base to explore Fraser Is by jetski

Great park friendly staff, the managers are fantastic people. Dogs allowed if you're in a caravan/camper/tent but not the cabins.
They are building more cabins atm just about finished.
There's a games room for kids two pools and jumping pillow.
Awesome vibe in this park! Super grateful to have an ensuite site at such short notice. The lovely staff member went above & beyond for us to make this happen. Thank you.
I stayed in the safari tent. Just perfect.  Bed was so comfy, furnishings were great. Wish I was booked in for longer .....
Smaller type park but th facilitied are clean and modern. Plus the showers are big with ultra hot xater.  The sites are good sized and the shops, beach and pub 3 blocks away.

Abbiamo dormito qui due notti non consecutive. Entrambe le volte il bungalow era in buone condizioni, cucina con detersivo e spugna per i piatti e stoviglie varie. Wifi molto debole in tutte le diverse zone del campeggio dove abbiamo dormito. Orari della reception molto limitati - si trova qualcuno solo tra le 9 e le 17. Il check in fuori orario viene gestito tramite una cassetta di sicurezza all'entrata dove sono riposte le chiavi e le informazioni necessarie (mappa campeggio ecc). Fino a qui tutto bene, se non fosse che il codice per aprire la cassetta viene inviato via sms ma solo se il tuo numero è australiano, ma lo abbiamo scoperto solo in un secondo momento. Noi infatti non lo avevamo ricevuto e non siamo subito riusciti ad accedere alla struttura. Abbiamo avuto fortuna perche in quel momento una dei responsabili stava uscendo dal campeggio per una passeggiata e ci ha detto a voce il codice...sarebbe bastato inviare una semplice mail. Per il resto l'esperienza è stata positiva!
Had 6 days over Easter in a cabin every thing was great. Cabin vert clean

Good rooms. The single beds a bit on the small side. Nice location. Very secure. Key fobs in and out. Lots of wildlife. Turtles, eels and water fowl in the lake. Ghekos above the door at night keep the insects down.
Only one functioning BBQ area that is super filthy and lots of construction.

Wir hatten einen Rasenplatz mit Stromanschluss. Hervey Bay hat uns gut gefallen. Wir haben beschlossen eine zweite Nacht zu bleiben.  Diesmal nahmen wir einen Platz mit WC und Dusche: perfekt. In der Rezeption wurden wir freundlich und kompetent behandelt. Wir bekamen Tipps für die Stadt. Die sanitären Einrichtungen sowie der Pool waren in einem sehr sauberen Zustand. Alles war ordentlich.  Selbst die Arbeiter,  die hier arbeiteten waren sehr rücksichtsvoll.
Wir bekamen sogar Futter um die Schildkröten zu füttern. Der gesamte Platz war sehr ruhig. Und die Preise waren nicht so teuer. Nun geht unsere Reise weiter. Leider können wir nicht mehr hierher kommen.  Bald müssen wir nach Deutschland zurück.
Best regards

Although the facilities were adequate there were two issues that were very annoying:
1. The non-stop from dawn 'til dusk noise from a flock of pigeons which constantly & completely dominated all other sounds.  Not a peaceful stay at all.
2. Wifi was slow and unreliable.
So, if you want any kind of peace don't stay there (or take ear-muffs!)  and don't rely on good park Wifi.

This is our 6th visit to this great holiday park, and it won't be our last.  They are continually upgrading the park and facilities to make it the best in Hervey Bay.  Lots of staff always on site, cleaning, gardening, performing maintenance, etc.  Reception staff are friendly and helpful.  Onsite cabins are clean and well presented.  Swimming pool is always clean and tidy.

We had a wonderful camping stay at Discovery Parks - Hervey Bay. The amenities were spotless and very well maintained, which always makes such a difference when camping. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming — both in the office and around the grounds — and nothing was too much trouble.

The pool was sparkling clean and so inviting. It was reassuring to see staff checking the water several times a day, showing how much they care about guests’ comfort and safety. The camp kitchen was lovely and welcoming, making it easy to relax and enjoy meals.

The location is fantastic too — close to the beach and within easy reach of food and drink options. We would happily stay again!
Nice and quiet cabin was very clean and comfortable
Great location at a reasonable price and friendly staff.
Great spot
Great park, fantastic location, best park in town

Made a booking and was told that we had beachfront. Arrived at the park & was told it wasn’t available anymore & happy to refund our money. After driving all day didn’t feel like finding another caravan park at 5pm. Said we would stay the night & head off in morning & we would have a refund. Only refunded partial of the extra. Disappointing 😌
Currently staying in the park and the amenities are next level amazing . Also so close to alot of restaurants, cafes pubs and clubs.
Very rude staff very regimented

We had an absolutely amazing stay. The site location was perfection, clean and flat. The new amenities are superior and clean and it was quiet with the birds waking you up for the morning. Highly recommend
Lovely check in staff! Very clean facilities and they have security during the night. Would definitely recommend to anyone.
The managers Phil and Kay were very helpful and professional during our stay. The park is kept immaculate, the only downside is the shower layout design. Overall we loved the place!

Fantastic Stay at Scarness Caravan Park -
We recently stayed at Scarness Caravan Park and couldn’t be happier with our experience. The park managers, Phil and Kay, were incredibly friendly and helpful. Kay was especially kind, assisting us in backing into our site. Not only does she keep the park spotless, but she is also continuously busy with maintenance, ensuring everything is in perfect condition, while at the same time,  being happy to stop for a pleasant chat, which added a personal touch to our stay.

The park itself boasts a beautiful beach front position in the heart of Hervey Bay,  with direct access shops and to a wide range of places to eat. There are generously sized blocks, and modern unisex amenities that are a spotlessly clean. Additionally, the shared outdoor kitchen is modern and clean, equipped with everything needed for a great meal outdoors.

We thoroughly enjoyed our time at Scarness Caravan Park and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a well-maintained and friendly place to stay. Whether you're here for a night or a longer holiday, Phil and Kay will make sure you feel right at home!
Great caravan park

Lovely spic and span and newly renovated. If anything a little clinical. Right on the beach. Amenities new and in a style we haven’t encountered, all individual unisex rooms. No issues with theft, just put valuable stuff away, which is a common theme with reviews of the foreshore parks. The sites are a reasonable size for a large van  but can be a bit tight to get in to as some of the new trees have been badly positioned. Its located across the road from some shops which is handy. The beach front sites are nice but if you cant get one the others are fine. Beautiful well appointed camp kitchen.
Sehr sauber, direkt am Strand, normale Preise, wenn man bedenkt, dass dies hier ein Topreiseziel ist.

This place is completely new and clean!
The beach was amazing and we really enjoyed the park here!

On top of it we had an issue with our RV and the owners were so kind - they let us come back after our check out and have our RV fixed in the park free of charge 🙏🏻 so grateful!

We stayed here 3 nights while visiting Fraser Island. Excellent location, very friendly staff and the installations were very nice and clean as well.

Amazing view to the beach and if you like running, this place is just next to the Esplanade that has a very long trail across the Coast.

We also dine at an Indian restaurant across the street from the Campground, was really nice and is very close to a Mini Market, ideal to buy last minute needs
Impeccable site. Extremely well maintained grounds and clean, modern amenities. We'll definitely be coming back.
Can’t be a good park if they don’t allow pets.
Great park. Quiet and on the beach. All newly renovated.
Amazing location, lovely and accomodating staff. Family friendly, beautiful new facilities. Came back to stay twice, would highly recommend!

We had an AWESOME TIME at Scarness Beachfront Tourist Park camping for 8 days. The amenities were cleaned every day and the park managers were wonderful and very kind always waved as they went past or just to stop and  chat.  All areas of the park were cleaned very say. All the camper were well behaved. All up I would give the Park a 10 out of 10. I really could not fault them. I will be more than happy to recommend this park to everyone I know.
Thank you so much.

We stayed a week at Discovery Parks – Torquay on Fraser Street and had a great experience. We asked to be located close to the jumping pillow and pool, and this was accommodated with pleasure.

The pool was fantastic and kept at a very comfortable temperature. The games room is dated but very well equipped. Our daughter loved learning how to play ping pong and spending time on the jumping pillow.

The ensuite was very clean and well stocked.

Staff were genuinely lovely throughout our stay.

Great location and close to the beaches.
Amazing place to relax. Staff are very friendly. We will definitely be back 🙂
Loved it, well looked after park and very clean.

Beautiful Park. Upon entry Friendly Staff. Clean. Well maintained landscape. Lake is an amazing bonus with the turtles. So much to do on the grounds for kids and adults alike with tennis, basketball hoop, games room, the 2 pools, jumping pillow, feeding the turtles and ducks and carts. The grounds kitchen is amazing, well equipped and again very clean. Close proximity to the boulevard (4-minute walk) Thankyou :)
We've been coming here for 3 years and we've always had a great time!! The staff are very friendly. We'll keep coming back as often as we can!! Thank you so much

Wow, wow, wow. This place is huge! Our site was amazing (being opposite amenities and pool at the rear of the park past the lake crossing) and very clean. We stayed for 8 nights over Christmas and New year. There was heaps for the kids to do including kids club and ample space to ride bikes. Park staff provided movie nights, breakfast gatherings and lots of other fun activities. The lake that runs through the park is home to ducks, turtles, eels and fish which reception have free food to feed them. We were very comfortable during our stay and would come back without hesitation. Thanks for a wonderful stay everyone!
Schöner Wohnmobil Park
Brilliant!

Fraser St Hervey Bay, one of the nicest parks we have stayed at in our 8 months of travels. Perfect setting close to Esplanade, cafes and restaurants. Staff are amazing and so helpful. Grounds with green grass for your poops and ensuite sites are a plus
sehr schöne, gutlegene Anlage. saubere, grossräumige Bungalows,mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht, WLan nicht zu gebrauchen, aber für einen Campingplatz vielleicht auch noch unbedingt notwendig

The staff in the office and ground staff are so friendly and welcoming. The park is very secure and safe, we stayed on an ensuite site 10 out of 10, the grounds are kept beautifully, it has a lagoon with heaps of turtles and fish that kids can feed(the feed is free from the office) the amenities are spotless, the 2 pools are beautiful, the park is 250m to the waterfront, cafe's, supermarkets etc. Honestly one of the best holiday parks we have stayed at on our journey up and down the east coast since leaving home in Fingal bay in April this year and its pet friendly. We will be recommending 💯 this holiday park to friends and other travellers, thank you so much for our stay at Discovery park Fraser St Hervey Bay.we will most certainly be back to stay here. Congratulations to all staff members, keep up the great work.
Walking distance to the beach and shops (pub & icecream shop).Only thing that would make caravan Park better is having double concrete slab.

Wife and I wanted a few days away from home and chose this resort as it had 'glamping' accommodation,  which we'd like to try.
The staff were really nice,  even saw we were lost looking for our room and came and showed us the way.
The 'glamp' was incredible  ... bed sooo comfortable,  the ensuite spotless and well appointed with body wash and shampoo dispensers, and the location was great, overlooking a pond, with masses of turtles and water birds.The variety of birdlife was incredible too, some very tame and sat on the rail hoping for a tidbit of food.

One thing which impressed us was the "ensuite blocks', which were assigned to each caravan location, rather than the usual communal showers and toilets.

Overall, we'd recommend this resort to anyone, especially families, as there is ample to keep kids occupied in this secure environment.
Congratulations and well done!!!
Lovely park in a beautiful location. We could pop to the beach, restaurants and shops so easily. The amenities were good and secure and safe as well.

★★★★★ (Feels like 6 ⭐️)

We honestly couldn’t have asked for a better stay at Fraser Coast Beachfront Tourist Park. The husband and wife managers are absolute legends — genuine, welcoming and they go above and beyond to make sure your stay is not just comfortable but truly special. Nothing was too much trouble and you can tell they genuinely care about their guests.

The park itself is fantastic. Beautifully maintained, spotless and well laid out. The amenities are exceptionally clean and modern, and everything is kept in top condition. It’s clear there’s real pride in the place.

The location is perfect — close to great local restaurants, shops and everything you need, while still offering a relaxed beachfront atmosphere.

We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this park to anyone visiting the Fraser Coast, and we would stay again in a heartbeat. We also wouldn’t hesitate to recommend the current park managers for any position they choose to pursue — their professionalism, work ethic and genuine care for guests are outstanding.

Five stars isn’t enough — this was a six-star experience for us.

We have stayed at this tourist park twice in 4 years. Whenever we come to Hervey Bay, it just hits the spot right. The space on the caravan spots are generous, the amenities are always kept clean and have everything you need. You are a hop, skip and jump away from the beautiful beach and a short walk from Torquay jetty to have a fish! Thank you for always having us :)
Nice Place. Amenities a bit dated, however well maintained and clean. Great position, walk down the stairs and you are on the beach.|We will return
Great little tourist park, right on the water.  Kids loved having the beach straight outside their camper. Friendly managers, clean, tidy amenities.

Great campsite with clean amenities. The sites are quite large. It’s very convenient if you’ve booked a day trip to Fraser Island, as there is a bus stop where the Fraser Island companies usually pick people up.

Positiiviset:
- Rauhallinen ja viihtyisä ympäristö
- Kahviloita lähellä
- Oma puhdas ranta
- Hiljainen yöllä

Negatiiviset:
- WC tiloissa oli virtsan haju
Love this caravan park + Megan and Justin are super nice and helpful! Will be back

Great location, absolute beach front and close to the shops and restaurants. The park and amenities are clean and the staff are free. It's a great spot for a bike ride or a paddle or an easy swim. Just ensure you lock your bikes up with a good chain. Inspire of that we will be back for another stay in the new year.
Love the simplicity of the park, great views and breeze and clean
Ending up staying for 4 weeks,  it was fantastic, pool, spa, staff were fantastic
Very nice location with friendly helpful staff. Highly recommended.

Since the rebuild the sites are quite large. Enough room for a large van, awning and parking beside the awning, still with room around you. Roads are very wide to allow easy van backing. Toilet/showers/handbasin are combined in one room as ensuite arrangement. Large number in two locations. Very well kept green lawns and a good number of trees planted - still need another 5 years to get to full size. Shops and eateries accross the road.

Camping die erg vol wordt gezet, campers en caravans staan hutje mutje met nauwelijks ruimte ertussen. Weinig privacy. Sanitair is ok, maar erg verouderd. Ruimte om even je tanden te poetsen, is, net als de kampeerplaatsen, erg klein. Locatie is top, direct aan zee, met restaurants voor ieder budget binnen loopafstand.
We visit every year, always wonderful friendly staff, we are lucky enough to get a Beach side position,  lots of restaurants, takeaway and amenities close by

Recently stayed here - beachfront - and wow what a view to get up to each morning.  The park and facilities were clean.  The staff were lovely.  Campers were friendly.  Handy for  shops, pub and restaurants.
If we had one downside it was the hooners along the 40 km esplanade and not a police officer in sight.
They're still renovating will be breathtaking when finished

Stayed 4 days at this park 2 weeks  ago  and had the worst  experience  by the management  ever in 30 years  of  camping...started  with  day of arrival  and went  to office  to check  in and  was told  that i was early,  25 minutes  to be exact and as it started  to rain  i asked  if it  would  be ok to stax hitched  on a grassed  area  thst was not open  to camping  but nothing  there  and  was told  to come back in an hour  which  was past the stated  arrival  time...came  back  after  driving  around  to park  for  an hour  killing  time  then he wanted  to guide  us onto  our site which  took  20 minutes  of telling  my husband go forward    no go back,
turn your  wheel  this way ubby  has been has been  parking  our caravans  for 30 years  and only  takes a few minutes normally. This guy  had  no idea. Next the wife comes  and tells  us to move our car further  away  from  our awning and continued  to harass us daily  and when  on our last  day i moved our car around  the back  of our van  which  was  within  our site  she told  us we need  to move  it as it gets  boggy there and hub looks  up to a blue sky on a sunny  day with  no rain  predicted and we said  ok bit we'll  be going  out shortly  so it will  be moved  then...nect she comes  back  and tells us shehas put a mark  against  our name  as they have  to  cover  their  backs... neighbours  who  heard  all the harassment  came and said  they'd  had marks  against  their  name  too...omg they do not deserve  to  be managers put an absolute  damper on what had been  a wonderful  couple  of weeks  travelling  around...never will  go back  ther again  if they get the job of managing the new park when  finished 🙄

Strict managers but understand why. Not much in the way of amenities however we knew that when we booked. The ladies had 1 shower working and waited 4 mins for hot water. They unexpectedly closed the Mens toilets??? Cheap enough.

Only stayed two nights, should have stayed at two weeks!!!
Very comfortable, clean and a well run caravan park.
Kay was always helpful and made our stay one that we will remember for her courtesy and  efficiency.
Would always recommend stopping here to our friends and family.

Great all round. We’re regulars and the whole place is spotless all the time. Managers Are always friendly and helpful and keep a general eye on security in the park.  Yesterday’s sunset from beachfront!
Recomanded

Loved the proximity to the main Esplanade and the quiet of this caravan park with its trees and lagoon. It is beautifully kept even when very busy
We enjoyed an ensuite site, the ensuite was modern and clean. Great camp kitchen.
The manager, Amanda, and her team were extremely friendly and helpful. They supported us during a medical emergency and checked in to make sure we were OK during the rest of our stay. Other guests were also very friendly.
We highly recommend this caravan park and look forward to our next visit

Review Discovery Parks - Fraser Street, Hervey Bay

Initial Booking Process
The quality of the service itself was unparalleled from the initial booking enquire to the handing back of the key. Each aspect of our booking and was handled with the utmost care and attention to detail. It was evident that the team was highly skilled and knowledgeable, ensuring that everything was completed to the highest standard.
Service Quality
The timeliness of the service was a highlight. Every goal was met promptly, and communication was maintained throughout our prolonged stay, keeping me informed at every stage. This dedication to punctuality and transparency was deeply appreciated.
The general condition of the park and the facilities is outstanding. The attention to detail makes your stay a very pleasant experience knowing that all WHS areas have been addressed to ensure that you and your family have a safe and incident free holiday.
Customer Support
The customer support provided was exceptional. Any concerns or inquiries I had were addressed swiftly and thoroughly. The support team was always available, and their problem-solving abilities were impressive, ensuring that any issue was resolved efficiently. The staff’s assistance to guests was above and beyond in all areas from assistance with positioning caravans, arranging surprise birthdays, anniversaries and funding raising activities. Also with general information and support with local maintenance providers for vehicles and general local knowledge.
Overall Experience
Overall, my experience was nothing short of fantastic. The combination of a great location a safe environment made for a seamless and enjoyable experience. I would highly recommend this facility to anyone seeking excellence in their family or private getaway.
Thank you for delivering such outstanding service. It truly made a difference.

We booked direct with the park and found this to be great value.   Very pleasant staff on arrival and through stay.  We stayed in Feb this year and upgrades have been done since  we look forward to another stay booked in December.  The cabins are very quiet and pleasant by the lake.  A very clean park and cabin and an easy walk to facilities and shopping at the beach. A short drive to marina etc.  well run park and good value

We had a lovely holiday at the Fraser Street Discovery Park in January and stayed in a cabin. The cabin was spotless.
The staff in the park were very friendly and helpful. We enjoyed it so much we have booked in for another two weeks at the end of the year.

We stayed in an ensuite site in our caravan. What an amazing time we've had. The luxurious touch of the Ink & Water brand range of toiletries in 500ml bottles is amazing, not even those tiny hotel bottles. I've thoroughly enjoyed my showers under the waterfall shower roses, in the nicely refurbished ensuites. Discovery Hervey Bay you rock! Your staff is incredibly friendly and helpful, the park is well located, clean and well set out and affordably priced. We will definitely be back. Thank you so very much for making our stay feel like a high end luxury resort.

Well equipped park, nice clean kitchen area and several bathrooms. Also has a few swimming pools.
The kitchen was surprisingly clean and well equipped.
On a negative note, one of the reception ladies was quite rude and wouldn't give us change for the washing machine that only that coins and not card. It was 17:14, yes they close at 17.00hr reception but she was still there and could have changed up a 10 dollar bill for the customer to be able to spend money and wash some laundry! Instead ignored the customer and then said, no, come back tomorrow at 9am. We were departing at 7am. So thanks.
Other than the miserable staff, the parks pretty good.
Camped 2night Sept 2025 with ensuite.

Fab caravan site. Lots of toilets and showers
Staff were so helpful and friendly
Free turtle feed at reception to feed the turtles
Good sized camp kitchen
Good sized site
Good location

We stayed in a two bedroom deluxe cabin for two nights. Good experience overall - comfortable bed, good shower, quiet location near the back of the park. Good kitchen set up, also appreciated the in-cabin washing machine so that we could get some laundry done. The park has good security, requiring a fob to get in and I understand the gates are shut at night. A 5 minute walk to the local shops and restaurants. Parking is a bit tight but would be OK if you drive a small car.

Super sauberer Platz, gut in der Nähe vom Strand gelegen. Freundliches und nettes Personal rundum zufrieden. Zimmer ohne Bewertung wir waren mit dem Camper da. Wahltouren sind zwischen Juni und Oktober zu empfehlen
Just wanted to say a very big thank you to ANA. Always smiling and willing to help in any way she can. David and Heather

Price is most affordable if you go directly through the website.
Customer service 10/10. The person at the front desk that greeted us was so incredibly lovely, so were the other staff on the grounds.
The villa was easy to find, and parking was on site. The room was fresh and inviting. Lots of windows that allow great air flow. The rooms don't smell, the linen is clean, the bed is soft and comfortable. Great playground, jumping pillow and pool for the kids. Plenty of nature around and the beach is walking distance. I wish I could stay more than one night. I'll book a week next time. Oh, and the holiday park is busy but some how very quiet. Despite being full, you would think you had your own private property 5pm onward.

We chose this campground in Hervey Bay because it is a beautiful area, perfect as a base for whale watching and also to take a day to relax. Overall, the location is lovely and we enjoyed our stay. However, there are some points worth mentioning.
The price was one of the highest we paid on our trip from Cairns down to Brisbane, but the sites were relatively small and the access roads quite narrow. We saw a caravan struggling for half an hour to park, because his access was blocked by scaffolding that had been put up for ongoing construction work.During our stay, there was construction right next to the pool and facilities. On the day we arrived, the noise was extreme, and some of the showers were closed due to previous roof damage. The following day the workers were gone, but the site was still under construction, which meant detours to the kitchen area. Such things happen but we would have been liked to be informed prior to arrival to have the chance to stay somewhere else on our holiday. Another issue was the heavy front gate, which is on a timer. On checkout, the time allowed to open the gate and drop off the key in the box was not enough to drive back through with a campervan. Without help from other campers, we wouldn’t have been able to leave. There was no intercom, phone, or other way to contact reception from the gate, which added to the frustration and left us feeling somewhat “locked in.”
On the positive side, the facilities were clean, if a little dated, and we had a nice shaded site under the palm trees. Still, the overall price-to-value ratio was disappointing. For the cost, we expected more – and unfortunately, that “more” was not delivered.
Great Caravan park right on the water.  Glorious breeze great service 👌

What a great park loved our recent stay even added a  night on the stay
Thanks
Right on the beach, clean and friendly, it was a wonderful place to stay.

This is it , the best place to stay in Hervey Bay,  just don't tell everyone.  It has great amenities and the staff are so friendly and accommodating it feels like my second home . It is close to everything, shops across the rd including a small supermarket if you forgot anything.  Highly recommend 👌

The office was locked when I arrived at 11:30 am. I phoned the contact number shown on the website but I could only leave a voicemail. I've waited for nearly 40 minutes and then left. The office was still closed and my voicemail was returned two hours later. Customer service doesn't exist in this place. I will never return to this caravan park.

We love coming to this park. Its position on the beach, the clean amenities, the friendly and attentive staff are worth the drive and we start to relax as soon as we arrive. Easy sites to get onto and great shops, coffee and parks within easy walk.
Ubicación excelente y servicios. Plazas grandes. Llegamos fuera de la hora de recepción y estaba todo explicado en un sobre. Muy bien
Stayed two nights at this location. Fantastic view of the ocean. Also close to all amenities at the park and the town. Walking distance to the beach and shops.

Great spot host was very helpful
Recommend the lady Elliott tour book through caravan park
Great location right on the beach and very near the Harvey Bay Surflifesaving Club. Clean amenities. Close to shops and restaurants. Popular so try to book early
A great place to stay short stay or longer, close to all cafes restaurants, hotel, waterfront views
Great location.  Tight sites but manager is happy to help

stayed 1 night in June, loved the site & booked that particular site for few days in Aug & paid in full(easy site access,  car parking off rd, less rd noise) the avail dates supplied by management. Arrived & advised that site was taken, offered smaller site at other end of park. Adjacent campers agreed to move their cars so we could get on-site, very tight! We declined, recieved partial refund & drove on. Happy to accept managements right to allocate sites as they want but really feel we should have been advised prior to arrival that someone else wanted that site more than we did & were given it!  We would've happily rebooked when that site was next available if we'd been advised. NOTE to others, common courtesy is a thing of the past & you don't always get what you want/pay for !

Staff were great
Amenities always spotless
Nice Sandy beach
If you get a spot in the front 2 rows, then 5 stars

But the row against the fence, don’t even bother, make sure u confirm which row you are in

Against the fence is 2 metres from the footpath, 3 metres from the road, which must have Qld share of hoons with extremely loud exhausts
Plus the crap from birds and trees on our new awning will take forever to clean.
These sites are so small no room to park your car, and if not for the staff help (Justin I think) I would still be trying to reverse in our van
Right on the waterfront close to the shops. Couldn’t ask for a better location. Perfect for that chill holiday

What a stunning place to stay. My favourite so far on the east coast. Friendly staff, great amenities and right on the beach! We parked up the van and went for a walk on the beach to find dolphins playing right in front of us! Magical. Would definitely recommend.
Would highly recommend. Busy but peaceful.

The staff are extremely friendly, helpful in keeping us posted with what's happening around the place. Ground staff are really friendly always courteous and polite, they do a great job keeping the grounds looking good.
Reception, well both girls are just lovely, polite, very welcoming, friendly at all times, always helpful, they need a pay rise with some of the negative stuff some people throw at them. Keep up the great work girls. We are very happy to be here,  the staff 😀are lovely, this is why we come back. Always look after your staff,  especially in a business like this where they have so much contact with the public.
Housekeeping staff are very friendly, always a smile in place, always very busy, but always time for a chat to.
The managers are really helpful, busy in reception, with check ins and out. Very friendly Amanda and John, thank you for looking after us, nothing was a problem.

We stayed in a superior cabin. It was very spacious, extremely clean and nice comfortable bed. Friendly staff with great facilities throughout the park which were well maintained. The location is fantastic, highly recommend 😊

We booked a site with an ensuite. It was clean and spacious! The place was 100% packed. Sites are well maintained with 2 level pads for the caravan wheels.
I would have rated this park higher if it wasn't for the noisey workers operating grinder, chainsaw, etc.
Caravan site, good size and easy to park.  Amenities very clean,park is very clean.

We did learn not to book a cabin again that had a joining cabin, you can hear your neighbours very clearly!!!!! The cabin itself was great, facilities excellent and the staff were very cheerful and helpful.

A very friendly, clean and handy park close to the esplanade (5 min walk).
Great sites for vans with plenty of space.
En-suite sites also excellent and serviced after 4 days but a change of towels still no issue if needed prior.
Very helpful and happy staff throughout the park.
A pleasure to have stayed here and one that we hope to return to.
Thank you.
Beautiful location work lovely clean rooms. Min was really awesome helping us out of hours with some travel issues we were having.  Thanks so much!

We had incredible service from Min who went out of her way after hours to solve a very botched up itinerary booking elsewhere. She gave us options to put our minds to rest so that we could continue our holiday
Thanks so much Min!!!!

Only had a 1 night stay and booked the day before. Staff went above and beyond to provide me a cabin which suited my needs. Location was perfect, cabin was clean, tidy and had everything needed. Thanks.
We stayed in a Deluxe Cabin, very spacious  couldn't hear outside traffic.  The Discovery Park is great for families.

We've stayed at your very pretty park for 5 years in our caravan, and love this very friendly park.... it's very secure and close to everything. We however could not watch TV hardly ever due to bad reception....the cable didn't help either. The power cut out a few times also...the park needs a booster aerial, as other parks, that we've stayed in have done. Cheers Davia 🤗

With my family we rented 4 safari tents for 2 nights - 11 of us - they were so modern, fresh and comfortable. They were grouped together but not too close and included a grassed area by the lake where we could gather - the grandkids enjoyed the wildlife in the lake and all the other kids activities. The staff were great and assisted with an early check in and late checkout where they could for 2 different cbins.|Recommend them highly and we'll be back.

Stayed 4 nights in July while visiting Hervey Bay. May be closer to 3.5 stars but no real complaints. Booking and reception were both well handled. Cabin was roomy, reasonably equipped and well cleaned on arrival. Furniture is a bit tired but still quite ok. Park was really busy and a bit crowded but still orderly. Reception staff were friendly and helpful. Location is very good.
This is a beautiful place to stay. The cabins are comfy, clean, and spacious. The staff are lovely and welcoming.
Recently stayed in a Cabin for 3 nights which suited our requirements,. Cabin was clean and tidy and close to all ammenities.
It ticks most boxes & shoulnt disappoint
Very tidy and clean. Amazing views and managers very welcoming and accommodating. Walking distance to all places. Great spot

I really don't want to make this post as I don't want to encourage anyone else to know about this truly stunning spot. We try and not repeat trips, but this place keeps drawing us back.
I mean WOW. On the water, walk to everything you would possibly need and stunning views and sunsets. Just when i didn't think it could be any better, the dolphins did a swim-by yesterday afternoon. Do me a favour and don't come here, I want to be able to get in the next time I want to book.. 😁

Right on the waterfront. Food works store across the road. Other takeaway as well. Torquay pub just a  minutes walk away. Beautiful and quiet. Amenities clean and tidy.  Staff very helpful.  Couldn't rate this place any better. Well done guys and girls.
Great spot by the beach at Torquay. Never rains in Hervey bay ... Except always at Easter. Doesn't matter - even in a tent, it's worth it.
Older caravan park but facilities very clean staff lovely very helpful.
Yes your love

Lovely spot, good service. Could cool it with the amount of security cameras around the site, felt like I was on big brother. Bit of a stretch asking guests to mop the showers. Beautiful almost exclusive beach.

I have never been to a camp ground where the owners were this amazing. 2 out of 3 nights they came around with zooper doopers for the kids. Noticed that our ute wasn't at our site one night, so they followed up to make sure everything was secure and locked. I couldn't rate a place more highly.
Great place Jess and Darren great hosts

We have been coming here every year after Christmas for over 30 years. The caretakers Jess and Darren have been the best ever. They were both so very helpful and relaxed and did everything they could to make our holiday enjoyable. Everyone here feels the same way and wish that they would be here permanently. Thank you so much Jess and Darren we appreciate it.

Fantastic caravan site! Perfectly located just steps from the beach, offering stunning views and a relaxing atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, with well-maintained amenities. Site Managers Jess and Darren went above and beyond to ensure a great stay. Ideal for families or anyone looking for a peaceful coastal getaway. Highly recommend!

Die Lage des Campingplatzes ist direkt am Strand. Leider war unsere Site auch gleich direkt an einem Beach Access, sodass wir viele Personen gleich vor unserem Platz durchlaufen hatten. Auch waren die Waschmaschinen nicht mehr so sauber, die WC Anlagen dafür sehr schön. Die Stellplätze waren im Vergleich zu anderen Sites eher eng bemessen.
Noisy van park from traffic on esplanade, bit run down,not worth the small site  for price.
Right in the water, amazing views
Very noisy from esplanade traffic, needs bigger sites.

Stayed at an ensuite site for a week. Was a lovely spot. Only a short walk to the shops, restaurants, cafes and beach. Kids had a blast in the pool. Gated Park, which was great especially since we unexpectedly had to spend a night away from our caravan.
Staff were very friendly and the park had lots going on for the holidays which was great.

Great staff, great and Very Well maintained grounds. We swam in both pools, played Tennis, basketball, great games room , bouncing pillow and feeding the ducks and turtles was a daily quaking good time!! Great location to all the good things to do in Hervey Bay!! Thank you for having us!!!
Great place to stay. We stayed at an ensuite site. Ensuite was nice and clean and perfect for our family. Park had plenty for kids to do. Staff very friendly.
Very handy to beach and shops. Fabulous bicycle/walking paths to get around on. Was in motorhome, so didn't use cabins. Very clean and tidy park. Had an ensuite & powered site. Ensuite was spotless!

Wonderful Service and a Great Stay

Staff were amazing – they couldn’t do enough for us. The new lady at reception (I can’t remember her name) was so sympathetic and helpful when there was a mix-up with our site. She and the new ground staff member (also new, and sadly I didn’t catch her name either) went above and beyond to rectify the situation and make our stay comfortable.

We had a powered site with an ensuite – the ensuite was very clean, and the park is in a great location. It was a group booking with our friends, and although our bookings were moved and we weren’t placed close together at first, the staff sorted everything out. Both families were given a full refund for the 4 days, which was incredibly generous.

Definitely will come back – excellent customer service and a great park overall !!
Fantastic park has the best camp kitchen we have ever seen 2 pools tennis court basketball hoop great for kids will definitely be back loved it
Stayed there for 1 month we where very pleased with park staff was the friendly very clean the best caravan we have stayed Thanks to all staff
Great spot. Really good service. Love that I'm under 5 minutes walk from the beach too. Was a great stay.
Reception staff went out of their way to accommodate us. All staff are so friendly and helpful and the ensuites are immaculate. We’ll be back for sure.
Sometimes the reception staff put you off before you even stayed and that’s what happened here

This is one of the best parks we have stayed in. Staff are super friendly and helpful, sites were really well maintained, the pool was outstanding and the location was safe. There is a natural lake with turtles, ducks and fish. Nice spot for people travelling with dogs and an easy walk down to the Esplanade and the beach. Picked a two weeks for the price of one so very well priced.
The Cabins are great, clean,& have all you need in them.

Sehr schöner Campingplatz.
Wir sind insgesamt 3 Nächte geblieben.
Das mehr ist direkt vor der Tür und man mehrere Möglichkeiten für Kaffee und Essen.
Die nächsten Supermärkte sind z.b. mit dem Bus zu erreichen oder ein kleiner Par auch Fuß läufig.
Great park. Amazing ensuite sites wth thoughtful extras

Nice little cv park..
Would come back
Couldn't comment on the rooms as in a caravan, but it's a great place to stay, so close to the beach and Esplanade. The management are super friendly

I booked this park for six people and then late booked the seventh person and paid a deposit of $120 . The seventh person could not make it as he was ill and when I got to the park I informed the manager. They said I would lose my deposit which is fair enough but then they charged me a further $120 for the second night when I had cancelled the room. I am so disgusted with the management and I do not recommend you book a cabin here
