Best people running place very safe park
The managers are absolute legends. Very accommodating and always willing to help. Awesome pool and spa and the indoors rooms huge.
Nice place! Be attention with check in because it closes at 5 pm.

I stayed in the 3 bed cabin. Very clean. The service was great. The lady came to check if everything was ok and if we wanted to change cabin as we had a kid but it was fine. Great location. Walking distance to beach and nice pubs and cafes.
Roomy space to stay the night
A Good and Convenient place. Only 50m to the beach.

We stayed here for 26 days. In that time we have never been treated so well. We changed rooms each time the rooms were clean. The pool is amazing. We just want to say a BIG Thankyou tothe team specially Nat you are amazing. We will be back. Keep up the great work.

DREADFUL, DONT GO THERE.  Nothing like their brochure & website.  Old, dirty, rundown.  No-one mans the office during business hours, you have to ring a phone number to get someone.  I could not believe the state of the amenities block & on the day we arrived the pool & spa were disgusting, other tourists and ourselves wouldn't get in.  Your sites are in amongst the annuals that live there so our view next to us was a view of rubbish under & behind their van (this was at the front of the park, not down the back).  As we found out (2 weeks after leaving) from the people staying opposite & across from us on exactly the same type of site, we paid $15 more per night than they did......REALLY.  I have made contact with G'Day headquarters about the state of this park.  There a much nicer parks in Hervey Bay to stay.  See for yourself, check out the photos below.

The cabin I stayed in was amazing. Had everything I needed, was very spacious and clean! The pool in the complex was very nice and new. Location is perfect. The WiFi actually works! Staff were very friendly and helpful. Would recommend!
Fantastic stay, caretakers couldn’t be more helpful, close to beach and shops, little tight for big rigs, amenities good, pool and spa awesome , rec room and camp kitchen great also
Old and shabby, noisy apartment
Really nice little park, pet friendly, nice amenities, good location. Definitely will go back to visit again
Facilities need repairs. Huge variations in prices. Single female charged $59 per night whereas couple in next site paid $25!
Great value and close to everything

Frazer Coast Beach front Tourist Park. This campground has been fully renovated recently. I would say it is the gold standard in the Hervey Bay area. Management  is  doing a great job in keeping this ground clean and tidy. It has two beautiful and well-appointed undercover kitchens, including tables and benches to sit down and eat. Also, the amenities, toilets, and showers are well laid out and clean. We had a great time staying here and highly recommend this place.

Beautiful location right on the beachfront. Lovely beach for safe swimming. Helpful staff. Great sunset spot. Location is good for day trips to K'gari. Would definitely come back here again and recommend to others.

A great little caravan park with beach front sites available.
We were a row from the beach, and were thankful as it was quite windy during our stay. Enjoyed the radio that was on in the amenities block, which are very tidy. Thank you to the manager/owners who pay attention to the many details to keep a park looking good!
Spent the long weekend here with the little kids. Had a blast, will definitly be coming back in the near future
Spent a few nights with the van , great little clean park , friendly assistive staff , super close to a sheltered beach ,

We always wanted to stay at this place for many years before we purchased a caravan as its the best location in town.  Our first trip north from brisbane we had to make a booking, We managed to jag a spot along the beach front. Stunning views and early morning walks along the beach.

Came for a two-night stay, loved the grounds as they were kept very tidy at all times by the diligent staff, Justin and Megan. The common areas were always clean and there was never a wait for any amenities. The trees provided lovely natural shade and shelter from the wind. There are two access points right onto the beach and you can hear the waves softly at night to lull you to sleep... Megan very kindly sorted me out with a whale watching tour, organising the courtesy bus to pick me up and bring me back at the bus stop right out the very front. Bins were also easy to access.
Nice van Park, clean facilities, roomy sites, easy beach access.

Bit worn out, but facilities clean.
Frequently crowded
Location is very good. On thr beach yet close to shops restaurants. A shared pathway that runs the length of the foreshore runs right past.
Great caravan park  managers very nice Really  enjoy  our stay here
Fantastic little caravan park on the coast - you need to book. Has fantastic management who do all they can to be helpful

Stayed 14 nights at Torquay. We had a powered van site backing onto the beach. We booked a year in advance to ensure the site we wanted and it was a magic stay. Booked again for next year. Clean amenities and grounds  and Justin runs a tight ship. Easy beach walking and well kept level pathways above the beach. 100 metres from esplanade shops and services, so everything at hand in walking distance.
Great location, friendly staff, right on the beach, close to shops
Facilities could do with a good clean and refurbish. Bit crowded on some sites with no parking allocation.  Beautiful location
Very poor service booked in 12 months with a group and was put into the other side of the away from the group and they didn’t do anything to fix wouldn’t recommend there service in the office
Amazing location, sparkling clean facilities. Right on the beach, close to shops and playground and patrolled beach for swimming = great for kids. Also lots of trees for shade
Very nice clean park

Absolutely beautiful place.
Great staff and a great location.
Especially the fact we can bring our Fur baby with us

We only stayed one night in a van here but upon arrival the staff were very friendly. It was unfortunate though my husband had a minor accident setting up our van hitting his head & causing a gash. We couldn't find our first aid kit. A lovely staff member by the name of Ana came to our rescue and alerted another staff member who promptly brought a first aid kit & help clean and patch up my husbands wound. Her name was Rhi & she was amazing! Also Jordan came to the van and assisted. We were really impressed with their professionalism. Ana popped by the next morning to check up on us again. Thank you to the 3 of you for your caring nature and we will be back again.
Kerri and Erwin

Close walk into the town with cafes, restaurants, shops and bars. Great facilities and additional activities for families. We had a ensuite camp site and it was fabulous. So nice to have a clean, private bathroom while camping.
Lovely quiet park. Clean amenities. Has a pond with turtles and fish in it.
Delightful, tidy park with perfect location. Booked our return visit on check out.
Were there for us travellers caught by flooding on the route south

Tree loppers covered our car, van and awning in wood chips. We were given no warning and couldn't even move the car out when the trucks turned up.

The mess was reported to front desk staff who said the manager would give us a call. No apology was offered and the manager didn't even bother to call.

Nice park.
Amenities good
One of the best. Great amenities for kids. Good clean bathrooms. Large attractive gardens
Large spacious and clean chalet. Had a swim in the pool. Friendly staff.
Great park, friendly and easy going staff, clean facilities and close to shops and beach
Great holiday park— staff and management very good.. excellent location very secure and relaxing
Such a lovely cabin, location and stay

We had a studio unit, the freezer was full of ice, no crisper on the bottom, the door fridge door had shelves missing, the split system didn't work very well, the TV control wouldn't let you change channels, bed only had sheets on had to put our own blankets on, floor was gritty & needed a wash .

We booked a caravan powered site.
Site was strewn with rubbish, hoses, buckets, chipboard, when we arrived, they cleaned most after my phone call, but not all. If it was a couple of pieces I’d have done it.
Concrete slabs 3 inches above ground level, an ankle breaker. Slab was cracked and dislodged in front corner, needed repairs.
Grass clippings piled up at rear of site, they’re too lazy to deposit in a bin.
Uneven ground with pot holes everywhere, site boundary markings non existent.
I noted steps off cabin decks are uneven, not compliant to regulations, so a safety hazard.
Can’t believe the council allow this park to be so unkept.
Nice place.  Small park not far from the beachfront and restaurants.  Parking very tight. Comfortable unit.  VERY small bathroom.  Pool area looked very nice. Service was great.

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
An Unforgettable Stay – Thanks to Natalie and the Team!

Our experience at Fraser Coast Holiday Park was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warmth and professionalism by Natalie and her incredible team, who went above and beyond to ensure our stay was perfect.

The location itself is absolutely stunning – peaceful, beautifully maintained, and a true hidden gem of the Fraser Coast. We stayed at a powered camping site, and were blown away by how clean, spacious, and well-equipped everything was.

The amenities were immaculate:
•	Showers and laundry facilities were spotless and easy to use
•	The recreation room was a great place to unwind and enjoy some downtime
•	And the heated pool and spa? An absolute dream! Perfect for a relaxing soak after a day of exploring

You can really feel the care and pride the staff take in the park – everything runs smoothly, and guests are treated like family.

We can’t thank Natalie and her team enough for such a memorable experience. If you’re thinking about visiting the Fraser Coast, this is the place to stay. We’ll absolutely be back!
We had a powered site for van. Stay here each time we visit Hervey Bay

Natalie has provided us with excellent service right from the start when we booked to arrival where Natalie and Wayne assisted us with parking our caravan. Amenities are clean. Thoroughly enjoying our stay and highly recommend this lovely caravan park.

The friendliest mangers very helpful and accommodating clean amenities and everything you need to enjoy your stay onsite and not far from the beach and cafes and restaurants. Second time here and don’t want to leave , just the ideal location from everything you need
People are so nice at Fraser, great location ,close to the beach , shops and thia shop.

The manager is amazing, our accommodation fell through with two kids and our dogs 7hrs in a trip from nsw, she was able to squeeze us in so late at night during her own dinner and for that we can never be greatful enough. The cabins are lovely with full sized fridge and freezer, everything you could need to cook a meal, hot showers and comfortable soft beds. The night was calm and quiet and we would definitely stay again.

Our friends from Melbourne stayed there while visiting. A great place to stay👍 Due to a mix up, they missed their flight home and stayed 2 more nights. They manager is wonderful and she was able to accommodate them at short notice. We live in Hervey Bay and will highly recommend Fraser Coast holiday park to anyone who visits👍
Beautiful staff ..lovely place and easy to get around Hervey Bay  beach is just down the road walking distance from the park
I really loved staying there and going to come back again and stay longer next time really nice cabin and clean 100 % loved it
Friendly staff..great place to unwind, good fishing on the beach with troysparkslures
Natalie and her team were welcoming and helpful. Pets also very welcomed. Great pool and spa. Experience from day 1 to day 30 was 10/10. Thank you again!!
Very clean and quiet
Would be the best kept caravan Park we have visited clean tidy

Loved this place.
Easy to book in via phone.
Very useful help into the site.
Sites were big.
Excellent facilities.
Highly recommend.

I had a great stay here.
Friendly staff, very clean and tidy grounds and facilities.
Nice and quiet. Definitely the best park in the area
Quite, super clean, we felt very comfortable

we were on a large, powered site. the amenities were extremely clean. the peoples were lovely and assisted me in reversing the van into position. close to the beach and next door to the bowls club. would go back when back in town again
Stayed on a caravan site in a motorhome, very relaxing & peaceful, well kept park, amenities clean, everyone was friendly. Managers Sheree & David welcoming. I will surely be back.
We have used this park a number of times over the years and it's always been very clean and tidy.Very friendly staff a great help with reversing van,we definitely recommend a visit.
We love this caravan park. Spacious sites, lovely pool and great amenities. It’s our favourite in HB.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at this caravan park and wish we could have stayed longer. The caretakers were lovely, the park was clean and tidy, lots of grass. It was very serene and peaceful and has security gates. The location was perfect for a trip to the island and we also got picked up from the park. You can walk to Aldi and a nearby shopping centre.

Had a great stay at Hervey Bay Caravan Park (G’day Parks). Dave and Sheree do an outstanding job—clearly taking pride in both the park and looking after their guests. The park was nice and quiet during our visit, with the relaxing sound of birds singing adding to the peaceful atmosphere. Even our cat had a great stay! A well-kept spot with friendly management— Gabrielle, Yuki 😻 and I would happily stay again.
Loved our stay here will definitely be back not far from beach or town area. It was so refreshing to come to a park where the managers are friendly and help you to position your caravan

We will definitely go back
we liked this being a smaller park it was relaxing quite and everyone we met was very friendly including staff & fellow travellers  to permanents
The Park was very clean including the pool & bbq area
A little nugget we found in a place where there is a lot of caravan parks that you could choose from
Caravan park is quiet, safe and very dog friendly. Is close to shops, Heaps of walking tracks, bike friendly, beach front is an easy walk. Love this caravan park.

Loved our stay here, very peaceful as you hear no road traffic, easy walk to shops, flat sites, clean amenities.
Would stay again
Noisy at night with all the hooning in the surrounding area. Couldn’t understand why the disabled toilet was locked and unusable.

A fantastic stay. Very clean amenities and friendly atmosphere. A great spot for families too.
Close to Urangan.
Good clean park. Staff very helpful. Wifi was a bit hit and miss.

We stayed with Harvey Bay caravan park for our Easter break. The park managers are very nice and helpful. Amenities were spotless, park has roomy caravan sites. Fantastic bike pathways right at the door. Lots to see and do. Wonderful relaxing short break. We will definitely be back

We had a lovely stay with our motorhome. The hosts are extremely nice and helpful and look out for all the guest so they have everything they need.

You can be picked up for Frasier Island tours and they also have a nice pool.

Wir waren für insgesamt 4 Nächte am Discovery Park! Preis-Leistung war alles in allem super. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und der Campingplatz ist sehr sauber und ordentlich gehalten. Zahlten für die powered-site für 2 Personen im campervan 38$ pro Nacht. Kleiner Abzug jedoch da aktuell der größere von beiden Pools - ohne genannte(n) Grund/Gründe - geschlossen ist…der andere Pool ist eigentlich zu klein und ständig gefüllt mit Kindern.

Gerne wieder :)

I absolutely loved staying in the Deluxe safari tent. Had all the culutery provided. Great view of the pond. The colour scheme of the tent actually made it feel as If you were staying in the Safari. 😅🥰 My kids also loved all the amenities provided for children. Jumping pillow, games room and play ground area. Definitely look forward to staying there again.
Lovely surrounds, very clean and friendly helpful staff.  Close to esplanade without being in the in noise. Great live music on the weekend to enjoy while relaxing.

The cabins are the cleanest cabins I have ever stayed in in a caravan park. The air conditioner was on when we got here, soft music playing and all round exceptional. |The housekeepers here go above and beyond |Highly recommend to any family. |⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Had a fantastic stay. Plenty to do and awesome staff.

Extremely Disappointing Service

We made a booking over the phone on the 2nd, about an hour before reception was due to close, as we still had credits to use. The staff member confirmed the booking, but there was a slight issue with my second name because it’s European and harder to spell. She assured us it wasn’t a problem and told us to send the correct name via email.

We sent the email within one minute, only to receive a reply shortly after saying the booking was no longer available because a walk-in customer had been accommodated instead. This is completely unacceptable, as our booking had already been confirmed.

To make matters worse, we tried following up via Discovery and email but never received any response or apology.

This experience has completely ruined our trust in this park, and we won’t be coming back.

This was easy process. Came in for late check-in and had all the information needed when I arrived directions were easy to room provide map to get to room. Plenty of parking. Room was clean and tidy. People in park were quiet and was very peaceful environment.
Couldnt wait to leave the woman from reception was very rude we cut our stay short the park wasnt very family friendly

Pet friendly, budget friendly, great location and a lovely place to stay. We had a powered ensuite site and it was just great! The roads are a bit tight inside the park. A smile from the young girl in recepetion would have been a bit more welcoming but overall a great park and I would definately stay again.
Located in a central position with onsuit at every site. A bit tight for bigger Vans but still okay

We enjoyed a week in the Eco tent with a comfortable bed, furnishings and shower. We needed to move the lounge for better alignment of the T.V as it is  fixed, not on a swivel and has a small screen.
Although the Eco tent is roomy and comfortable, it is still a tent. BYO earplugs unless you're happy to listen to the frog lullaby and be woken very early by the birdlife chorus.
Park surrounds maintained well. Easy walk to eateries. Staff friendly and helpful. We left feeling very rested.

We'll be back again.

We stayed in several discovery parks on our journey from Sydney to Cairns in a camper. This site was by far the best of the lot. The kitchen/Pool/Toilet facilites were spotless and in close proximity to the camping area. At night the site is very quiet and is also a destination that the local Fraser Island tour companies will collect you from.
great location, awesome accomodation. Plenty on for kids too. Would most definitely stay here again.

Great place to stay with kids and family.
Playgrounds and pools and best of all a jumping pillow

Loved our stay! We were only there for a night stopping on our way to Yeppoon. Beautiful grounds and lovely ensuite. The kids area was wonderful and lots of shade for the sites and everyone was very respectful and quiet. Heading back for another few nights and excited to stay here again.
Despite bad weather it's a real bch town.ln nice weather it'd be great.
Ould retire at this place. Clean amenities and great customer service
Awesome location. Amenities in great keep and the best staff. Had a great stay. Thank you Justin & Megan
Great spot.
The park is right near the beach. Very clean and well run park

Ocean front views for $56 a night right next to the amenities and camp kitchen. Regular powered sites are even cheaper.
K’gari (Fraser island) blocked the wind making it soo calm and quiet
I will absolutely be back.
If in the area check out Fraser coast tourist parks there’s a couple more parks just like this one very close by. They’re all council owned parks on the beach with great prices I wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else

Booked a spot and could not get my carevan in as the spot in front shouldn't have been booked out. Moved from see view to non see view. Did not complain about it, so I understood that it was an error and move on .Then parked my Ute under a tree that no one was using as it was very hot and was in trouble for having it there. Wasn't asked in a propper manner to move it. It is standard to book nest years spot as I was told by the staff when the error was made a day ago to do it went in to do so thinking about it and want to move to a better spot checking availability on it once again not helped in a proper manner no we are not taking bookings for November nest year but yesterday I was asked to do so A great place to stay nice and clean but o boy the staff are not so great It's a shame that a great holiday that we waited on a hole year turned in to rubbish Will I come back nest year NO NEVER AGAIN
Camped in tents, great position on the beach front, very exposed to the wind. Noise from the street was intrusive. Staff friendly and helpful. Amenities were clean,eg. Bathroom and Camp Kitchen.

Ok, aber die Sanitären Anlagen waren wirklich in die Jahre gekommen und aus dem Duschkopf tropfte langsam und wenig Wasser.
Direkt am Abgang zum Strand ins Meer gehen die Rohre rein....

Nice campground, sites are pretty close together and quite small - if you have a large rig you may struggle. Access to the beach is great, bathrooms are clean although not a lot of hot water. Lots of noise from the road though, cars racing up and down the esplanade at all hours of the night.

Mooie plaats om te staan met een camper of tent. Momenteel waren er veel senioren. Deze mensen waren niet erg vriendelijk. Voor een jong stel of ouders met kinderen zou ik adviseren om verder te kijken.
Beautiful beachfront spot with a very friendly woman at front desk. The toilets were ok and pretty clean. The only negatives - it was quite loud but not completely through the night and no wifi.

I had a wonderful 4 night stay with my children and a few families over the school holidays.  We had a lovely beachfront site which was just fabulous. I loved the convenience to the shops and activities.     The managers are so friendly, helpful and well organised.  We'll be back next year.
:)
Very full campsite, we only stayed for one night and that was fine but wouldn't necessarily want to stay longer. The location was good, though.

The lady at the desk walked the extra mile with me. She helped me so much with my booking to Fraser Island and gave me all the time I needed.
Thank you so much you were respectful, helpful, pleasant and patient. Nettie
Will come and stay next time.
Hosts are great. Park good right on the beach.
Cheap and not nasty

Older park, but getting tidied up a treat.
Great spot.

Old fashioned caravan park, with upgraded amenities. Lovely heated pool .
But noisy with ambulance depot virtually next door.
We enjoyed our stay
Managers of this place are absolutely awesome! Couldn't do enough to make us happy. Would recommend this place to anyone!

A lovely park. Clean facilities. A nice pool. A large recreation room and camp kitchen. Helpful, friendly staff. Grassy sites with nice trees. |A spa currently under repair, however there is another spa undercover. |A laundry with 3 washing machines.
Disgusted with the attitude with management.  Cabin was not fit for a dog! Wouldn't recommend this place to anyone.

We stayed in an older Superior cabin. The cabin inside was quite comfortable and spacious and suitable for our needs.
The only negative was that the park appeared quite congested with a lot of caravans/campervans quite close to each other.

Older park. In need of some TLC. Our site was "grass" but really need some time to let the grass grow. As an overnighter or two it was ok. Showers hot and toilets clean.  I given four stars but realistically 3.5.

Lovely location and only walking distance to shops and cafes, etc, a few things to be aware of, parking onsite is extremely small and tight. The dog friendly room flooring was very worn, and there was no cleaning mop and bucket. In case of a dog emergency.  Managers are super friendly and helpful, though.

Unpleasant Experience
- No Heating in room. In winter. Heating being worked on. No alternative heating provìded.
- Bed sagged in the middle
- No doona only sheets.
- Thin walls could hear neighbour moving around at all hours
- Terrible customer service when we tried to give feedback.
Won't be returning.

Great park
Close to everything
A few permanent residents but friendly
Digs allowed and secured in the park at night with gates
Outdated toilets etc but fantastic hot water showers and it’s clean

Broken power point switch, holes in floor covering, stained. FILTHY couch, food inside pull out bed. To top it off bed bugs.
This place is disgusting.
Very nice and clean.  Very strong smelling chemicals though.

Just don't stay in rooms on ground floor especially 2, can hear everything from dogs running and furniture being moved, this goes all night and till early morning, then the crack of dawn....... Painful

This is one of the cleanest & modern caravan parks in Hervey Bay! Facilities are great, pool arcade for the kids, 2 minute walk to the pier and beaches with NO Esplanade traffic noise! YEP, It’s quiet at night. Always stayed in the parks on the foreshore, however we booked here as we couldn’t get in anywhere on the foreshore & haven’t looked back since staying here..been back many times & is our fist option now.

Muy buen lugar para alojarse. Nosotros llevábamos nuestra propia caravana, por lo que desconozco cómo es el resto del alojamiento, aunque desde fuera las casas/boongalos parecía que estaban bastante bien. Zona de caravanas, limpia el césped bien cortado. Los baños eran lo mejor , todo muy limpio y espacioso, tanto las duchas como los WC. De la zona costera está a unos 35 minutos andando.

A quiet privately run caravan park with well maintained slab and grass sites,  very friendly staff, bbqs and camp kitchen facilities plus a pool. The grounds and gardens are well maintained. The amenities block is dated but very clean.
Just a short walk to the bowls club and 5 minutes drive from the beach. There is a boardwalk across the canals to the Urangan shops and some takeaway franchise's. I always book into this park when I visit Hervey Bay.
Very tranquil.

The best camp site we have stayed at on the east coast! We’re travelling in a motorhome for 4 weeks from cairnes to Sydney and stayed here 3 nights. The cleanest facilities and best kept site we’ve seen on the whole trip. We arrived after hours and the info was very clear and informative. Highly recommend this site. Great location too
Lovely quiet and relaxed caravan park. Dog friendly and has a secure off leash area the dogs can enjoy some free time in. Will stay again
Great location to shops beach and harbour,  very clean
We only had a couple of nights here but the park was well maintained, the ammenities were spotless. We enjoyed the pool too. Well done to all.

We stayed at Hervey Bay Park for two nights and love our time there. Georgia was wonderful to deal with and very helpful. The amenities were clean, and the grounds were very well maintained with great pool and BBQ area. We also had our dog with us who enjoyed  an off lead beach not far away from the park.
Great spot.
The best park in hervey bay

Staff were so helpful and friendly
ammenities were so clean
Beautiful kept garden and the pool 👍
We highly recommend Hervey Bay caravan park walking distance to shops restaurants and the beach

Excellent service, very clean amenities, beautiful gardens, great swimming pool.
Highly recommended.
We stayed in our caravan and found the amenities very clean with very friendly staff. A quiet place with beach and shops close by.
Arrived to a lovely lady called Georgia, most welcome and friendly. Easy to communicate with. Peaceful place to stay.

Super friendly service and staff...the young lady at reception was very helpful and gave us some excellent tips for our onward journey. The sanitary facilities were very clean, the pitches were very large, and the outdoor kitchen had everything you could possibly want!

We have returned to Hervey Bay Caravan Park as the park is well appointed, clean and quiet. It is close to many amenities and shops and the Esplanade making the location excellent. The service from reception was very welcoming and friendly.
Great caravan park with large spots. Clean camp kitchen and toilets. Would recommend!
Very well maintained park. Great facilities. A little out of the way but the tours pick up from the gate so not a problem. Felt very relaxed staying there in January 2026
We recently stayed for 3 nights on a powered site next to friends. The service was amazing from the first call. It was nice and quiet, with large sites. Loved hanging out in the pool, too!

We stayed here during new years in our  caravan with our two girls and furry friends.
It's great that is animal friendly, clean facilities and swimming for the kids. It's a bit far from things, you will need to drive to get to places. The young girl at reception is is super friendly and accommodating. The only negative thing is, which is I suppose out of the owners control is that the residents that live here are unfriendly and rude.
Overall great stay, though don't think we will return.

For starters we had a late check in and the lady I
spoke to on the phone was super friendly and helpful.She explained how a late check in worked and eased all my concerns.

When we arrived at the property the kids were absolutely stoked with the location as it was right near the swimming pool and jumping pillow. Then we walked into our cabin, it was super clean spacious and homely. We placed our things away and immediately went for a swim in the pool.

It was a perfect location to the beach, restaurants, ice cream and playgrounds all in walking distance! And only a few minutes drive to all other activities we had booked in. We highly recommend and have already spread the word to everyone.
Thank you so much!

What a great find, this caravan park is. Within walking distance to the bay, local shops, pubs & restaurants.
Such helpful, attentive, accomodating staff, prepared to ‘go the extra mile’ for guests (even supplying bottled water when the council interrupted our water supply). The grounds are well maintained with crystal clear pools, kids playgrounds, a great camp kitchen & bbq area, clean fresh ammenities & laundry.

Charming little park with more than enough amenities for the average person. Spacious sites, and, despite the fact that one third of the park is being repaired, it didn't feel cramped. Friendly management who were prepared to do anything for us

The cleaners are great as well.

Also, the bird and turtle life is brilliant!

My only complaint? The way some people treat these beautiful places and dedicated staff! These places should be able to rate customers! "Paying for a service" doesn't equate to "treat people and places like garbage"

Thanks guys! Would camp here again
Clean park, great staff and close to beach.

Cabin is big and clean and easily one of the better cabins we have stayed in. The park itself is a little cramped with caravans but the cabins are beautiful and very well laid out. Would defo stay here again.

From booking to dropping our keys off - such a great experience. The customer service from the staff onsite is excellent and most importantly, friendly. The location is only a 5min walk to the esplanade, where there are plenty of options for food. Communal kitchen onsite, clean toilets and showers, pool was perfect. Would love to stay here again.
Got the trifecta 3 G'Day parks 3 of the most impossible sites ever created If you have a big van impress upon whomever you speak to that that is the case.

While back from the beach would seem a disadvantage, we found it actually a much quieter location and really only a short walk to the beach and nightlife.
The facilities are very good and regular events like life bands, bingo and sausage sizzles are great.
Sites are very generous and relatively easy to get onto.
Great park nicely laid out 2 pools and a lake

Absolutely lovely experience! The receptionists when i was checking in and out. One of the ladies (I think her name was Shae )in reception went above and beyond in making sure i had everything i need and answered all my questions. The grounds staff did a great job in making this place look so nice and green! can’t wait to come back next year
A lovely place to stay, staff very friendly and always around maintaining the park, entertainments are a great idea, amenities are clean

Probably one of our favourite locations.  We were upgraded to a Safari tent right on the lake.  The tent was amazing.  It had an awesome balcony and even a bbq on the deck.  Service was amazing, staff very friendly.  Lots of bird life, even saw eels and tortoises in the lake.  Stayed 2 nights but could have stayed much longer.  A great location also, could walk down to the beach and walking trails.
Not as good as it looks on TV.

I stayed 2 nights in a dog friendly "luxury cabin" on the far side of the park. The cabin appeared clean on arrival so I had no reason to check the bed before I slept in it. The bed was comfortable and the fridge a good size.   On my last day, however, I stripped the bed to find foreign hair and old blood stains in the linen. There was also extensive mould in the bathroom ceiling and tiles. As I was leaving early, I left a note for management with my keys and later in the day they emailed to say they had refunded one night due to my complaint. The offer of partial refund was appreciated, however the experience of knowing I'd slept in a bed with somebody else's hair and blood still leaves me feeling disgusted. The mould and lack of exhaust fan in the bathroom also suggests a lack of overall maintenance and review by management. In the parks favour the management seemed receptive to the complaint and seem to want to fix it.
Loved the park especially the staff, they were great
Very good and clean holiday park. We enjoyed our stay at a powered site.

Rooms are liveable but there is a leaky roof in the bathroom if it rains, must add a lock on the bathroom door, and add a door to the shower please. Overall nice place but road needs much work such as smoother asphalt because it is rocky and not ver nice looking. The recreational room is very family friendly as it contains a pool table, and arcade machine, a television, variety of board games, and interesting books to read

Location is great. Camping facilities look nice and pool area is lovely. However the cabins need maintenance and cleaning. Difficult to get hold of staff as reception is always closed. Also accommodation fee quoted on enquiry was different to when booked and again different to when charged on day of arrival.
Stayed in a caravan had a nice quiet stay here. Friendly helpful staff. Backs onto the bowls club &  100m walk to the esplanade. Facilities were very clean.
Nice revamped cabins

Do not stay at this ametuer run park where the permanent residents have the right to abuse other guests without ramifications. There is always so much going on, yelling while directing people into very tight sites and a removal truck that comes in and out whichb is left to idle in amongst vans. I sufferred a medical episode after being abused and ended up taken to hospital via ambulance and neither Gday parks or the management have done anything about this. The write up on their website does not match the state of the facilities. The pool is nice but thats it. I was told by one of the staff that Harvey Bay is nothing special. Absolutely appauling. Our friends stayed in a "apartment" but it smelled musty with smoke smell. The toilets were being cleaned by children. Avoid this park its not a welcome space as too many permanent residents.

Lovely little caravan site, manager’s friendly and helpful, older caravan site small sites but there is some bigger sites our caravan is 26ft and we managed just inform staff before booking,showers and toilets cleaned daily, beautiful pool and spa, close to beach and shops I would stay here again
Great location, very friendly place. Doggo friendly. Very nice and understanding manager. Centrally located which is a plus. Love the giant rec room which has a pool table and book exchange ^.^

My husband and I stayed here the weekend just gone. Wished we had of read some of the reviews before we decided to settle on this accommodation. Could not sleep the whole three nights we were there. There is no sound proofing. Could hear everything going on upstairs. Constant  running upstairs, yelling, partying etc. My husband came out the last night and asked if they could keep it down only to be met with abuse. The following day when checking out he was met with a couple who said “ we weren’t that loud “
He realised then that the managers/owners were the ones who were apart of the noise and abusing him. We will not be back.

Rooms are a disgrace run down dirty, dog hair all over the blankets, microwave rusted, air-conditioning was smelly and struggling to work clearly filters have not been cleaned for sometime. I took photos of the filth in this place. Looks great online in the photos realality I wouldn't take my dog there. Smelt like urine. The upstairs units no sound proofing and people yelling  in some sort or domestic situation. No staff to nip it in the bud. Do not stay here. |Great location bed was comfortable if you like someone's dog hair all over you.|Unit had queen bed and bunks if ya had a family... but no door on the bathroom so better have a close family to stay here. 1 out of 10 is generous its a dump. Power point hanging off the wall. Unsafe. Photos speak for themselves.

Rooms are a disgrace run down dirty, dog hair all over the blankets, microwave rusted, air-conditioning was smelly and struggling to work clearly filters have not been cleaned for sometime. I took photos of the filth in this place. Looks great online in the photos realality I wouldn't take my dog there. Smelt like urine. The upstairs units no sound proofing and people yelling  in some sort or domestic situation. No staff to nip it in the bud. Do not stay here.
Great location bed was comfortable if you like someone's dog hair all over you.
Unit had queen bed and bunks if ya had a family... but no door on the bathroom so better have a close family to stay here. PowerPoint hanging off the wall. 1 out of 10 is generous its a dump. Wish I could post the photos.
Had the nicest time so peaceful and friendly

We have just completed our first road trip with our small dog (in our SUV) and it has been difficult to find dog friendly sites wh inch allow dogs in a cabin. Here we found a very comfortable cabin with cooking utensils and a large fridge. It was very quite and a great location, with shops and the beach within walking distance. Our only grimace was the price ($160) and the tightness of the parking spot.
We would recommend this as a place to stay.

We stayed overnight in a Superior Cabin. "Superior" was overstating it, but it was perfectly adequate for a night. The Cabin was clean and the lounge and bed was comfortable. Unfortunately, both cold taps in the basin and shower wouldn't completely turn off and ran all night. For caravaners, the sites looked small and difficult to get into.

Small sites,Sunday difficult to access the reception as was closed most of the day.No response to intercom,only to a phone call.|Never again,only suitable for small vans.Despite booking,the comment was you may need to go somewhere else,as the only available site maybe too small.|Thus grey water was uphill to the drain,thus we placed it on the grass.
Thanks for having us. Very clean and well kept facilities. Good sized spot on the grass for us and our boat. Cheers!

We stayed two nights on a powered site
Right beside the pool & amenities
The grounds are kept beautifully
All amenities are super clean
& everyone is welcoming and friendly
& it’s lovely and peaceful there
Would highly recommend as your next stay

We stayed for 3 nights on a powered site with our campervan and felt completely at home. Georgia’s welcome was absolutely fantastic – so friendly and accommodating! She even arranged a pickup service for our Fraser Island tour.

The park itself is small, very quiet, and beautifully maintained. The amenities are super clean, the camp kitchen is more than sufficient and also very tidy. The pool is lovely, peaceful, and perfect for relaxing. We highly recommend Hervey Bay Caravan Park and would definitely come back!

Excellent we stay here on all our trips to
Hervey Bay

We stayed for 5 nights over the new year break. The park was lovely and quiet with a beautiful pool and away from the very busy main drag on the esplanade. Staff were very friendly and very helpful, giving us a list of good eateries in the area. On New Years eve they had Cam Kettle (great singer), playing acoustic guitar in the camp kitchen area next to the pool. We have recommended this CP to our friends and will return in the future. Botanical Gardens are right next door and definitely worth a look.

I would recommend staying at Hervey Bay Caravan Park.  Urangan  QLD.
CLEAN and staff are very helpful.  The sites are very generous compared to some parks we have stayed at.
Thank you for a lovely 2 weeks.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had a fantastic stay at Hervey Bay Caravan Park and couldn’t recommend it more. The park is clean, well maintained, and thoughtfully laid out, making it easy to relax and enjoy the surroundings. The amenities were spotless and modern, with great facilities for both short and long stays.

The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, always happy to offer local tips or assist with anything we needed. The location is excellent—close to the beach, shops, and attractions—yet still peaceful and quiet at night.

Whether you’re travelling with family, as a couple, or solo, this park offers great value and a welcoming atmosphere. We’ll definitely be back on our next visit to Hervey Bay!

We've been going to Hervey Bay Caravan park for the last 7 years. We absolutely love this park. Great location, super clean park and the staff are so friendly and helpful. Our next camping trip is already booked here. We can't wait to return
Great vibe, huge sites, and helpful staff
We stayed there for the first time over new year. Very nice park and our site was great. Will be coming back again next year.

We stayed for 7 nights 27th Dec - 3rd Jan.
Lovely park, really helpful staff and great crowd staying over the time we were there.
Nice 15min stroll to beach and shops.
Quiet little park, nice and close to everything.

Beautiful park, family friendly and wonderful clean amenities. Free Wifi with great speed. Pool beautiful and relaxing.
Booking was simple and Georgia very accommodating with locating our family booking and ensuring we were able to be together. Highly recommended this family friendly park.

We stayed 2 nights on an unpowered site right near amenities block. Overall park was very clean and well maintained from pool to grounds to amenities.
Staff all very friendly and helpful.  Campers and perm residents very warm and friendly.
Highly recommend your next stay in Hervey Bay here. You won’t regret it.
Felt welcomed, everything was explained and amenities where very clean, no issues with staff Management, happy with our stay.
Nice clean amenities. Great pool. Close to woolies and takeaways. Close to beach.

This is one of the true gems when it comes to Caravan Parks. Immaculately clean, great facilities and a very central location. It’s relaxed and even when the park has high occupancy, it never seems hectic.

The park is managed by the awesome Georgia (and Rolli… thought I’d best give him a mention 😁), who is super efficient, friendly and helpful. We are definitely becoming a regular here.

We drove from Melbourne to stay here over Xmas close to family. This was a perfect location for us to visit family, close to all amenities and ideal for bowlers.  The massive under cover bowls club next door is very welcoming of visitors.  It was also an easy, lovely walk into the Botanic Gardens. And convenient to Aldi and Woolies.
The grounds are well maintained, the pool ideal and the bathroom facilities spacious and clean. Terrific clothes lines.  The staff are extremely friendly and welcoming. We felt secure here as there is easy-to-use gated access in and out of the park. We will stay here again.

Nice and clean friendly staff ,but keep all your valuables  locked up .unfortunately we were relieved of some of our camping equipment during the night

In this caravan park be prepared to be packed in like sardines in a can. Getting your van in and out of its allocated slot is next to impossible without help.

Was put on a corner block on the beach front site we had to park on the wrong side of the concrete slab because a caravan had parked there car where I was supposed to put my camper so we had to park on the wrong side and open up half on the concrete slab it was hard to get out as there was another van parked on the next site in front of us it was school holidays and that end were picked like sardines
Location is good but sites are small and had issues with hot water .
Right on the beachfront and great views to watch the sunsets
Great location , right on the beach and a short walk to shops. Friendly and very helpful staff. Clean , quiet and relaxing park. Highly recommend

Easy check in, kids loved the play equipment and turtles! Beautiful park and lots for the kids in the park. There was only 1 dryer working at my end of the park and and one out of order. The other laundry at the front had several dryers however another also out of order. Still enjoyed our time.
Great place to stay friendly and clean .
A lovely place to stay

Nice park , but seriously keeping the lawns mowed and the edges trimmed is great but the main entrance only needed some 20 mm blue metal in the ever increasing number of ditches and potholes . All the guests along that stretch of road were " not happy Jan"
Understandably so.
One little thing that could have made a huge difference in my rating and I guess others as well.
I know it's on the calendar to get done professionally in a few months but it really gave the park a bad look.
We enjoyed the location and staff were very friendly.
Great park 👏 👌

A nice park close to everything. We booked 6 months in advanced and was told we had an upgrade to an ensuite powered site.We were very disappointed with our upgrade that was on a very small site lucky to fit our car on .The road was on a very dirty dusty section on the entry road (about 8 sites long ) and every vehicle went past covered us in dust. Some guest were watering the road to keep the dust down to keep the dust out. Disappointing experience. We were happy to leave.
Very clean and tiny park. Staff very helpful. Would definitely stay again.

The little cabin we stayed in was outdated which was a let down it didn't have the charm that was portrayed on the websites photos , top bunk needs a clean in cabin 705. You'll be surprised what you see when you get up to clean .

Nice staff and location

We stayed in our van with an ensuite. Lovely park, pet friendly, Staff are lovely people and keep the park looking very tidy and clean. 2 pools kids playground with a jumping pillow. Laundry facilities. Walking distance to shops. Short drive to supermarkets. Our 2nd time there.

We really loved our stay at Discovery Hervey Bay. Our cabin was spotlessly clean and as we were arriving in the evening, we really appreciated that the heating was already on. The park is very well kept and all guests seemed very happy with the facilities. There are also some safari tents if you like glamping! Would definitely stay here again.
Fences to low....public to easy to jump fence and steal.....

The cabins are nice we've stayed in then a few times and the camp sites are great even next to the jumping pillow amd pool at Xmas wasn't to bad we still had time to winde down this time around we stayed on an unsuite grass site and it's so handy having amenities at your door we love coming here and it's so close to everything

A fantastic park, very well maintained and clean. Great facilities, amenities and family friendly activities. The amenities near us were fantastic, toilet and shower in one room, like a private ensuite which was great with the kids and always spotlessly clean.
The staff were fantastic, from our booking, greetings and interactions throughout the stay. A special thanks to Dave who was very kind after i took in my caravan awning and lost, he also gave great recommendations for the area.
Great job team!!
Thanks for having us.
3rd visit here. Powered site. No complaints. Love the heated pool and camp kitchen.

We just had 2 nights here. Brilliant. A self contained villa. Clean, private. Comfy bed, good shower 🚿 location is fabulous. Walk to the Esplanade and eating places. We took bikes that we could lock up on the sundeck. Lovely clean bins around the park. Ideal for caravans and motor homes. We will definitely be back.

We stayed at this lovely park for a few days, my partner was working locally, I was working with a little one in tow.

This park is so peaceful! It seems to attract a really kind and quiet crowd! Everyone was very respectful of each other and the rules of the park.

We were in walking distance to the beach and grocery shops.

The facilities we all very clean and tidy. The pool well maintained and the staff we met were lovely!

We are already planning our next trip back.

Wir waren mit unserem Camper 4 Nächte vom 1.12.-5.12. auf dem Camperplatz. Eine gute Standortwahl, wenn man u.a. einen Abstecher auf Fraser Island vor hat. We highly recommend Hervey Bay Caravan Park we had a 3 month stay and found  the amenities we so clean,  lawns, gardens and pool well maintained.  All the staff were so friendly and helpful.

We really love it here at the HBCP.  It's always clean and tidy, the staff are great and it is centrally located.  We are travelling bowlers and the park is adjacent to the Urangan Bowls Club so for us, it is also very convenient.
Very friendly and patient with me.  Glen also helped me back up.  What a great guy very softly spoken.   He explained perfectly and it was easy.  Give them 5 stars*****
Great dog friendly caravan park toilets very clean will come back again

The amenities were clean and Georgia was very kind and helpful. Residents in the park were friendly. If you are looking for a pet friendly park close to shops and the beach in a quiet location, this park will not disappoint!

Excellent caravan park we have enjoyed our week here. The park and facilities are kept very clean & tidy. Sites are a generous size & easy to access. All the staff are excellent and very friendly. We will be staying at this park when we next visit Hervey Bay. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We have stayed at the Hervey Bay Caravan Park in our motorhome several times over the last few years and have always found the park to be well maintained, have excellent clean facilities and a courteous helpful staff. The park is very secure, is a short walk to shops and there are lots of bike paths nearby. we will be back again.
A quick stop for us but super helpful staff and a well maintained site

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Harvey Bay Caravan Park – Unpowered Camping Review

I stayed in the unpowered campsite section at Harvey Bay Caravan Park and absolutely loved it. The whole place has such a relaxed, coastal vibe — exactly what you want when you’re pitching a tent and switching off for a bit.

The grounds were tidy and well-kept, with plenty of space to set up without feeling crammed in. Even in the unpowered area, it felt safe, peaceful, and surprisingly comfortable. The amenities were spotless every time I used them, and the staff were genuinely friendly — the kind of people who actually seem happy to help.

The location is perfect, too. You’re only a short walk or drive from everything you need in Hervey Bay, but the park itself still feels like a quiet little hideaway. Waking up in the morning with the sea breeze drifting through the campsite was honestly one of the highlights of my trip.

If you’re looking for an affordable, calm, and well-run spot to camp — powered or unpowered — this place is spot on. I’d stay here again in a heartbeat.

We definitely recommend this dog friendly caravan park! We’ve stayed there in our caravan several times over the last few months & have always enjoyed our time there. Georgia has been very helpful & friendly every time.
The caravan park is secure, well maintained & the sites are large and spacious. The amenities are always clean & spotless with great hot showers.
It has a lovely pool & is in a great location - walking distance to Aldi, Woolworths, McDonald’s & KFC. It’s also close to The Esplanade, Botanic Gardens, Urangan Pier & cafes & restaurants at Urangan.
There is also an off leash dog park on the site & a beautiful off leash dog beach a few minutes drive away.
We really love this peaceful & friendly caravan park & have already booked our Christmas stay there!! 👍👍

Great little caravan park
Quiet and amenities always clean
Helpful hard working staff

Wir waren für eine Nacht da und es gefiel mir und meinen Freunden richtig gut.
Hatten einen richtig tollen Abend mit Rolli aka Roland und er hat uns noch richtig gute local tips gegeben.

Great van park.  Large clean amenities.  Very friendly staff.  Close to everything I needed.  Even a bowls club next door with live RNR music & dance while I was here.

This campsite was our fifth during our trip along the coast. We've never received such a warm and friendly welcome from the couple and their daughter. Fortunately, the campsite itself isn't too crowded, but it's very clean, spacious, and has wonderful showers. They also helped us arrange a trip to Fraser Island. When we left, the owner even came to say goodbye. We found the same personal touch we're used to at Dutch campsites here.

This is a lovely place with very friendly and helpful people at the office.

We had a clean site and also the toilets were very clean.

We had a good time on this campground.
A lovely park, good spacious sites, terrific amenities, very clean and lovely and quiet. I will return for sure. Close to the botanical gardens which are a lovely walk.
Very happy with our site. Toilets and showers lovely and clean.

We’ve thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the park—our second visit, and just as lovely as the first. Tucked away in a peaceful spot, it offers a quiet escape from the bustle of Hervey Bay, yet it’s only a short drive to the jetty and all the essentials. The Bowls Club next door makes for a laid-back and enjoyable evening out.
A special mention to Georgia at check-in—her warm and professional service made us feel instantly welcome. The park itself is beautifully maintained, with spotless amenities and spacious caravan sites that gave us plenty of room to relax.
After busy days exploring everything Hervey Bay has to offer, returning to the calm and comfort of this cosy park was the perfect way to unwind. We’ll definitely be back again!

Really great campingsite, we have a camper and stayed for 3 nights. The toilets and showers are really clean, there is a kitchen with bbq. The receptionists are really helpful and lovely. A great and quiet place to stay in Hervey Bay!

We had booked elsewhere (but close by) for a more bush setting.  However when we arrived there were midges by their thousands and after half setting up we decided to cancel and move somewhere else before the rest of the family arrived.

I called Hervey Bay Caravan Park and Georgia assured me that there were not midges as the sea breezes kept them away.  While they were fully booked on the powered sites, she had room in the unpowered area (unpowered was our original booking as we are self contained).  She was very helpful and understanding of our predicament.  We arrived and were greeted with a friendly face and a lovely grassy area to set up.

Although it is right in the heart of Urangan, the grassy area is surrounded by trees and very level and pleasant camp site.

The park is well kept, and the amenities were clean and extensive.  The central location is great for access to all the local attractions and amazing restaurants in Urangan.

Our only disappointment, and the only reason for not giving 5 stars, is that we couldn't have a fire, though there was a total fire ban at the time, this is something we always look forward to when camping.

We would absolutely stay again when in Hervey Bay.  Thank you Georgia!

Absolutely fabulous place to stay, a quiet little hamlet, wonderful staff, pristine amenities. Highly recommend.
Stayed in our caravan.

Just want to say a big shout out to Rolly the owner who went above and beyond in helping us with our puncture drama!
Ben keeps the park looking immaculate.
Next time we will stay longer! Great location, close to supermarket etc. security great and everyone super friendly and helpful 🤗 We're back in Devon, UK now, no more punctures were had thankfully 😆

Great park, friendly and obliging staff, clean amenities and well maintained grounds with large grassy sites. Secure with gates locked at nightNice walk to beach and esplanade. Would definitely recommend.

When we called to keep Georgia updated, she was just a delight to deal with. She gave the impression of someone who really loves what she does to look after guests. Upon arrival just before closing we got chatting to her dad Roly who helped us to our site as it got dark and assisted in guiding us as first timers with van into our site. The caravan park has a really nice and serene vibe, so we will definitely be back.

When we called to keep Georgia updated, she was just a delight to deal with. She gave the impression of someone who really loves what she does to look after guests. Upon arrival just before closing we got chatting to her dad Roly who helped us to our site as it got dark and assisted in guiding us as first timers with van into our site. Great staff good manager and all park very well run toilets very clean great location will come again sites good size
Great staff , clean amenities,, nice grass sites,our dog loves it 👍
Nice and good secured place, only a bit far from the beach. There is nothing in the neighbourhood, therefore it is very quiet.

A super safe, security gated family run, quiet,  peaceful & well maintained park with old but always clean amenities. Close - 5 minutes walk to shops, easy 1.3km down Margaret Street to the beach (off leash & an on leash, all swimmable) and access to the 16kms of bike riding & walking along the Hervey Bay esplanade all the way from Urgangan Pier where's there's some lovely coffee spots (Hatch design & creative, The Spotted Goat) to Vernon Point. There's also access to the Mary to Bay Rail trail which is a great ride. The park backs on to the Botanical Gardens and has a fantastic off leash area out back of sites for furbabies to run. Loved my three weeks here. Great for caravanneers who looking for a super sleepy, relaxing stay. Would not take kids here necessarily as no facilities other than a pool for entertainment - suggest Torquay and Parks closer to the Waterpark.

Fantastic area with lots of trees and plants and very well laid out. We stayed in a safari tent, and it was amazing. Great amenities, very spacious and totally clean. Terrific spot to sit outside on the terrace next to the lake.|Definitely recommend.

This is our go to park when we are at Hervey Bay. Great for kids and now dog friendly too.

Clean and tidy. Our bed was soooo comfy and clean. We had a dog friendly cabin which was clean and we liked the position in the park.

We stayed 3 nights over the Easter weekend on powered sites with ensuites and absolutely loved it! Wow we had a fantastic time over this Easter2024 long weekend.

Our stay in the deluxe safari cabin was amazing!! Situated right on the garden bed where turtles, ducks and fish swim up to be fed.  The cabin itself is perfect for a family of 4 and is very clean.  The park boasts two pools, playground and jumping inflatable.  You can also hire bikes or pedal carts for cheap.  Close proximity to the esplanade and specialty shops, I highly recommend our stay and we will be back.

Nice park spaced out and quiet compared to others in this area. The caretaker was very helpful and good to talk to. The facilities were tidy and well maintained. I enjoyed the visit and will stay here again next time I visit.
Stay here every year. We have always found everything clean, well kept grounds, friendly staff, good position, quiet and secure. Will be back again next year. Thank you.

Stayed overnight before a whale sighting tour the following morning. Friendly and helpful welcome from the staff at reception. Site is well kept, with clean toilet and showers. Short walk to shops and restaurants.

Jan and Hart here.  Great caravan park. One of the cleanest and spacious we have stayed in. Room for van  annexe and car side by side. Managers Dave and Sheree were excellent. From their greetings to guiding into our site. Cannot fault our stay. Thank you.
