Cabins were meticulously cleaned, our family loved this park and the facilities were top notch. All of the staff were so helpful and accomodating, we decided to stay an extra night!

I hired a 4 seater pedal car which I paid for in full at the office, as I only had a little over half an hour to use the Kart . The office lady was very persuasive that I bring the Kart back on time , which I was more than happy to do and did . So I go out side and discovered that a vendor had blocked access to allow me to remove the kart .  I made the vendor lady aware politely that she has blocked the karts in , she ignored me and went back around to the front of her trailer. I went into the office and told the lady at the counter and she said she would call her maintenance man .   I told her that I’ll just be taking the child’s kart and I’ll be back on time. I go back to the office on time after my child used the single kart and was offered no refund for the hire of the 4 seater kart that I couldn’t use. I was only offered a refund when I told her that it’s poor for that she didn’t offer me a refund. I think it’s very sad that a company has to go to their level to try and get money for services that aren’t used and are paid for. I thought the park was amazing and the young gentleman who helps you back into the sites is truly a big asset to their company. He was very knowledgeable and professional in his manner also.

A great  place  to stay!  Clean and
well  kept. Service  was very prompt when we had concerns. Also had the most amazing informative free  snake  and reptile show while we were there. I'd come again just  for that. Loved the pancakes available  on Sunday mornings  too! Breakfast  is ready 😁👏 Had a wonderful  time and was  so close to the beautiful  Harvey Bay beach and pier. Thanks to all.

Brilliant . Would have given 6 stars .
We’ve stayed in some good sites over the last 3 weeks and this was the best . A cut above due to the management and staff.
Each arrival is escorted to site and assisted in parking - our van is pretty big so this is a huge help . All sites are level and well maintained. Facilities are clean and good.
Short walk to the beach and many cafes.
Everything is dry at the moment but sites were not overly dusty .
Cute lake with ducks.
Dogs are welcomed and the night we were there we enjoyed a sausage sizzle and music evening .
Kids area looked good.
We do love our TV , as our site was under trees we were given a direct aerial connection which gave us a perfect signal .
It’s the little things that make a difference .
Thanks for a stress free couple of nights, we will come back for longer .

Our experience started with a friendly welcome and some expert assistance putting our van on site 18 alongside our travel companions.

The grass site was a great size, although on a busy corner, which it did not cause any concerns as there was plenty of room for our van and car to be safely out of the way.

The park is beautifully laid out with pools (heated) at either end. The camp kitchens are clean and tidy with loads of equipment and cleaning gear supplied. All the facilities were clean and tidy and really maintained with care and attention.

It’s a short walk to the beach and shops with loads of choice for food and drinks and a small supermarket too. More larger supermarket stores and anything  else you may want are only a short drive away.

Great park, great location, great staff. We would recommend a stay at Fraser Street.
Really enjoyed our stay here. We were given a superior cabin when we arrived. So comfortable and had lots of room if you were coming in a group.

The second five stars in our two week travel
From the  minute we pulled up to check in, the staff was fantastic. we left a day earlier, then planned, but 2 weeks on the road is enough. The staff were fantastic with us, changing our booking a couple of times thanks to all the staff the owners should be very proud of their staff

Great park. The safari tents were wonderful. Our first time clamping. Great camp grounds. Sausage sizzle and live music night was fantastic. Andrew the manager was extremely efficient and helpful. A great asset. Nothing was a problem to him. Would highly recommend.
Great man helped us back our van in. Very tight sites. Great facilities
First time here on way home from FNQ. Fabulous park - spotless grounds and amenities and in great location. Special thanks to Craig who is an absolute gem, so helpful, funny and all round gentleman

They were so helpful, thankfully they were able to give us a powered site for 2 weeks at VERY short notice after a bungled attempt to stay somewhere else, I made a phone call and we were there 5 minutes later, reception staff were so nice, they got their groundsman to guide us into our site, he did a fantastic job, nothing was a problem. The grounds and amenities were immaculate, we have never seen cleaner amenities blocks.
Such a great spot, so close to everything.
My husband left his phone in the toilet cubicle on the day we left, we had gone as far as Maryborough and realised he didn’t have it, I rang reception l, they went to where he left it, and had it for us when we went back to get it.
I would highly recommend this park to anyone.

Loved the stay. I would recommend to campers of all ages. Such a diverse town with beautiful beaches, fishing and tours. Well worth a look if you have not been to Hervey Bay before. Exceptional care and attention to incoming visitors from Dave and Sheree. Thank-you for taking care of me and my two pooches. Dog friendly - also walking paths to town and situated on a quiet backstreet alongside a creek. Wonderful to observe millions of flying foxes at dusk!!!
Very clean and pleasant park, good sized sites, quite a few permanents but they are all well kept and quiet, we would definitely visit again. Downside as always near the coast too expensive

Our 2nd visit to Hervey Bay Caravan Park. Can't fault the staff and knowing the park is very secure is another bonus. It's very tidy and well maintained. It's an easy drive to our granddaughters place and the markets. We will be back soon

Een overzichtelijke schone camping. Toiletgebouw was heel netjes, wassen en drogen kon voor slechts 5 dollar. De winkels zijn op 5 minuten loopafstand en de zee/boulevard op 20 minuten. Al met al hebben we het heel fijn gehad op deze camping.
Lovely Caravan Park in a very convenient location. Very clean bathrooms, laundry and camp kitchen area. We really enjoyed our stay
Nice place to stay, close to shops and beach. Clean and tidy amenities. Nice anc quiet. Thank you!

Wonderful park and we enjoyed our stay at the park. Amenities are all well kept and cleaned daily, made our stay in Hervey Bay so good we will be back again next year.
Security is very good with 6+ foot gates with PIN code required for entry after hours which makes it easier to sleep at night.
Thanks.

Great caravan and campervan park where I enjoyed staying 2 nights. Craig at the reception  was very nice, helpful and efficient. I recommend him and this place , definitely ! That was quiet, clean and very close to the pier for the sunsets and sunrises.

Great caravan park, with good amenities, situated in a good location. The van site was large enough to park the vehicle alongside the caravan with awning fully extended. Felt really safe due to some of the friendly permanents on site and also walking distance to Aldi, bowls club, botanical gardens and great coffee/bakery across the road from the gardens.

Well kept park, good amenities. But many sites very tight, so that reversing in a dual axle caravan from a 90 degree angle leaves tension in the wheels and the sometimes violent swing when you disconnect. Bent my jockey wheel.

Second time we have stayed at this park and we can’t fault it. Large grassy sites mine was a bit tight to get into due to cabins across the road but generally they are good and the managers help you back in. Facilities are spotless and location great. We are already talking about coming back for a couple of weeks next year. 👍

We stayed four nights amenities were clean my only issue was on the last morning there we some empty toilet roll holders in a few of the cubicles The only disappointing thing Guess it was a one off.
Everything else was great We didn't need help parking the van but a few others had office staff direct them in. We were also picked up for our tours out front of the park.  We did get caught with the bowling club bistro not being open but we didn't check so just something to keep in mind when there Excellent stay except for the one hiccup but everyone has something.
Beautiful spot nice and quiet very friendly staff spotless facilities highly recommend

Don't expect any Wifi. EVER. Camp kitchen has two BBQs, but a very small and old microwave. There are no hotplates or gas rings or anything to use a frying pan or saucepan on. Roomy fridge, but you are not allowed to store any alcohol in there. I am in a campervan without a fridge, so quite to difficult to manage. So far from the amenities I needed a packed lunch. Not a happy camper 😔
Lovely caravan park. Temporary manager is awesome. Walking distance to Woolworths, Aldi, LFC and more. 800 metres to the water.  Highly recommended.  Pet friendly.
Great caravan park and the staff more than happy to help couldn't fault
Friendly staff, great park, moved some bookings around and squeezed us in after our booking at another park had last minute issues. Clean amenities, nice location, would recommend.

This park is situated in a great spot - particularly if you are whale watching. There is a short walk to the beach which is also off leash for dogs. The staff are cheerful and friendly and the facilities clean

The care and upkeep of the park is top class, very clean in every area and well maintained. The staff are very friendly and helpful, I recommend when ever you stay in Hervey Bay this is by far the best and first choice

After having an issue at Bargara and needing to find urgent accommodation, Craig was incredibly helpful and was able to put us upfor 2 nights.. On arrival we found that the park is amazing.. Clean, well grassed and excellently maintained.. It’s in a great position for access to bowls club and the esplanade.. A little gem
Thank you Craig 😃🙏
What a great park very clean and green everything well kept and very nice people running it, always willing to help.

We stayed 3 nights at the Hervey Bay caravan park. It was very well maintained. The staff were lovely. The owner was very helpful. We did the whale watching tour and were picked up outside the park. There is an Aldis and McDonald’s within walking distance. The bowling club is next door. The bistro is only serving food on Friday nights and I won the meat raffle.

From first contact we were made feel important and welcomed, especially in the busy holiday period. Our needs were accommodated without any trouble despite the challenges of bookings influx, we were even able to stay an extra night at short notice. The grounds are well maintained, no grass clippings post mowing means no grass in the van which was appreciated.

Sheree was very pleasant when l initially made our booking. On arrival we were greeted by Sheree who organised for Dave to assist us in parking our caravan. Our site was very spaciest and the park and amenities were very clean and tidy. Although the park was fully booked out, it was a very quit park with supermarkets, eateries and the beach in close proximity. We I’ll return and intend to extend our stay next visit.

A welcome change to arrive at a park and have people in a people's business, have excellent people skills, a rare commodity at parks these days! As for the park, a very neat and well-maintained park, clean facilities and well located in a quieter part of Hervey Bay, but not too far from most tourist activities. If I were to nit pic, I would suggest maybe a meet and greet morning tea or happy hour, say 2 or 3 times a week, this can help create lasting friendships that could last forever!
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay!

We only spent one night at this campsite, but we already felt like part of the team. All the staff are really friendly and always available if you have any questions or need help. The campsite is really chill and not noisy at all. It has all the necessary amenities and is only a 15-minute walk from the beach!

I could not fault the service or amenities at the caravan park.
The toilets were well presented and clean, and the site was well presented. Staff could not do enough to assist, including helping us back onto the site.  Will definitely stay there again and put my caravan into storage for a few days on at Fraser Island next time

Quiet pet friendly park in a great location.
Friendly and helpful owners.
Clean and tidy amenties and grounds.

Great Caravan park, very clean and neat and tidy everywhere.
I even had help to get into the site which made it so much easier

Hi guys I am a teenager, I stayed with my dad Rob and his friend shanae for 5 nights from noosa , I felt very safe , the managers where very  welcoming and friendly and it has a great pool . And it had alot of fun and nice places close by like the beach and the pier and the shops down the road and fast food places

read no further, just pack the van and arrive at the perfectly looked after caravan park thanks to Dave and Sharee and Ben the maintenance man , we've been here 6 weeks and witnessed all the hard work and upgrades , very clean and tidy , great shower pressure , great laundry setup , have made some great long life friends for the future , don't hesitate come say hello, could not get a better park or managers... 👌👏

A beautifully maintained park, spacious sites with very clean facilities and friendly helpful staff. It is well located 300m to grocery stores and a short stroll to the beach in a quiet region of Hervey Bay. We've been here for a week, would happily stay on for a month, we'll be back next year. Highly recommended.
Helpful staff were available to assist with parking caravan onto site.

This caravan park has very friendly managers Sheree and David.
On our first meeting they both made us feel so welcome from first point of entry (Sheree) at reception through to Dave helping us park the van.
The park is very clean and tidy with very clean ammenities to the sites which are very spacious.
We will certainly be back for future visits.

Sheree and Dave manage this park so well that i thought i had come to the wrong park.|It was a pleasant first meeting we had with Sheree and Dave, made us  feel good when we arrived and are very genuine people who could not do enough for us.|From Dave guiding us onto our site which made it easy after a day long drive, the last thing you need is to have trouble parking.|Lawns are kept mowed as soon as someone leaves ready for the next caravan.Toilets are very clean and camp kitchen also.|Sheree and Dave often walk the park and stop and have a chat with whoever is out.|We will be back again next year.

One of the best stay ever,Dave and Sharee have done the best job to respect and harmise the best for the quests.They have made the place so comfortable  for everyone,You are welcomed with smiles and laughter ,Thank guys 👦

We loved it there the facilities very clean.
A very quiet, safe and tidy  park. Close to beach, shops, restaurants. Five minute walk to Aldi, Mcdonalds, KFC and pet friendly. The park managers very helpful and always making improvements we came for a week and ended up staying for almost 8 weeks. Would certainly visit again and highly recommend to anyone.

We had a very warm welcoming from the first phone call with Sheree to make a booking, so we felt welcome from the get go, when we arrived it continued, such warm welcoming service. We have never stayed at The Hervey Bay Caravan park before but we will be back, it’s a beautiful well kept park, Amenities nice and clean, clean laundry and plenty of clotheslines. Our 4 legged boy enjoyed his time in the off lease area at the back of the park, that was used many times over the couple of days we were there. Dave also is a very welcoming man and does a great job with helping people to park up. We found it a very nice quiet and friendly park. All in all Dave and Sheree would be up there at the top in park management, welcoming, easy to talk to, helpful and very nice people, we will definitely be back to this park again when next visiting. Thank you so much for a wonderful stay Dave and Sheree
In a great location for us, secure, clean & maintained, awesome service by Sheree,Dave & staff.

Great park to stay , were here long term with a small dog, it's been 3 weeks and can't find a complaint , tidy and clean all over , the managers are amazing and will help you reverse the van in , park upgrades are constantly happening,  5 minute walk to aldi and fast food, 10 min walk to the main shopping centre ,10 minute walk to the water ,
Ok had a talk with owner they haven't been here long so I will say ..nice park ..clean amenities.. quite..bit of sorting things out when we come..but all good ..thank you barb

A very clean, well maintained park that is close to shops and the Bay. Very quiet at night, great hosts who were really helpful and friendly and pet friendly as well. We really, really enjoyed our stay here and glad we chose the Hervey Bay Caravan Park.

The staff are very friendly and helpful and accommodated my change in circumstances, stored my bobcat, boat , car in a safe yard, good security with lock up gates at night,  clean hot showers, friendly people,
Can't say enough good things about this place!
# thank you for letting yogi and Ted stay in your park!

We absolutely loved our stay at Hervey Bay Caravan Park, from the moment we arrived to our departure.  The whole team were so friendly and helpful.  The Caravan Park now has a great atmosphere and the permanent tenants just love being there.  Everyone is so friendly.  The caravan sites are quite large with room to park your vehicle as well. We didn't have any trouble at all with leaving out our gear next to the caravan, very safe area.  It was a lovely walk straight down the road to take our dogs to the off leash beach for a walk.  The shops are so close by in very easy walking distance.  The amenities were very clean and tidy and so was the whole caravan park.  There is a fenced area in the facility that you can take your dog to have a little time off leash.  We will definitely be staying there again next time we visit Hervey Bay.  Thank you Sheree, Dave and Ben, you are doing a fabulous job.

Safe, clean, well kept caravan park. Would highly recommend. Dave and Sheree were great hosts.
Mike and Dee

Hidden Gem
This is a hidden gem that we don’t really want to share but to support Sheree and Dave, the new managers, who were so amazing we thought we had better tell you all about it. Sheree and Dave helped to make our stay awesome - we kept adding an extra night. It’s a quiet pet friendly park with grassy spacious sites. The bathrooms and toilets are immaculate. We also felt very secure in this park. The location is amazing with a 15 min walk to the esplanade or to ALDI which is only 300m away. Can’t wait for our next longer visit. Mandy and Joe
Nice, quiet and clean park. Personel was very helpful!

We stayed here for our second time. Lovely caravan park. We had a problem with our car nd needed to extend our stay. Not a problem. The caretakers are lovely people who really look after you. The park is very clean and well maintained. Lovely grass areas, clean amenities rooms and always a smile.
Very accommodating, friendly, was great for a last minute stay, good facilities and bathroom was very clean definitely recommend!!
A very tidy and clean caravan park  next to a bowling club. Very friendly and helpful staff. We love it and return here regularly for a holiday.

Wow, arrived Sunday afternoon and were warmly greeted by the managers  Dave and Sheree with a smile and happy disposition. (very rare these days). Nothing was a bother to them. The park is immaculate with almost manicured like lawns and gardens, a sparkling pool with covered BBQ area next to it. The amenities block is spotless with plenty of hot water and strong water pressure. All in all the park is an absolute credit to the managers and ground staff on how it's run and maintained. The sites are level and quite large with concrete slabs. We would highly recommend this hidden gem of a  park to anyone visiting the region. Do yourself a favour and check it out you won't be disappointed. Keep up the good work guys. Ah I almost forgot the rates won't break the bank balance either haha.

Took our caravan there during May In the Wide Bay. Very well kept grounds and great amenities. Definitely will be coming here again. Its out of the way and don't have to deal with the esplanade so nice and quiet.
Lovely park staff at the office amazing keep it up ladies would come back anytime great location
We choose this lovely park because it never feels cramped.. Always enjoy our own space. Welcome to the new management. Have stayed here many times. And will always choose this park
New owners are a pleasure to deal with.  Is now a gday park with lots of improvements in the pipeline. Thanks guys for a great stay and we will be back

Very well maintained caravan park
Park managers gave great service

I stayed over Easter and found this caravan park very welcoming, amenities were perfect for us in our van. We had our own bikes and loved the ease to have everything so close to cruise around. I will be back! Christine and Caelan

We have stayed in Hervey Bay Caravan Park several times at different times of the year. It is a convenient location with a 5- 8 minute walking path to Aldi and Take away shops. Not so good at night with no lights along the path.
The park is clean and well maintain and generally all animals are restrained as required but of course there is always the odd person who thinks they are above the rules and spoil it for other owners.
all facilities are conveniently located and we enjoy our stays there and will definitely return.
Sheree and Dave, are helpful and friendly .
Top Spot. Plenty of room for our big rig. Clean amenities. Caretakers  were great. Quiet area.

This camp is managed by the most beautiful hosts . As a first timer in a large aAussie rig, I was nervous as hell but the manager just came over and helped and reassured me and got into the space. Next day he assisted me to re hitch the van and at his own expense provided me with a brand new shackle and would not accept any form of payment.
The site itself is truly immaculate and facilities soooo clean. Thanks guys . True old school Aussies always ready to help

Great powered site for caravan, plenty of space for awning and vehicle. Beautifully kept park with lawn everywhere.
Great swimming pool, clean amenities, friendly staff.
Very quiet park, great for a few days relaxation.
An older style van park but surprisingly better than some of the newer parks, after two years travelling I would rate this in the top twenty within Australia so far

Fantastic Caravan Park!  Spacious sites, quiet location, clean amenities, pet friendly and manicured lawns - what more could you want.  Dave and Sheree (management) are super friendly and incredibly helpful.  This is a place definitely worth staying at.

From our arrival to departure our stay was quiet and very pleasant The new management very helpful and friendly.The park and amenities were excellent clean and tidy everything you could ask for. Would recommend this park to anyone for a relaxing stay.Will return one day 👍
Really enjoyed our stay here. Great staff very friendly. Peaceful very clean and well kept

10 out of 10 for this review.  I review caravan parks all over Australia, . I am totally surprised by this park, its a hidden gem. I have reviewed all the parks in Hervey Bay for many years.  It is in a perfect, quiet area and so close to everything needed.  The managers, who are very welcoming are absolutely the perfect choice for the park. A massive shout out to the groundsman who maintains and really keeps the park in tip top shape. Check it out.  It would be rude not to vist and stay a while! You won't be disappointed.

Had an absolutely  beautiful  stay here and very happy we chose to stay here. Great location,friendly  staff pet friendly.  So peaceful and will be back. The new owners were amazing  and very welcoming

Just love this Caravan Park, its easy to to get to and in walking distance to the beach and the bowls club next door. We have stayed here several times over the past few years and find that this is still the best and safest place to stay in Hervey Bay. Never had an item touched, or people left to prowl through the park.
The Services and amenities are meticuosly maintained. The site is huge, its absolutely flat, no dirt areas, its 100% grass with concrete slabs, its pet friendly with a huge separate area to walk dogs. I could not recommend this Caravan Park enough, we will absolutley will be back.

The perfect quiet location for our short break. The new owners were incredibly helpful and friendly. Amenities and pool were very clean. Pet friendly and there was a large grassed area for our dog to run around.

3 hours ago on  Google|We just spent our Easter break at Hervey Bay caravan park and the new caretakers/managers Sheree & Dave are not only super friendly but also very professional and nothing was an issue. Their interaction with not only our sites but the whole park was really great to see and hear others laughing with them. We will definitely be coming back to this caravan site again. The amenities were great, clean and always tidy.|Can’t fault anything at all.|Thanks Maree & Ian Nankervis-(Nakas)
New managers very helpful and nice, park was very quiet and clean amenities

We just spent our Easter break at Hervey Bay caravan park and the new caretakers/managers Sheree & Dave are not only super friendly but also very professional and nothing was an issue. Their interaction with not only our sites but the whole park was really great to see and hear others laughing with them. We will definitely be coming back to this caravan site again. The amenities were great, clean and always tidy.
Can’t fault anything at all.
Thanks Maree & Nakas

I had me reserves booking into this CP however they were entirely unfounded. This is an excellent CP, one of the best for price parks I've stayed at. Clean, meticulously maintained with extremely friendly staff and fellow caravanners. Two Thumbs up from me.
Great park, sites we a good size and they had beautiful green grass. Onsite managers were fantastic. Clean ammenities.
We spent two nights here. It was very quiet, the pitches are very well maintained. The sanitary facilities are very spacious and very clean. Pleasant moment
We had a great stay at Hervey Bay Caravan park. The staff were so lovely and accomodating! The park is dog friendly too. Short walk to facilities and supermarkets. Nice and quiet. Would stay again!

Amenities were dated but clean an tidy I would not stay again tho an wouldn’t recommend any one to stay as there are so many beautiful parks in Hervey Bay to book an they are actually happy to have your custom the park needs new owners/management as the owner is just rude to put it politely he doesn’t no how to run a caravan park started ranting at that it’s peak season you can’t park your second car in the car park after one of his staff said it was okay to park it there then lady in the office said it has to go into storage at $57dollars a week when I only had 5 days left on the park an peak season the park was pretty much empty pay to store my work car what goes out in the morning an comes back in the Arvo na your ok just an overall feel of wee don’t really want any one on the park because we can’t handle it nice park but owner is a nut job just look thru the reviews there’s a lot that’s had the same issue with the owner beautiful new park getting renovated on the esplanade on the water front go there or any other park in the bay work place abuse you as a business need to be accountable for your actions loads of bad reviews an you come back with a passive aggressive reply to every one sorry there not all wrong learn how to run a caravan park or pack up an move on to something  you can do your policy’s are stupid I read a review were you wouldn’t let a paying customer sit by your pool with a bottle of water do you no it’s summer and it’s basic human rights to have a drink on a hot day

We have just spent a week here. The park was clean and tidy, however, unfortunately this was the only positive we had with our stay. From when we arrived the managers of the park were extremely rude, not helpful at all telling us we weren't able to drive on the grass next to our van due to the pipes and electrical cables underneath the ground, that we would "Damage them, by driving over them" so this would mean that the cables would not meet Australia standards. We were also threatened that we would be kicked out before we had even setup.

The park was not fully booked, and we were distanced from our friends we were travelling with (which they were aware of ahead of time and some remained empty our entire stay).  The whole time we felt like we were being watched, after speaking to other campers they had also had rude interactions with the managers. Not a friendly environment at all, would not recommend to stay here.

And when the managers respond they manipulate the story to cover themselves. Not once we're we offered assistance when parking our vans. If you read all the other poor reviews everyone is saying the same things, Rude managers!

Honestly we were so disappointed with our stay. We are full time travellers and I don’t write this without hesitation.

Our arrival was pleasant and we could see it was a well maintained park. We were shown to our site, but were told we couldn’t drive through because of piping, despite the park being empty and us having a huge rig. This made us question the legitimacy of their piping and electrical work.

Our friends arrived the day after and were put on some tiny sites quite a distance from us, despite there being ample large sites close to us, some of which remained empty our entire stay.

The real kicker was when I was told very rudely that my water bottle was not allowed in the pool area (it was a 30+ degree day) because no drinks at all (water included) were allowed, followed by my 70 year old father being told to get out of the pool in the rudest manner I’ve ever encountered in a cv park. Yes I fully understand the need to manage external visitors, but they had signed in as required and the park was near empty at the time and just us in the pool.

Shameful behaviour and the fact they call themselves travellers with no respect for the travel and holiday community is saddening.

Time for new managers, HVCP.

Hervey Bay Caravan Park is a very neat and tidy park very well maintained with large flat sites with concrete slabs for the awning. It is dog friendly and has a swimming pool and BBQ/ picnic area and spotlessly clean amenities and laundry. A load of washing and the dryer both take $5.00 per load. There appear to be a lot of permanents there, but for the 2 weeks we were there, there were absolutely no issues with anything. The staff at reception were very friendly and helpful.

The town of Hervey Bay is very close, and there are also some takeaway shops, Aldi and a Wollies, all in walking distance.

If you want to go to the beach, it's a short drive from the park.

Would recommend staying at this reasonably priced park.
Staff were terrific and friendly, sites nice and level, amenities very clean but a little dated.
Good spot to stay close to shops and the welcome pét, easy stroll to beach we will be back

We stayed here 12 months ago, and decided to stay here again on this trip. Same managers who are lovely, very accommodating. The park is quiet as it is tucked away off the main road. Mac Donald's, Woolworths shopping centre and Aldi are a quick walk away. Highly recommend Hervey Bay Caravan Park. X0

We stayed at HBCP for only one night (48$). Since we got back late from our tour from K‘Gari we were not able to arrive before 6. Apparently we got a message before about a late fee that applies for check-ins after 6 which is 25$ - already about half of what you pay for one night in general. We did not receive that message until shortly before our arrival because there is almost no reception on K‘Gari. So we had to drive like maniacs to get to the campground before 7, because there is a 40$ late fee (!!!) for arrivals after 7. Fun fact - there are no check-ins possible at all after 8. Explanation was that the owner has to pay the lady at the office (who was incredibly nice) for longer. Never heard of something like that before, we always got the code for the gate online or just as a message on our phones on every single other campground in Australia we visited before.
After our arrival we tried to make the easiest meal that came to our minds - just gnocchi with tomato sauce - and we were not even able to make that in the camp kitchen because there is no stove top.
Also, lights out in the kitchen at 9. That‘s what the sign says. Well, we stood in the dark at 8:50.
Nice people who run it. An older park with nothing fancy but nice and quiet.

The grounds and sites are very well kept and the managers are both very friendly and helpful. Our overall experience was very good  compared to the last time we were there as these managers have elevated the park in all areas .

Arrived early after travelling some distance and having a whale watching trip booked, our introduction to this site was being sent away and told to come back in 10 mins. What a warm welcome for new guests. We returned and were referred to as "those people who raced in". The facilities here are dated at best and I think management have run out of fonts and capital letters for the number of NOTICES there are everywhere telling you what you can't do. Under 16? Can't use the (cold) pool without a RESPONSIBLE adult and don't even think of GRAFFITING in the restrooms!! When you ask for the WiFi code (because it won't be offered to you on arrival) you are basically told it's not worth using because of the bandwidth. I know this review is harsh but we have stayed in some incredibly friendly campsites and met some genuinely lovely people. We had hoped for the same here. Disappointed.

Our Holiday was ruined by this caravan park. We as a Victorian family, booked our accommodatiOn 5 months ago for a 3 week holiday with our 3 kids at this park. We got quoted and agreed on a price, paid deposit, received a receipt acknowledging that 2 adults and 3 kids would be staying - all this info was on the receipt.  We travel up from vic to sunshine coast to arrive in Hervey bay in anticipation of a wonderful holiday only to be called up at 5.30pm the night before arrival to Hervey  Bay Caravan park (6pm is their office closure time) and told we can't stay there the next day unless we fork out $700 extra dollars because their computer system didn't calculate the kids into the accommodation! Is this not illegal or what! They put their problem on to us!  The manager was very apologetic but would not budge in her putting their issue onto us and she insisted unless we pay for our kids we couldn't stay (however instead of 3 kids they reduced the price to 2.. still over 500 dollars extra! Why not reduce it to 0 and honour their original commitment). When we were researching holiday parks we chose that park because of the price as we had a budget that we needed to stick to. My parents were caravanning and joining us to spend time with their grandkids in their van, so they too have missed out.

I felt like they penalized us because we had kids. We entered a contract agreement when we booked and received receipt as proof, not only what they did is illegal, it's immoral. We are having to stay with friends and are having to figure out alternative accommodation. We were stuck and still are as we scramble to find  accommodation and pick up the pieces of this broken holiday. We couldn't understand what would the price to them of having 3 kids in a tent cost extra to them... Different if there was an extra cost outlay for them (cost of them having showers and that be it). I tried to explain that to them but they wouldn't budge. Makes me realize how cruel people can be for money in a time when families are hit the hardest, all we wanted to do is provide a holiday to spend time with our kids and grandparents. They did give ours and my parents deposit back but ruined our holiday that we had planned since beginning of year. We are sooo very very heartbroken by how we had to wear their mistake. Would definitely NOT advise to plan a trip to this park, you may be displaced or having to fork out more $ like we were expected to do!

My partner and I camped here in March. Beautiful green grass, the pool and BBQ areas were clean and spacious, the bathrooms completely exceeded my expectations, clean, well equipt, huge and great pressure in the showers. Very nice 20ish minute walk to the beach. We will be back again thats for sure!

Had a powered grass site 102 which was huge with plenty of room. Easy to get my 20'6 caravan on site with any dramas. Easy walk to KFC, ALDI, Mcdonalds and further on Woolworth's and Sandy Strait shopping centre. Also an easy walk to the Urangan Pier and dog friendly beach.  Very quiet and relaxing. Staff were pleasant and accommodating although some reviews state man was grumpy. Strict, but no problems in my opinion. Dog friendly which is good for our Golden Retriever. Note: check in is 1200 not 1100 which most others are. Not a problem but you wont get in until 1200. Well Kept neat park. Facilities were good although i didnt use the showers as self contained caravan. Highly recommend!
A bit tight but assistance is offered by staff
Good location,  not on the beach but not far to walk.clean and well managed.

My review for discovery parks Fraser street

Amazing! We checked in the superior cabin, as soon as we got in it was beautifully made up and the blankets and sheets were folded in a neat pile. I went out and I was amazed by the fun attractions, such as the bouncy pillow, the gaming room, and the nice friends I made. Definitely recommend if you are looking for a budget place to stay and not luxury style, on the last day I got a go kart out, they were in very good condition and I really enjoyed playing around, this place is one of my favorite parts of my trip, very close to esplanade so there is a lot of yummy eats.

Beautiful location, staff, facilities & gardens. Fantastic kids programme and all so conveniently located just a short walk to the cafes, shops, playgrounds & beaches of the stunning Hervey Bay. Cannot wait to come back

This park is our favourite of favourites. Beautifully presented park. The amenities are very clean and the gardens are pristinely kept. The staff are very friendly and go out of their way to help you. We will always stay there when we visit Hervey Bay.
We had a nice cabin, very neat and tidy!

Second visit here, staff are friendly and the facilities well maintained. Good central location so you can walk to the Esplanade and many businesses.  Nice small lake in the middle with some wildlife. Bouncing pillow for the kids, a couple of pools.

This park and unit we had would rate as the best value for money of any unit we have had this trip. It is close  to the beach and facilities. The unit was well presented with above attention to detail. The check in lady took extra time to give information  on the park and facilitiee
We love it been coming for years.cant get enough of the place.
Great clean park.
One of my regular stops in Hervey Bay. Nice rooms and facilities.

We stayed at this park a little while ago and we got treated like we were criminals
The lady was nice but the bloke with the straw hat and highviz shirt on must of been on drugs 💉💉💉i threw away a kids bouncy castle that had a hole in it and was completely flat he came down on he's push bike and told me I had broken the rules on the park and he wanted me to give him 80$ to have the bin empty and I refused to pay so he made me go in the bin to get a little kids bouncy castle out and i had friends come on the park to visit us and they kicked us off the park because we had friends come down to visit us so i wood not recommend the caravan park to my worst enemy 0 stars
Nice secure clean and well kept site friendly helpful staff, close to the esplanade and shops.

Want to plug-in?  Take care if you do.   the owner says that they’re 15 amp outlets cannot supply 15 amps, For a car or Van the pole will be destroyed and blow up the whole power system?  They angrily insisted that the user would have to pay for the “damage”
Use tin can bay caravan Park instead, their electricity works and is safe.

I suspect what is really going on here is The owner doesn’t understand what their electrician is saying and maybe some of their facilities are out of date and not working properly.   no need to blame your guests and no need to be angry about it. Just get it fixed and it will be fine for another 10 years.

Until then tin can here we come !

Thank you for your reply. It is appreciated.   I was concerned that maybe you hated electric cars.
Just to clarify, are you now saying it is okay for us to plug-in a 15 amp car?
(we don’t mind if there is an extra charge for that of course)
Btw I added one star for the courteous Reply.
Clean and tidy , all reverse parking sites.
We have stayed here on numerous occasions both in the main area and the overflow area at the rear nice clean park with pleasant management
Tolle Gastfreundschaft, sehr hilfsbereit. Roli, der Besitzer, immer mit guten Tips und viel Humor zur Stelle. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Ein Highlight in unserem Australien-Urlaub:)

Firstly, the place was clean and tidy I could say, I will give them that!||But this place was micro managed to an extreme as visitors (if they stop by for a cuppa have to be signed in and then out when they leave). There are multitudes of Cameras 🎥 that are everywhere with a fully fenced place with staff doing patrols on push bikes! |You just feel you are being vigilantly monitored by staff who will come and address you for anything or everything they see. Just made you feel uncomfortable and not so relaxed with the overall environment.

Karen was very warm and friendly on arrival. We loved the park, very neat and clean and quiet. We will come again. Definitely the pool was absolutely necessary and five stars Thank You next time let me do a Mural here travelling artist. Look up Murals on the Moove love to
Great park. Well kept and secure. Amenities block is always clean   The camp kitchen is well appointed. Lovely green area. Close to beach, Bowls club and shopping. We keep coming back
Amenities always clean. Grounds neat and tidy always maintained   Definitely be back.

Hervey Bay Caravan Park was a very nice place to stay. It has all amenities and everything was very clean!
Its very close to the harbour where cruise are sailing for Fraiser Island and from the Reef World aquarium.
We highly recommend it!

On arrival the reception staff could not have been more helpful.Roli [park owner]has a vast knowledge of the area and always willing to share it when asked.The park is very well laid out with generous sized camping and caravan bays.The park grounds are immaculate and mowed and edged to perfection.The amenities block,camp kitchen and pool area were also cleaned to a very high standard.Well done groundsmen and cleaning team for keeping everything immaculate.Great location,great place to stay and will definately return
Swiss greetings😄
This is poorly run and not a nice place to stay
Park has all the amenities you need to a very high standard. Reception couldn’t do enough for us when we wanted a trip to Fraser Island and dolphin spotting. First class and friendly service .
Very clean spotless camping ground and super CLEAN AMENITIES, kitchen area very clean, great for dogs, would stay here again 😊👍
Lovely spotless park

We stayed at hervey bay caravan park  from January 2024 for 8 weeks . The managers, Ellen and mick, are doing a great job looking after the park. The park is very neat and tidy and we would recommend hervey bay caravan park.
Dennis Judy and Ollie [dog]

Nice clean park very nice staff and pet friendly, close to shops and beach.
Highly recommend

The amenities were spotless. I love you., Great location for the bows club next door where you can have a refreshing drink at the bar.ten minute walk to Aldi and woolworths
We would stay here again

We stayed in the Hervey Bay caravan park for six nights over Christmas new year break. In our own caravan. It is run superbly. From the moment you enter the park. You are given your own personalised number for the gate. Swimming pool hours. They have a outdoor kitchen, dog friendly. Maintained beautifully, the caretakers are on the ball with monitoring noise, dogs. We absolutely loved our stay. 10/10. Thank you so much for a perfect holiday. Can't wait to do it again.😊

Went there with a motorhome when touring. A nice, quiet, spacious campsite. Very clean with good facilities. The staff were friendly and helpful. The grocery shops and some fast food outlets are a short walk away, but it is a bit more of a walk to the bay.

THE WORST CAMPSITE I’VE EVER STAYED AT.

The woman at the reception is very rude, she told me she was doing me a favour for staying there! When I paid for it!

I had to leave the campsite at 6pm to try to find another place to sleep when this one was already booked.

Waiting for my refund.

Booked in a powered site 4 3 wks paid a deposit only to get a phone call stating we were not welcome in their park as  the person's  name it was booked in apparently had "some concerning black marks" they didn't bother to elaborate or give  any other reasons or explanation.. how ever after terminating our booking they said we were not welcome in their park ever .. we we're concerned by some of the bad reviews since the new managers took over regarding their attitude and professionalism but decided to give them a go anyway ... WOULD NOT RECOMMEND STAYING HERE EVEN IF YOU CAN GET PAST THE BOOOKING STAGE !!! HAHA
Nice place

Positives zuerst: die Toiletten und Duschen sind sehr sauber und die Dame an der Rezeption ist sehr sehr lieb!
Vom Preisleistungsverhältnis bin ich Sehr enttäuscht. Wir standen auf der unpowered site für $42 pro Nacht. Viel zu teuer. Der Ort war eine große Wiese ohne Licht und schlechte WLAN Verbindung. Die "Küche" hat mich enttäuscht weil es keine Herdplatte oder Kochequipment gibt, dafür BBQ, Mikrowelle, Toaster, Wasserkocher und ein Kühlschrank. Ich finde solche Küchen schlecht für 42$ unpowered. Es ist eher für Dauercamper geeignet

The staff were wonderful, very helpful especially the lady working reception. Bathrooms and pool area all very clean. A short walking distance from downtown area. Great spot for families and young travellers.

OK caravan park. Concrete slabs. Very quiet. Amenities clean except went shower at 3pm on cloudy day no hot water. Guess solar not work. For gods sake don't drive through vacant site instead of backing in. Manager very concious of driving over shaved grass  & un watered sites. Good stop for grey nomads

Friendly, very tidy and the amenities are immaculate!
We will return!

We arrived to Hervey Bay and our original accommodation turned out to be midgee central, we called the Hervey bay caravan park and spoke to Ellen, she was just magic, she fit us into a perfect grassy, quiet space and even had a card for our wedding anniversary on arrival! Mick and Ellen have been nothing short of amazing at this beautiful park!
Karen was so lovely greeting us and organising our sites, showers were easy to get to and very clean!
Great park with clean amenities and helpful staff

Positive Things:
*Very friendly staff that is always helpful and can give you advice on what to do in the area.

*Always clean toilets and showers.

*Nice swimming pool.

*Easy check-in.

*It's just a 5 minutes walk to the stores (ALDI, Woolworths, KFC, Mc Donalds.

Negative Things:
- The camp kitchen is a bit small.
- The unpowerded sites are very dark because of missing lights.

We enjoyed the stay at the HBCP and would always come back!

We stayed there last night. The lady at reception was lovely and helpful and pointed out the best spots in the unpowered section for us (as we were expecting rain and she didn't want us getting too wet). Unfortunately the toilet blocks were a little bit of a hike away for us, but that was negligible as the amenities (including the laundry), although dated, were probably some of the cleanest and well maintained that I have ever been too (& that is a lot). Thank you to the grounds keepers for all of the work you do, it is much appreciated.
Thanks for having us.
We stayed one night just camping. The lady in the office was super helpful and friendly, which made the check-in very easy amenities were very clean and tidy. We highly recommend staying

We stayed two nights at Hervey Bay Caravan Park. The park is super neat and tidy, we were so impressed by how clean the amenities block is, plenty of toilets showers washing machines and clothes lines. The managers have been super friendly and very knowledgeable about things to do around town. Its also a dog friendly park. We will definitely stay here again when we visit Hervey Bay.
Great place to stay, great staff and wonderful amenities.
Nice park, good facilities.  Good security

If you don't want to pay big dollars to be bullied,  stay clear of the HBCP.
Over the last 5 years I have stayed at the park for six month intervals..and welcomed back by the owner each time. We love the grounds, the permanent residents, and generally felt very happy to be there.
But caretakers have been appointed over the last few weeks, and they are running the park as total bullies...the couple in question are only temporary (thank goodness) but don't in the meantime waste your money....go else where. If you want to be screamed at for letting your dog urinate on the park grass, or travelling over 5klms or just generally being there. .go on in.. but be warned that you get no refunds if you decide to leave, which you will.
I thought bullies were trying to be stemmed at school age....but this couple slipped thru some how.
Great place,.can walk to beach, have unpowered out the back which is spacious and pet friendly, on lead
Great little caravan park but can be tight for big rigs.

Need to do something about the lights in the amenities block as they have put the lights on a timer and they are constantly going out when you are in the shower or toilet.
The trouble with the timer is that if the lights are already on, they can go out at any time you are in there if you don’t turn them off and back on again.

This is the first time I have not been permitted to book into a camp-site prior to 12 midday on the dot. I diligently parked outside for about 20 minutes until the clock struck 12. I spoke to another camper who had been going for years, who was adamant she wouldn't be returning due to the strict rules now implied by the new owner.  I also found the inflexible rules a little harsh. I will find another park next time I'm in Hervey Bay.

When arriving at the park you just want to be greeted with a welcome smile, the park sites are very tight and sometimes the park needs to offer assistance to ensure you get onto your site safely. There a bowls club next door that offers meals and music every Friday night (recommend) amenities were very clean, camp kitchen was open air BBQ, there is nothing wrong with the park just needs a couple of changes to make it a great park.

Molto fiscali sull'orario di ingresso ed anche un certo nervosismo nel gestire l'entrata dei clienti.
Wifi non disponibile per tutta la durata del mostro soggiorno (2 notti) e questo per noi è stato un disagio in quanto era nei criteri di scelta del campeggio.

Will never book there again
Ludicrous cancellation policy of 21 days notice otherwise you loose your booking and no refund
Made a booking and had to cancel due to engine troubles
Gave enough notice to enable our site to be relet
Zero empathy.  Zero customer service
The park itself is very neat and tidy but we found the managers attitude rather brupt and unwelcoming

We stayed here for almost a month with our caravan, including a small dog, and loved the location and the quiet surroundings. Close to the supermarkets (Aldi & Woolworths), McDonald, KFC, bike trails and only a couple of km to the pier. We can also walk to a nice hotel for dinner.
The park managers are friendly and helpful and made us feel very welcome. Good secure gates at the park but we still locked all our belongings. We will stay here again next year.

Avoid at all costs 👎🏼
Unfortunately this wasn’t the best caravan park we stayed at on our recent travels. We booked for 2 nights, 2 powered campsites for ourselves and our friends. Firstly we were advised that we HAD to check in prior to 5pm and there was no flexibility around this, even though the website currently states the office is open until 6pm. We were allocated a site directly opposite the amenities, having a young baby I thought this was great, until I heard the way the fly screen door slammed every.single.time it was closed. There were ants in the microwave in the camp kitchen. And to top it off, on our second and final night we decided to have a couple of reasonably quiet drinks and a game of cards outside our campers, the owners came over (quiet rudely I might add) to remind us that their park rules meant we must be quiet and shut things down from 9pm. The way the male owner spoke to us and our friends was abhorrent and degrading and only directed to the females in the group. Anyone would have thought we were making an absolute racket. We were threatened that if we didn’t follow his rules he would be back and may have to ask us to leave the park at 10:15pm at night. In my opinion, you catch more fly’s with honey, but this guy was next level rude. We were told there was numerous complaints made about us being loud, which I fail to understand since our 7 month old baby was asleep in our camper right next to where we were sitting. So all in all, clean ammenities but that’s the most positive things I can say about the place, but we did not appreciate the slamming bathroom door at all hours or the rude owners.

My husband rang 7 times to this caravan park an then asked the price for a powered caravan site its $55 a night an when he said omg thats expensive the lady hung on him wont b going to this caravan park if thats how ppl r treated on the phone

Je ne recommande pas.
Accueil médiocre
Toilettes loin des emplacements sans électricité.

Had a really great experience all round here.
On arrival we got greeted so well and were able to move to a closer site to the amenities.
We had a few issues with our gas bottle and bbq and the grounds keeper and owner were quick to jump in and give us a hand, even bringing some of their personal tools to fix us up. We couldn’t have cooked any meals without their help.
We were given heaps of room on our site and in warmer weather would have loved to jump in the big pool 🌧️

A very warm welcome, a very friendly owner and a very pleasant, clean place.
I recommend

Unglaublich, diese Gastfreundschaft hier im Caravan Park; Wir wurden 5 Minuten vor Feierabend noch mit unglaublich offenen Armen empfangen. Sowas Sympathisches ist uns schon lange nicht mehr passiert! 😀
Der Inhaber persönlich hat sich sehr viel Zeit genommen uns über alle möglichen Sightseeings, Restaurants und weitere Wichtigkeiten zu informieren und uns mit den besten Hosts zu connecten. Sensationell! Vertrauen war da von der ersten Minute an. Hier kommt man her und fühlt sich pudelwohl!
Really nice camp, hot and clean showers, swimming pool, bbq and kitchen available and gentle staff ! I recommend 🫶

Stayed there a week in our caravan, good size sites lovely quiet area, though only 5 minutes from shops and beaches. Beautiful gardens and well maintained amenities. Roley was a mine of information  on the area and attractions. Will definitely stay there again nxt time around. Best of all it's  dog friendly.
Stayed in a camervan, super facilities, beautiful location a short walk to the main street. Roli was a super guy and good banter, very knowledgeable of the area and places to go.

VERY HAPPY WITH THE SERVICE!!
Rolly was very nice
Great place to stay.
Quiet /friendly/perfectly clean amenities/beautiful manicured lawns it was a pleasure to stay here

Had a great stay for two nights, had everything we needed - kitchen, bathrooms and swimming pool all within ten metres of our van! Special thanks to Riley for his friendliness and all his suggestions for the rest of our travels!
Stayed on a powered site with my dog.  Great park, close to the beach and with excellent maintained facilities.  Staff went out of those their way to help and keep me safe.  Will stay again.

The worst caravan park owner/manager in eight years of travelling full time and five years part time. He is rude and belligerent. Requested a change of site because rain was predicted and we were in dirt. He refused to help because he was TOO BUSY. Half an hour later, while we were absent from the park, he instructed the caravaners behind us to back over our hoses and sullage, as they were having trouble getting in.

Advertising a pool NO WATER. Garbage bins were over flowing.
